name: Jon Tester
subject: three reasons I need you to chip in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hello,

Jon Tester from the great state of Montana here and I wanted you to be the first to know: **I’m officially running for reelection.**

My team says we need to raise $1,000,000 in the first 24 hours of our launch. So, [**before I ask you to chip in a split donation between my campaign and American Bridge PAC**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60145533/396152452/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2341-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViMmU2OWQ5LWZiYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kIMrrKWv0r9erTN2etF6x9QrnUTTzpTMpXenZECS3KU=) , here are three reasons why:
1\. **Sabato’s Crystal Ball ranks Montana a TOSS-UP****.** The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana.

2\. **I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators****.** Political Experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us.

3\. **Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018.** So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.
Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Please:

[**Chip in a donation of any amount – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – to become a Founding Donor of my campaign. Every dollar will help us block Mitch McConnell from taking over the Senate >> **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60145534/396152453/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2341-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViMmU2OWQ5LWZiYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kIMrrKWv0r9erTN2etF6x9QrnUTTzpTMpXenZECS3KU=)
| | [Donate $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60145535/396152454/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2341-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViMmU2OWQ5LWZiYzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kIMrrKWv0r9erTN2etF6x9QrnUTTzpTMpXenZECS3KU=)

Thanks,

Jon

**We’ll start with the good news:** Monday was a big legislative deadline in Georgia, and we’re celebrating that we successfully stopped a number of awful bills, including SB 221, the Senate’s massive omnibus voter suppression bill.
**Now, we’ll get into the bad news:** Throughout this legislative session, extremist lawmakers proposed one bill after another to suppress our rights and target Georgia’s most marginalized communities. Now, we’re determined to stop the remaining harmful bills as they advance toward becoming law — like SB 222, which targets election workers with new felonies and misdemeanors, HB 231 and SB 92, which are part of an effort to undo the will of voters who’ve elected pro-criminal-justice-reform District Attorneys, and SB 140, which bans gender-affirming care for trans kids.
**These bills are unacceptable. Georgia lawmakers are attacking our rights, but we’re fighting back. **
Fair Fight Action is on the ground working with key legislators and allied partner organizations, and we’re mobilizing university chapters and thousands of volunteers to contact their representatives to urge them to vote “no” on these bills before they come to a final vote.
[_**Can you pitch in $20 or anything you can today ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight to support our critical work to fight back against extremist bills in Georgia? We need all hands on deck to hit our $15,000 mid-month goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60145722/396157982/641727787?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230313_f_mm1_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTk3YzhmNi1mZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gA-XP3tSTRf2cmR6aQt4rUmXxbRNVoR_SKZ7GWRcyHg=)

This isn’t the first time we’ve witnessed legislation that undermines our fundamental rights and our democracy in Georgia, and it unfortunately won’t be the last. Leading up to another key election season in 2024, extremists are making a desperate and calculated attempt to push their conspiracy-filled rhetoric.
Instead of making laws to tackle the real, systemic issues Georgians face, lawmakers are pushing legislation that takes away access to vital healthcare and makes it harder to access the ballot box. We need laws that expand these freedoms — not the exact opposite. **That’s why Fair Fight Action is working around the clock to counteract these extremist bills before they come to a final vote. **
[_**Anything you can contribute will make all the difference during this critical moment to defend our rights in Georgia. Chip in $20 today before our mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow so we can not only meet but exceed our $15,000 goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60145733/396158022/641727787?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230313_f_mm1_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTk3YzhmNi1mZGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gA-XP3tSTRf2cmR6aQt4rUmXxbRNVoR_SKZ7GWRcyHg=)

clean_body: We're almost halfway through the month, and we need to stay on pace towards hitting our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal. | | | = | = We’ll start with the good news: Monday was a big legislative deadline in Georgia, and we’re celebrating that we successfully stopped a number of awful bills, including SB 221, the Senate’s massive omnibus voter suppression bill. Now, we’ll get into the bad news: Throughout this legislative session, extremist lawmakers proposed one bill after another to suppress our rights and target Georgia’s most marginalized communities. Now, we’re determined to stop the remaining harmful bills as they advance toward becoming law — like SB 222, which targets election workers with new felonies and misdemeanors, HB 231 and SB 92, which are part of an effort to undo the will of voters who’ve elected pro-criminal-justice-reform District Attorneys, and SB 140, which bans gender-affirming care for trans kids. These bills are unacceptable. Georgia lawmakers are attacking our rights, but we’re fighting back. Fair Fight Action is on the ground working with key legislators and allied partner organizations, and we’re mobilizing university chapters and thousands of volunteers to contact their representatives to urge them to vote “no” on these bills before they come to a final vote. = = = = = = This isn’t the first time we’ve witnessed legislation that undermines our fundamental rights and our democracy in Georgia, and it unfortunately won’t be the last. Leading up to another key election season in 2024, extremists are making a desperate and calculated attempt to push their conspiracy-filled rhetoric. Instead of making laws to tackle the real, systemic issues Georgians face, lawmakers are pushing legislation that takes away access to vital healthcare and makes it harder to access the ballot box. We need laws that expand these freedoms — not the exact opposite. That’s why Fair Fight Action is working around the clock to counteract these extremist bills before they come to a final vote. = Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Adam Schiff (via RBG)
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
Republicans started piling on. Immediately.
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15884?t=6&akid=1717%2E564421%2Ek5z5Ej) I just announced my campaign for the United States Senate. **And then Republicans started piling on. Immediately.**

In reality, it started when Kevin McCarthy unilaterally removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

But it’s continued. McCarthy posted a video on social media calling me a liar over, and over, and over again. Matt Gaetz introduced a resolution to prevent me from receiving classified briefings in Congress — called the _PENCIL Act_. Go figure. Even presidential wannabe Mike Pompeo joined the act attacking me.

No matter how much these MAGA Republicans hate each other, they are united in one cause: **Complete and total opposition to my efforts to provide oversight, demand accountability, and protect our democracy. And that’s why they are coming after me.**

Friend, this is bigger than me. They will try to destroy _anyone_ who stands up to them, and their leader Donald Trump. That’s why I need you to stand with me today.

[**Rush a $3 donation to Ron Be Gone and our campaign to help me fight back against the vicious Republican attacks that they’re unleashing to stop our movement to save our democracy. I really need you with me today.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15886?t=8&akid=1717%2E564421%2Ek5z5Ej) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15892?t=14&akid=1717%2E564421%2Ek5z5Ej)

body:
Our team is built by grassroots supporters like you! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqrMGenohDwHPVbe8MzgqQpIFZzkcpHmS5LIfyQZfTlKKEYIM6zuJkLhY1yZA1lTd-Mn1eCubx1eFAPG8rURaA6Azd2o4IFv18GGjLHR-kyI7Pl4xXlI63AUN40SjlK0Prljh56J0epaBVj8uaJ5UXgRbU68Lilw4tWWsdzKIAaos/3uh/_FjJgRuaStysaeL5IkQMJA/h1/h3vfulp7cldQNzp0p3b_1NHC9kwkroIVSELoN1BZwMM)
Folks — I wanted to reach out and humbly ask for your support.

Here’s the truth: **Our team is built by grassroots supporters (like you!) chipping in just a few dollars at a time and helping to build our strong movement.**

But with the new Republican majority, our campaign needs to be firing on all cylinders and be prepared for anything thrown our way.

# **Biden's Sneaky H.R. 5376 Is A Nightmare For 401(k) And IRA Savers**
---
### **Biden's Sneaky H.R. 5376 Is A Nightmare For 401(k) And IRA Savers**

| | | Hi, Dr. Ron Paul here.

Biden just made the lives of American retirement savers much harder.

_And the mainstream media is ignoring this story!_

**Here's what happened:**

Joe Biden couldn't get his "Build Back Better" bill passed last year because everyone knew it would cause **more inflation**. So he stubbornly pushed it through Washington in "H.R. 5376".

Without a doubt, this sneaky move confirms what I've always believed:
* Governments will never stop printing fiat currency until it is worthless!
* Anyone keeping their savings in dollars or stocks should consider smarter options, TODAY!

---
| | _So is there something you can do?_

YES! Physical gold offers an opportunity to **escape wealth confiscation**. And the best way to protect your savings with gold is through a PHYSICAL GOLD IRA.

Why? Because:
1. You avoid taxation just like with any other retirement account.
2. The gold is in PHYSICAL form. Which is far more trustworthy than "paper" gold.
3. You _**won't pay a DIME in penalties or taxes**_ when you sell your stocks and buy gold.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing the doctors who mutilated Chloe Cole
body:
I’ve filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family

| |
---
| |
---
**_“It’s well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty.”_**
---
-Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland’s leading experts on pediatric gender care
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot, I’ve filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a “boy.” In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show _Ingraham Angle_ to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. [**Please take a moment right now to watch video from this primetime interview and learn what we’re up against in this monumental battle – then consider making a tax-deductible gift of $25 or more to help fund this critical lawsuit.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj66ghhnkqhm54e4gois85dkn7nj3uijvvdlq6lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs) Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology.As a child Chloe was bombarded—largely through social media—with the idea that “transitioning” would make her special, accepted and popular.When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning” her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her.And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents.They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son.That’s right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.)EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country.That’s why we’re not just suing Kaiser Permanente... **We’re suing Dr. Lisa Taylor** for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe’s other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. **We’re suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le** for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. **And we’re suing Dr. Susanna Watson** who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe’s mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe’s mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria._If folks like you and I don’t stand up and fight back now, who will?_[**Chloe deserves justice, and children deserve protection – so can we count on your tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqaqumldpkp1njoamlcqf1lb94pr8m3re62ebrdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs) My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us.I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately legal battles aren’t free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly.**But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win – but as a nonprofit organization, that’s only possible with your help.** In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children.I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you’ll be with us every step of the way. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7u9stjnqc65fuejhvpia7qm8cdgsesqviv7rvt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs) Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won’t turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child – if she’s even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be “normal.” But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: **_There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries... and we’re coming for you!_** My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, “you can either have a dead daughter or a live son.”And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry “Big Pharma” and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole’s case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice – and attack on American children – in its tracks.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | **[DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zapj901gdknon9l2rv01m6v7p3iecs0ell47n8mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs)**
---
P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to “just another part of her gender journey.” Because they’d already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. [**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today, and give our lawyers the resources they need to win this crucial fight.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zudlo0d9ufh9nps0sg665kujv0a112umded6okp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs)
---
| |
---
| |
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogfk4s0p25mo8n7ue9hgaiblat78fk0g7h00sfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs)
---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm94v3justoelaf3o1e3ch2dh3q865qtpoq4tdd0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o33clh6cob246h22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpu3uvoq5cqetg2gpukqbakg6h5s1j24eo7kiac8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0stge1o31c9h2bs)_

Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Vicious lies on the airwaves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431546:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r)
|

Peter,

The election is almost two years away, but the attack ads against me have already started!

My first question for you is, why would the RADICAL LEFT take this unprecedented action? Something tells me they must be really worried about something we're doing... something we're uncovering...

My next question for you is: Does the left think we're **_not_** going to fight back against their lies? **[Let me know where you stand!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431546:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r) **

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431546:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r)
Throughout my life, I've been willing to take on opponents much bigger than me. I've stood up to big government liberals and political bosses **(from both political parties**) in defense of timeless American principles like Freedom, Personal Responsibility, and Accountability.

Another thing I've learned over the years is that **big tech and big business can be just as bad as big government... especially when they use their power to try to "rig the system" in their favor. **

Our work to expose and hold people accountable for this corruption **is what triggered the attack ads against us in our home district**. It didn't take much research to figure out that the attack ads are sponsored by the well-funded organization of one of Ohio's leading liberal activists.

With the LEFT pulling out all stops to defeat us, there are two things I know for certain:
* These attacks will be relentless, and
* I'm not backing down from them!

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431546:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r)
When tech giants collude with big government, **it's dangerous for every American.** We're working day and night to uncover the truth, but they're digging in their claws and trying to make an example of me. I hope you agree that there's a lot at stake for our country, and **[I'm going to need your help in fighting back.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431546:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r)**

It's a great honor to stand in the gap for you and your family! **[Please let me know if you are able to help!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431546:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r) **

God Bless,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431547:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431546:JiLpSfGNh:m:1:3365131770:0828C238939AB3104CA80B7BF129240A:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

Delaware, OH 43015

body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00334%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n11A8JzQOSmfVsutvusWrA&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00345%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b2vkShhRvQDB2jYUt04Y4A&sysid=1)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
We want to hear what you think | We're committed to having a massive year in 2023, and with gun-grabbers in Washington feeling as emboldened as ever, we will need it.
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)

Peter,

Did you see our message?

We're committed to having a massive year in 2023, and with gun-grabbers in Washington feeling as emboldened as ever, _we will need it._ The fate of the Second Amendment hangs in the balance, and it's up to us to save it.

**We rely heavily on the input of law-abiding gun owners like YOU, so we're asking that you complete our****Official Survey on Gun Verification****IMMEDIATELY.**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**
It's no secret that these are trying times for our Second Amendment. _The Executive Branch's current occupants are the most anti-firearm group of government officials in American history._ If we're going to defeat their radical gun-grabbing agenda, we must band together.

**This survey will only take a few minutes to complete, but those few minutes will have an immense impact on our fight to save the Second Amendment.****Please complete it NOW while you still can.**

**[Complete the NRA's OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION TODAY to help us move forward with the best possible strategy to SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **NRA**
Subject: The NRA has a new survey

**[OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**
**DO YOU AGREE THAT EVERY LAW-ABIDING CITIZEN IS ENTITLED TO THE RIGHT TO SELF-DEFENSE?**

**[YES»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**

**[NO»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**

Peter,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**
While the anti-gunners rely on _**dark-money billionaires**_ to set their agenda, the NRA gets its input from red-blooded American patriots. It's grassroots supporters like you who power our movement.

**[Please use this personalized link to take the NRA's Official Survey on Gun Verification and help protect YOUR rights.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**

Thank you,

NRA

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432159:JK9p4fGND:m:1:3331421248:5E3CEB6E141802300DCFB31157EF0584:r)**

Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 9, 2022.

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: please, let me explain:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I'm about to ask you to donate $5, friend. **But first, please let me explain why your $5 today will make such a big difference in the fight to defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**
Experts at The Washington Post are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." And after Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they're now targeting me as a key pickup opportunity in their fight to flip the Senate, too.
We simply can't let that happen — not when everything from Social Security to reproductive freedom to the future of the Supreme Court are at stake. But while Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies gear up to spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs.
**That's why I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up ahead of tomorrow's critical mid-month deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal — one $5 donation at a time. Falling short would send a clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs, so I'm counting on your urgent help, friend.**
**[Please, will you chip in $5 right now so we can reach our critical mid-month goal, defeat the GOP here in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats? clean_body: | | | I'm about to ask you to donate $5, friend. But first, please let me explain why your $5 today will make such a big difference in the fight to defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. Experts at The Washington Post are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." And after Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they're now targeting me as a key pickup opportunity in their fight to flip the Senate, too. We simply can't let that happen — not when everything from Social Security to reproductive freedom to the future of the Supreme Court are at stake. But while Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies gear up to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. That's why I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up ahead of tomorrow's critical mid-month deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal — one $5 donation at a time. name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re running attack ads against me Jim Jordan under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431746:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r)
|

Patriot,

The election is almost two years away, but the attack ads against me have already started!

My first question for you is, why would the RADICAL LEFT take this unprecedented action? Something tells me they must be really worried about something we're doing, something we're uncovering.

My next question for you is: Does the left think we're **_not_** going to fight back against their lies? **[Let me know where you stand!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431746:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r) **

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431746:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r)
Throughout my life, I've been willing to take on opponents much bigger than me. I've stood up to big government liberals and political bosses **(from both political parties**) in defense of timeless American principles like Freedom, Personal Responsibility, and Accountability.

Another thing I've learned over the years is that **big tech and big business can be just as bad as big government, especially when they use their power to try to rig the system in their favor.**

Our work to expose and hold people accountable for this corruption **is what triggered the attack ads against us in our home district**. It didn't take much research to figure out that the attack ads are sponsored by the well-funded organization of one of Ohio's leading liberal activists.

With the LEFT pulling out all stops to defeat us, there are two things I know for certain:
* These attacks will be relentless, and
* I'm not backing down from them!

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431746:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r)
When tech giants collude with big government, **it's dangerous for every American.** We're working day and night to uncover the truth, but they're digging in their claws and trying to make an example of me. I hope you agree that there's a lot at stake for our country, and **[I'm going to need your help in fighting back.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431746:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r)**

It's a great honor to stand in the gap for you and your family! **[Please let me know if you are able to help!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431746:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r) **

God Bless,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431745:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431746:JBkoUfGNO:m:1:3391001263:4141F0469D5C50989D4D4365198EA679:r)

---

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system February 17, 2023.

name: Don Huffines
subject: House Bill 2 Fails to Address Problem of Property Tax System
body:
Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O; property taxes.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-fhthttd-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhthttd-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **New HLF Analysis on House Bill 2**
## _" Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes."_
DALLAS, TX, March 13, 2023 -- Texas has received an unprecedented amount of your money this year. Taxpayers have overfunded the government by $62 billion of your money. This massive surplus should be returned to Texans by eliminating the school property tax.Our latest _Huffines Liberty Brief_ analyzes HB 2 and was used as written testimony before the Texas Legislature's Ways and Means Committee.At the core, our bill analysis found that HB 2 only treats the symptoms of our broken property tax system while failing to address the underlying disease: incessant growth in local government and school district spending.

Another problem with HB 2 is that appraisal caps, like the homestead exemption, increase property tax rates to maintain increased revenue from properties with lower taxable valuations.Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes. [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhthttd-yuddtktydi-y/) [Read Full Analysis](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhthttd-yuddtktydi-j/) Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:_" To put it bluntly, property taxes are immoral. Any policy that keeps Texans from owning their own home, while at the same time forcing renters and businesses to carry a burden from which they get no relief, should not pass. It should not even be considered. I spend my time and treasure advocating for broad property tax relief where every citizen is a winner and treated equally. Texans have options, let's explore them."_Huffines further added:_" Texas tax problems are largely self-inflicted. That's the bad news. The good news, however, is the fixes needed are uncomplicated. This bill analysis charts the way forward through five easy steps:__1) Limit state spending growth
2) Freeze school M&O property taxes
3) Use state budget surpluses to buydown M&O property taxes
4) Require voter approval for local governments and special districts to exceed the no-__new-revenue tax rate
5) Enshrine property tax relief in the Texas Constitution_ _Following this path, the Texas Legislature could cut property taxes almost in half in eight years, or less. "_ [Read Full Analysis](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhthttd-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. clean_body: Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O; property taxes. No images? FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press Manager Contact: mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com New HLF Analysis on House Bill 2 " Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes." DALLAS, TX, March 13, 2023 -- Texas has received an unprecedented amount of your money this year. Taxpayers have overfunded the government by $62 billion of your money. This massive surplus should be returned to Texans by eliminating the school property tax.Our latest Huffines Liberty Brief analyzes HB 2 and was used as written testimony before the Texas Legislature's Ways and Means Committee.At the core, our bill analysis found that HB 2 only treats the symptoms of our broken property tax system while failing to address the underlying disease: incessant growth in local government and school district spending. Another problem with HB 2 is that appraisal caps, like the homestead exemption, increase property tax rates to maintain increased revenue from properties with lower taxable valuations.Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes. Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:" To put it bluntly, property taxes are immoral. Any policy that keeps Texans from owning their own home, while at the same time forcing renters and businesses to carry a burden from which they get no relief, should not pass. It should not even be considered. I spend my time and treasure advocating for broad property tax relief where every citizen is a winner and treated equally. Texans have options, let's explore them."Huffines further added:" Texas tax problems are largely self-inflicted. That's the bad news. The good news, however, is the fixes needed are uncomplicated. This bill analysis charts the way forward through five easy steps:1) Limit state spending growth 2) Freeze school M&O property taxes 3) Use state budget surpluses to buydown M&O property taxes 4) Require voter approval for local governments and special districts to exceed the no-new-revenue tax rate 5) Enshrine property tax relief in the Texas Constitution Following this path, the Texas Legislature could cut property taxes almost in half in eight years, or less. " The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of liberty , prosperity , and virtue in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.### | | | | ---|---|--- (214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. subject: Vicious lies on the airwaves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432184:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r)
|

Peter,

The election is almost two years away, but the attack ads against me have already started!

My first question for you is, why would the RADICAL LEFT take this unprecedented action? Something tells me they must be really worried about something we're doing... something we're uncovering...

My next question for you is: Does the left think we're **_not_** going to fight back against their lies? **[Let me know where you stand!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432184:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r) **

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432184:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r)
Throughout my life, I've been willing to take on opponents much bigger than me. I've stood up to big government liberals and political bosses **(from both political parties**) in defense of timeless American principles like Freedom, Personal Responsibility, and Accountability.

Another thing I've learned over the years is that **big tech and big business can be just as bad as big government... especially when they use their power to try to "rig the system" in their favor. **

Our work to expose and hold people accountable for this corruption **is what triggered the attack ads against us in our home district**. It didn't take much research to figure out that the attack ads are sponsored by the well-funded organization of one of Ohio's leading liberal activists.

With the LEFT pulling out all stops to defeat us, there are two things I know for certain:
* These attacks will be relentless, and
* I'm not backing down from them!

[**DEFEND JIM JORDAN
FROM LEFTIST ATTACKS -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432184:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r)
When tech giants collude with big government, **it's dangerous for every American.** We're working day and night to uncover the truth, but they're digging in their claws and trying to make an example of me. I hope you agree that there's a lot at stake for our country, and **[I'm going to need your help in fighting back.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432184:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r)**

It's a great honor to stand in the gap for you and your family! **[Please let me know if you are able to help!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432184:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r) **

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432185:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432184:J_HiUfGNK:m:1:3331421248:CAA294E269E3AD55BDDB5B8263EE3BE2:r)

body:
I remember how the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.

| **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,** I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.** And now it looks like history is repeating itself. **Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
* More than 2 million lost job
* Stocks plummeting over 20%
* IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

| WHO'S GOING TO WIN THE SD12 DEBATE?
---
| Senate District 12 Republican Candidate Debate THIS THURSDAY!
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979.
Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.

What is a "Meet and Greet"? A "meet and "greet" is simply inviting your friends and neighbors over for dessert and coffee so that I can meet them and answer their questions. This is an opportunity for voters to interview the candidate. I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors and personally asking for their vote.
Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors?
Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best.
If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at [debbie@chaseforva.com](mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com) to schedule a date.

clean_body: Are you coming? | | | | | | == | | | WHO'S GOING TO WIN THE SD12 DEBATE? | Senate District 12 Republican Candidate Debate THIS THURSDAY! | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979. Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | THIS THURSDAY IN COLONIAL HEIGHTS "THE BIG VDCL DEBATE" | | 2A VOTING RECORDS MATTER Senator Chase has a lifetime 100% perfect score with both VDCL & NRA A Rating | | | | | | == | What is a "Meet and Greet"? A "meet and "greet" is simply inviting your friends and neighbors over for dessert and coffee so that I can meet them and answer their questions. This is an opportunity for voters to interview the candidate. I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors and personally asking for their vote. Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors? Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best. If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com to schedule a date. | UPCOMING MEET & GREETS | SAVE THESE DATES | MARCH 31 | | | | == | | | mailto:chris@chaseforva.com | APRIL 6 Meet & Greet in Bon Air | | | | == | APRIL 13 Meet & Greet in Colonial Heights | | | | == | APRIL 27 Meet & Greet at Summerlake in Chesterfield County | | | | == | MAY 11 Meet & Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County | | | | == | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | mailto:chris@chaseforva.com | | | == | | | == | | | == | CAMPAIGN NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. | | Peter, The 2001 Authorization for the Use of Military Force was _originally_ intended to go after those who attacked America on September 11th. But for the last **_TWO DECADES_ ,** presidents utilized the resolution to justify military operations in more than 20 countries and against groups that did NOT exist before 9/11. When the bill came to a vote, guess what the results were... **_One vote (me) to end the never-ending wars and 20 votes for continuing to write check after check to fund these wars._** _[**Chip in now to stand with me and tell the Democrats - and Neocons - we're tired of their never-ending wars. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432206:JGlSOfGN8:m:1:3331421248:B7E3B38A86B3A7224232ACBC7EFB9D63:r)_

name: Left Action via Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign now: Don’t let billionaires evade income taxes. Make them pay a minimum rate.
body:
A minute to stop tax evasion by the wealthy?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64e52748-b64e-4728-b8bd-da978b47ff7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**Add your name, and tell congress to Make Billionaires Pay a Minimum Income Tax**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5205f993-a921-4d65-8be5-f63d80490315/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **There are billionaires in America paying a lower income tax rate than their secretaries. There are some paying no income tax at all.** **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0bcffea-58a5-45ab-afb2-74b72822f903/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** This is just plain wrong, which is why President Biden has proposed that billionaires pay a rate of at least 25%.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T687baeaa-5d70-4ea1-a180-81ec5e0cd407/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| A minimum tax for billionaires is eminently reasonable, and it has broad support among Americans across the political spectrum. **And yet, Republicans in congress refuse to pass it.** Don't let them get away with it. We need to keep up the pressure, and make them feel the political pain. We can win this one, if enough people speak out. [**Add your name, and tell congress to Make Billionaires Pay a Minimum Income Tax**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c379b86-17fc-4ea3-a5c5-69f94acfd089/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for joining us and our friends at Left Action to promote a tax system where the wealthy pay their fair share, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ec8da01-d1ed-44b5-9d15-3f46aaa22fb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/minimumtaxforbillionaires-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6857e072-85df-415e-a18c-5efe6f3b2b2f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: 7,928 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
There's a number I need you to know, friend: **7,928**.

**Nevada's last Senate race came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest Senate race in the entire country.** Experts are already saying this cycle could be just as close. In fact, early polling shows Republicans and Democrats _neck and neck_ in this must-win battleground state.
That means we have **zero room for error** in a race that analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say could decide Senate control. But with _The Washington Post_ calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, national Republicans are already coming after me with baseless attack ads, and I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back.
**That's why it's absolutely critical we reach our $50,000 mid-month goal before tomorrow's midnight deadline. If we come up short, we might not have enough resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks – putting this seat and our entire Senate majority at risk.**
**So please, friend, I'm personally asking:****[_Will you give $5 or more now – as much as you can spare – to help me reach my mid-month goal, win in Nevada, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60166165/396240485/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2393-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjM0ZGVhZi03YmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UhpIwS6HzjVNhF0LAdqSVwfyWhBie-35naz8qQtvdDU=)**

clean_body: | | | There's a number I need you to know, friend: 7,928. Nevada's last Senate race came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest Senate race in the entire country. Experts are already saying this cycle could be just as close. In fact, early polling shows Republicans and Democrats neck and neck in this must-win battleground state. That means we have zero room for error in a race that analysts at FiveThirtyEight say could decide Senate control. But with The Washington Post calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, national Republicans are already coming after me with baseless attack ads, and I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back. That's why it's absolutely critical we reach our $50,000 mid-month goal before tomorrow's midnight deadline. If we come up short, we might not have enough resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks – putting this seat and our entire Senate majority at risk. So please, friend, I'm personally asking:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Every bit of your grassroots support makes such a huge difference. name: Sarah Longwell
subject: They knew they were lying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

We’ve known that Donald Trump lied about the 2020 election and his culpability in the January 6 attack. We also know that Fox News hosts like Laura Ingraham, Sean Hannity, and Tucker Carlson helped spread these lies among their viewers. But now we have the receipts. They knew they were lying to America the entire time. The lawsuit against Fox News by Dominion Voting Systems has exposed Hannity, Ingraham, and Carlson as not just liars, but frauds. And now that House Speaker Kevin McCarthy gave Tucker Carlson early access to footage of the January 6 attack, we know that Carlson doesn’t even believe the misinformation he’s putting out. I recently joined CNN International’s _Amanpour & Company_ to break down what McCarthy was trying to accomplish by giving Carlson the footage, why Fox News thinks these lies continue to pay off, and why the truth still matters. [You can watch the full interview with my analysis here.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/MVmcnY8_964W96yqjC8G9w2RW33LWhB4Y6P2sN8GDX7r3q90_V1-WJV7CgWl8W46qtV04MBc64W7bf5tg50jrtBW2nqQNx5PwvN2N141XjXvYX9sW3XV7MK78jLqgW2RvTWR2XCg-SW6VVww04YvyVCW5r50yv6M71YHW31fR_z99Y_9vW3R9hJr5hHZ_CW5Ll9jf6q3tNwW7k0zgF7xgzqMW6F47FC81013WW5JNHHF2-NJLKW1B6gK64180qFW6BYs6H9j1KWbVr3tVW1RT9q3W7G3B958R3Z5sW8QWqrn6LYNt4W1QGZ488jtxq5VbG40x6qpNW-W8jhHfq3xVyGrW7D3hx95T84wfW8JDvsC5SPh9HW8H431V3J73HVW4SMkr27HL5gkW2hnqb_698wHkW798JNK34W0DWW2XWN6F75_M1DW11j3Sg4nHscR3nwx1)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/MVmcnY8_964W96yqjC8G9w2RW33LWhB4Y6P2sN8GDX7r3q90_V1-WJV7CgDXyW5lSG5195cvlzN8bVffp9T-8sW4B25Sw3jcHTQW6ndmqg3hCYZ_W4vPvny3BKf3sW485TbG3m8qb0W71zNj67bPwWSW2yqdW_30H9D9W2v8sN91C7FXnW8_sjW-8vK1QqW6PB_K55C4Dy3W8xchsc7XRGtLW6kTGnn9f01BdW9jsRmG86mDygW8fPhkJ4MkK3hW7Nwtvz8vwxgYV57SzG1Y1dBZW8yHwFl2ZYq2yVzDMr57VZQrRW98c5T46ZYwz5W2z_5cS1dRNXGW5ctgQZ1PK2wGW6Pn9JX4TMrk5W7mFpFK2v-KYtW4_PZ8d96HX43W3dss725lrZpwN96hdj_78qqmW7Vv3Bn1l8VcHVB9-wT4l7Y0kW3QxGTg34G2bR3k_j1)
---
The lies about the 2020 election and the January 6 attack chip away at trust in our institutions. They also make it more likely that something like January 6 can happen again. As long as Republicans continue to give oxygen to the lies and enable the liars spreading those lies, we’re going to have to stay on guard. Listen to my analysis, let me know what you think, and share it with anyone you know who needs to learn the truth about these attacks on our democracy. We have to make sure the truth drowns out the lies and the liars. Sarah Longwell
President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmic1gv4kvsi258t6lk8rrda254k559ngu1maja0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It 's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrj7i57vnauomtfili13okctqo3j6alnlt8v04ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5748m7mqu1dap8d6m8bbvr5c9oq38qakc7am0ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbl1jgu5877n5fn6m2fpb0geloscfie3k8p1fi38_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $25**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt59rf2rakauljh948v4setp1ng5rmh230gueek8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1qut851q62cs62fle11fvkujpnp1v2cvshn5peo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za44es66l8mjsuc6cnjvcr9qcvbjd189ma8itq1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6rd91qrnt5iqvs2ukj1k9oo2o2dsv5rccaqjob0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg0qd8memcg2jaitn87elpfm9qckrff6i7ab865o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd6hdp3vugujhtst89vdd4h44m5nud3riu6ftps8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkiui88oih4fct65uo5stacmbiba0q4r68881hgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3g69or4cph2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

Deroy Murdock

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18906?t=1001&akid=3055%2E346206%2ENfyADk ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230314-3055-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3055_346206_NfyADk&akid=3055%2E346206%2ENfyADk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3055%2E346206%2ENfyADk

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: The First Amendment is UNDER ATTACK
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431713:6zzTgfGNZ:m:1:3365131770:883C8AC84700CE75F2E7D1AF47589252:r)
---
Peter, Democrats seem to DESPISE the First Amendment, arguing that we don't have a right to free speech and that the GOVERNMENT should be able to decide what we can say and when.

Make no mistake about it, they prefer censorship. They want the power to control what American citizens like you can say and what you can hear.

**They have ignored the fact that we have First Amendment rights in this country.** My team is conducting a flash poll and we need your response ASAP - [**do you believe our First Amendment rights should ALWAYS be protected?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431713:6zzTgfGNZ:m:1:3365131770:883C8AC84700CE75F2E7D1AF47589252:r) I'll say it again: The Democrats don't like the First Amendment. But if true patriots like you stand with us, we will continue to defend our right to say things that the liberal left and globalists don't like.

[**Will you stand with us?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431713:6zzTgfGNZ:m:1:3365131770:883C8AC84700CE75F2E7D1AF47589252:r) We need an overwhelming response from true conservatives like you by 11:59 PM tonight so that we can show not only Democrats but the entire country that we will ALWAYS stand up to defend our Constitutional rights.
| [ **PROTECT THE FIRST AMENDMENT!** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431713:6zzTgfGNZ:m:1:3365131770:883C8AC84700CE75F2E7D1AF47589252:r)
---
Now is the time for conservatives to unite and fight back against THE DEMOCRATS' attack on our fundamental rights.

I hope to see your name on the list when we review it tomorrow. [**Be sure to add it right now.

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62431713:6zzTgfGNZ:m:1:3365131770:883C8AC84700CE75F2E7D1AF47589252:r) Thank you, Harriet Hageman

But if true patriots like you stand with us, we will continue to defend our right to say things that the liberal left and globalists don't like. We need an overwhelming response from true conservatives like you by 11:59 PM tonight so that we can show not only Democrats but the entire country that we will ALWAYS stand up to defend our Constitutional rights. | Now is the time for conservatives to unite and fight back against THE DEMOCRATS' attack on our fundamental rights. I hope to see your name on the list when we review it tomorrow. subject: Update on my fight against Forever Wars
body:
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kX1Ko5_SNJFBsQSJZfaUy0t32blPZKybQAyxlnaMm54xYqa6J56T4U5GI_ucTE3umj2mqCM30snZOht3VCQ2b8YYMoiPY5VYLG8Sh7F8Ed3Q2B9VkSAUNjI-bO80SHUjR3sDaQBu_bfWWUHOdIqbGfGSYyMB55DDKBqrXLhNNeyzE_UJBJWA-24IqPJA46YlekFFcAWfkgU=&c=aLaVrkTA6JYg7fV9lU_SLDZtmdW0Z6z8xb23mlKClRnFFGPhWITSyg==&ch=hp5CGA45PzmahvgbHCpLfD10JD2Jm18dd_VFIznlNKWcR7qN0gtdRQ==)

| Peter,
---
| A few weeks ago, I was proud to lead the effort to end all military and financial aid for the War in Ukraine. I had a crazy idea that we should secure our own Southern Border before we secure a corrupt nation halfway across the globe!
But my mission to stand up to the Military Industrial Complex on behalf of the American People didn't end there...
Last week, I forced a vote on legislation to end another forever war, this time in Syria, and to BRING OUR TROOPS HOME NOW.
---
| | [HELP ME END FOREVER WARS >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kX1Ko5_SNJFBsQSJZfaUy0t32blPZKybQAyxlnaMm54xYqa6J56T4U5GI_ucTE3umj2mqCM30snZOht3VCQ2b8YYMoiPY5VYLG8Sh7F8Ed3Q2B9VkSAUNjI-bO80SHUjR3sDaQBu_bfWWUHOdIqbGfGSYyMB55DDKBqrXLhNNeyzE_UJBJWA-24IqPJA46YlekFFcAWfkgU=&c=aLaVrkTA6JYg7fV9lU_SLDZtmdW0Z6z8xb23mlKClRnFFGPhWITSyg==&ch=hp5CGA45PzmahvgbHCpLfD10JD2Jm18dd_VFIznlNKWcR7qN0gtdRQ==)

| Allow me to set the stage:
FIRST - Obama gets us into a Civil War in Syria.
THEN - President Trump (the first president in DECADES not to start a new war!) does everything he can to get us out.
But NOW - The Deep State is fighting tooth and nail to keep us locked in this quagmire indefinitely. They're using authorization for use of force in Afghanistan, 2001 to justify conflict in Syria, 2023!
These neocons think they can construct democracies out of sand, blood, and Arab militias. That's why I had no choice but to stand up to them and file a War Powers Resolution to finally end this conflict. It's time to put AMERICA First - not the Military Industrial Complex First!

In a presidential election year, buying advertising space will be more expensive than last year (when we won the most expensive House race in the state!) and Republicans will be working overtime to hold on to their razor-thin House majority. = = | = | = I am once again defending a toss-up seat projected to be one of the closest in the nation, so it’s critically important for us to build a strong foundation right now. name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: How a bill becomes a law - Kyrsten Sinema edition
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Step 1: Silicon Valley Bank lobbies Congress hard to weaken bank regulations and oversight.
#

Peter —
**Step 1:** Silicon Valley Bank lobbied Congress hard to weaken bank regulations and oversight.
**Step 2:** Their lobbyists wrote checks for the maximum donation allowable to Kyrsten Sinema between March 28-31, 2018.
**Step 3:** Weeks later, Kyrsten Sinema is one of the few Democrats who voted to weaken that oversight and regulation.
**Step 4:** Silicon Valley Bank collapses.
This is the reality: Senator Sinema takes money from bankers, hedge fund managers, drug executives and votes their way. It’s why they spend so much money to keep her in office.
It’s also why we need YOU to help Ruben fight back. It’s our only chance.
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today? Do it before our FEC deadline ends and we are legally required to file our report.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230314-1-30-15&t=1&akid=462%2E734936%2EcnEKhO)

clean_body: Goochland & Buckingham | | | | | | Convention Form Deadline Tomorrow March 15 Goochland and Buckingham | Each county has a different form deadline date. Please ask/ share this email with friends and family. Print out/ complete the Delegate Form so you will be eligible to vote John McGuire at the May 6 Senate District 10 Convention at == At the top of the form for "Unit" put your county. Reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804 588 2646 with questions and to turn in your form. Delegate Form County Deadlines: Wednesday, March 15 - Cumberland, Goochland. Friday, March 17 - Buckingham, Louisa, Fluvanna, Appomattox. Monday, March 20 - Hanover, Amelia. Friday, March 24 - Powhatan. Closed: Saturday, March 11 - Prince Edward. | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | Endorsement List == | I'm sure many of you received the low down mailer calling me a Liberal Democrat from my opponent in Louisa County who actually ran three times as a Democrat. Considering I consistently earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia from the American Conservative Union and CPAC, I hope you will see through the BS and share the truth. my response with just facts to a false attack email sent by my Louisa opponent, the most read/shared email I've ever sent. == for WRVA interview where I discuss my campaign and a few of my successes with John Reid March 10, 2023. | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Rosen, Jacky
subject: I'm a top target for defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Team: With Nevada having just decided Senate control, experts at The Hill report that the GOP is coming after me as a top target for defeat heading into 2024. I need your help to fight back and win.
While Republicans are busy prioritizing the agenda of their megadonor allies, I have been working in the Senate to lower everyday costs and deliver critical progress to people in Nevada and across the country.
But FiveThirtyEight says the battle for Senate control could once again come down to Nevada – and the last race here was won by less than 1 point . Now, time is running out before our midnight deadline, and we're still falling short of our crucial goal.
That's why I'm personally asking, my friend: Please, will you split $30 or more now between my campaign and Serve America so we can hit our midnight goal, keep Nevada blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
Last year, the GOP spent more than $55 MILLION in a desperate attempt to turn Nevada red – but thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we stopped that nightmare from becoming a reality.
We can't let up in this fight, though. Republicans need to flip just two seats to take back the Senate – and Mitch McConnell and the full force of his special-interest allies are gearing up to come after me with everything they've got.
That's why falling short of our midnight goal is not an option – it could mean handing the GOP a massive early fundraising advantage. So please, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support:
So, will you split $30 or more now between my campaign and Serve America so we can fight back against the GOP and keep both Nevada and the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
Thank you. I'm humbled to have your support.
Jacky
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/jackyrosen.jpg]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]

clean_body: | | | Peter, While Mike is working hard to deliver results in Washington, our team wanted to take a moment to reach out to you on his behalf. Our mid-month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and right now, we’re still not at our goal. Peter, Mike’s taught our team to NEVER give up, no matter how hard the challenge ahead looks. And even though we’re falling behind on where we need to be, I know with great patriots like you on our team, we can catch up. Peter, Mike wouldn't just let anyone on his A-team. Serving as a Green Beret, he knows how important it is to have the right people by your side when you’re in the trenches. You’re one of our most dedicated conservatives out there, and we don’t want to lose you at this critical moment, Peter. | | De Oppresso Liber, Col.
