name: Maggie Hassan
subject: need 16 people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We came up short of our February fundraising goals
| | | Hi there, this’ll be quick.

We came up short of our February fundraising goals – bad news for a campaign like ours that’s still paying off the debt we accrued in order to win.

March is off to a slow start too.
---
We did the math – if just 16 people donate $3 or more right now, it’ll help get our numbers back on track. I’m hoping that I can count on you to be one of the 16 folks we need so badly.

Here’s the best link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60156097/396205658/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2232-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGFjYmY0ZC02Y2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-dEDiqmBTrq9TOvhj3aFg5VmFbwZzoCVnyYPNHk4RTU=)**
Why do donations matter in March?

Well, the GOP flipped the House and pundits are forecasting a tough cycle for Democrats this time around. If we let our foot off the gas (or worse, can’t pay down this debt promptly), it’ll make matters even worse.

Thank you - I appreciate it more than you know.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Rand Paul
subject: a message to Dems and Neocons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
The 2001 Authorization for the Use of Military Force was originally intended to go after those who attacked America on September 11th.
a
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhprqdj2hr5sqr4eap8rpi0bkea267gh71j3335o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i6ao32clh2bs)
---
| | Friend, The 2001 Authorization for the Use of Military Force was _originally_ intended to go after those who attacked America on September 11th. But for the last **_TWO DECADES_ ,** presidents utilized the resolution to justify military operations in more than 20 countries and against groups that did NOT exist before 9/11. When the bill came to a vote, guess what the results were... **_One vote (me) to end the never-ending wars and 20 votes for continuing to write check after check to fund these wars._** _[**Chip in now to stand with me and tell the Democrats – and Neocons – we’re tired of their never-ending wars. **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrf6fk1js5uor9030n7cmqovc66l25601c4ru010_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i6ao32clh2bs)_
---

---
| | We can’t afford to continue sending our sons and daughters into harm’s way simply because Democrats and the Neocons enjoy supporting the military-industrial complex. It’s time to end this madness once and for all. _[**_Stand with me if you agree >>_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zata5uh3sfppdetahfjvgqgppl6s60c1c5av94oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i6ao32clh2bs)_ In liberty,Rand Paul

One vote (me) to end the never-ending wars and 20 votes for continuing to write check after check to fund these wars. | | | | We can’t afford to continue sending our sons and daughters into harm’s way simply because Democrats and the Neocons enjoy supporting the military-industrial complex. It’s time to end this madness once and for all. In liberty,Rand Paul | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | | | | | | Contribution rules: I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). I am at least eighteen years old. subject: Bad news from Wisconsin →
body:
Bad news: Trump-crony Dan Kelly is officially on the ballot for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. | | |
---
| | **Bad news: Trump-crony Dan Kelly is officially on the ballot for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court.** In case you don’t know, Kelly is an election denier who:
* Is anti-abortion access and anti-gun safety.
* Worked as a “special counsel” for Wisconsin Republicans, aiding their attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election with their fake electors scheme.
* Was endorsed by Trump during his last run for a seat on the court in 2020.

**If he wins, he’ll be a rubber stamp on the Wisconsin GOP’s extreme, right-wing agenda.** This race could have pivotal consequences for state Democrats – it could give us a chance to un-gerrymander Wisconsin. **And with fair maps, Democrats could have their best shot in _over a decade_ to gain power in the state’s legislature.** But state-level races are overlooked and underfunded – making them especially vulnerable to Republicans’ outsized spending. **Right now, Republicans are _pouring_ money into Wisconsin ahead of next month’s Supreme Court election, so we need to mobilize around state Democrats _now._** [Will you chip in $7 today to build Democratic power in state legislatures and defeat Trumpist Republicans in states like Wisconsin and across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mG2A1_UdSm9b8cFpMA49aqTfMPcP7JBUeA6zq28HFlsKY9hE0vJ-qgaxkJhotmCJetrAUbSZrIMBWVjt2DLd-ezwAKGcxG0Gmc6fHrO9EkIrB3Quk-TnNptDiKL3WSBqcnQ41yPTCS9sxSK42dfQZt2Vg1zodSKL6G_bWuVkLmi4GhDkHOsbZtexdg3JkSXfoWaX3AZPoD5bCJlJXkS0RhxNmSVCek08nBMFHZBUZLiz-F1chzi70eJ_CXK6YgqF3L-6QBdiQRC4SCjkDDbHp7O1WY33VLDtcT9osorBPSeP8-KOWwIk0CV1UBAVoD6h30VKniBXcj8-PIDLVQipngpR1pmJ0IxqGPcycdyenhwKM/3uh/bpg4c9_yTP6lf_0ylrQekA/h0/7k70uDaRwqBiS5GwaFFtNExDP1IDgqPU0qvUlzCfDfU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

subject: this critical moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Team,

The NRCC’s House majority is paper-thin, meaning they are going all-in to try and expand their majority in 2024. The NRCC is hard at work devising how to flip seats and further its agenda of division and extremism.

**One seat they’re desperate to take is mine.**

We already know that the NRCC cannot stand bipartisan leadership that puts families first and prioritizes what _people_ want. With 2024 being a presidential election and the NRCC _already_ causing mayhem, it’s likely that New Jersey will face its fair share of contention.

Before we are embroiled in the chaos of election season, we need to ensure our resources are all set. We’re halfway through March, and the quarter ends this month.**[Now is the time to boost our momentum and remind right-wing extremists that their support pales in comparison. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kyrsten Sinema helped crash Silicon Valley Bank through support for deregulation, which Ruben Gallego voted to oppose. We know who we want for Arizona’s Senate seat.
body:
Sinema’s deregulation vote comes home to roost
| | | | |
---
| | |
---

| | | | | Peter, **Who caused the crash of the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB), _the second largest bank crash in U.S. history,_ is simple to figure out.** _One of the biggest causes of this crash_ of the kind that set in motion the Great Depression, _was none other than Kyrsten Sinema. In 2018, when Trump deregulated banks like SVB, he knew where to buy a vote. GOP Senators like Ted Cruz were easy. But, he had a "Democrat" who'd also endanger our economy: Kyrsten Sinema._ [**Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego? No more SVB crashes caused by greedy politicians**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e92c745-2d15-465a-8438-7e9ff8e9643f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Kyrsten Sinema's appalling Senate record is defined by doing whatever banks ask of her, as long as the cash keeps flowing. As Michael Daly wrote, for _The Daily Beast_ : ** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2936fd8-ec67-4d52-9b17-8fecdc5a5b91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **_Sinema's donations from big banks skyrocketed to over $100,000, including 3 LONGTIME LOBBYISTS FOR SVB! Meanwhile, Ruben Gallego, veteran, Latino, fighter for choice, gun safety, workers & democracy, voted against that travesty of a bank deregulation bill._** **_Sinema proved she's a danger to our economy. Rep. Gallego is a public servant who'll protect it._** **_(And if Gallego can win in Arizona, it means good things for President Biden’s reelection in 2024!)_** [**Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego? | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. clean_body: Sinema’s deregulation vote comes home to roost | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Who caused the crash of the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB), the second largest bank crash in U.S. history, is simple to figure out. One of the biggest causes of this crash of the kind that set in motion the Great Depression, was none other than Kyrsten Sinema. In 2018, when Trump deregulated banks like SVB, he knew where to buy a vote. GOP Senators like Ted Cruz were easy. But, he had a "Democrat" who'd also endanger our economy: Kyrsten Sinema. Kyrsten Sinema's appalling Senate record is defined by doing whatever banks ask of her, as long as the cash keeps flowing. As Michael Daly wrote, for The Daily Beast : | | | | | | | | Sinema's donations from big banks skyrocketed to over $100,000, including 3 LONGTIME LOBBYISTS FOR SVB! Meanwhile, Ruben Gallego, veteran, Latino, fighter for choice, gun safety, workers & democracy, voted against that travesty of a bank deregulation bill. Sinema proved she's a danger to our economy. Rep. Gallego is a public servant who'll protect it. (And if Gallego can win in Arizona, it means good things for President Biden’s reelection in 2024!) Thank you for speaking for all the people Sinema tossed aside. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: EXPOSED: The D.C. Swamp’s lies about January 6 are crumbling
body:
President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.

President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason. | | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652921%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JXpZblrmEj%2f7BJHQhCTIZQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652922%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T2cQcU7uJOt8dvzuAep%2bag&sysid=1)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652923%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vuQuWxFkdiECosAGa5RZrw&sysid=1)**

There’s growing panic in the Washington, D.C. Swamp as you read this email.

Both Democrats and RINOs in Congress and in the national media are terrified by Tucker Carlson’s release of U.S. Capitol camera footage this week.

**As a generous supporter of Freedom Watch, you know this is a good sign.**

Thanks to Tucker, millions of Americans are seeing for themselves that the official narrative about a “violent insurrection” at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021 is a pack of lies!

**People across the country who bought the “violent insurrection” pitch now know:**

* The protester known as Q Shaman was not violent, and he was actually escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

* US Capitol Police officer Brian Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

* Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.**

Tens of millions more Americans will know this crucial information within two weeks, as their family, friends, and neighbors spread the word in person and on social media.

What’s more, that critical video footage may help me defend my clients and all January 6 peaceful protesters...we’ll know soon!

name: VoteVets
subject: Just $1, to get an early start?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to VoteVets today.
#
Derek —
$1.
That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to VoteVets today. Yes, $1.
$1 to help us get our budget set NOW for new races that will determine control of Congress.
$1 to help us prepare to fight back EARLY against right-wing disinformation targeting Veterans.
$1 to help us reach our fundraising goals before we set our budget for the next two years in a few days.
We spent $3.5 MILLION expanding the Senate and holding the line in the House last year. And we know that $1 probably doesn’t seem like the kind of money that can flip a seat or save a Veteran from the far-right. But when lots and lots of people are chipping in $1, it all adds up.
So what do you say?
[**Please make a $1 contribution to VoteVets before we set our budget. What we raise now will help determine how much we can do in 2024, and these early months are CRITICAL to our long-term success.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230314-15&t=1&akid=7789%2E3013755%2EkVwoNN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [CONTRIBUTE $1](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.FWrlES&amount=1&refcode=em230314-15&t=2&akid=7789%2E3013755%2EkVwoNN)

The team at VoteVets

[**MINNESOTA JOINS 17 OTHER STATES IN LAWSUIT TO PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60161192/396221102/1024896269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGU4ZDJkMy03MWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5--tOqHDPh-zSH_HMwHGomdjgpHEyECEXNyAR7cKez4=&emci=ef63c0cd-71c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=20e8d2d3-71c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=11037791)
Friend,
When I was re-elected in November, I promised I would continue to do everything I could to fight back against any rollback of abortion access — and I’m keeping my promise.
Last week, I joined 17 other states across the country in a lawsuit challenging the Food and Drug Administration’s unnecessary restrictions for dispensing Mifepristone — the leading method for safe and effective abortion in the United States.
As Republicans continue to systematically attack abortion rights in the wake of the Supreme Court’s Dobbs decision, it’s imperative that we don’t give up an inch.
I will do everything in my power to protect reproductive freedom in Minnesota, but it’s never been more important for all Americans who are with me to raise their voices and be heard.
[**To make it 100% clear that we will not back down, I need to collect 10,000 pro-choice signatures in support of this lawsuit. Will you add your name right now to be counted?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60161193/396221103/1024896269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGU4ZDJkMy03MWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5--tOqHDPh-zSH_HMwHGomdjgpHEyECEXNyAR7cKez4=&emci=ef63c0cd-71c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=20e8d2d3-71c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=11037791)
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60161194/396221104/1024896269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGU4ZDJkMy03MWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5--tOqHDPh-zSH_HMwHGomdjgpHEyECEXNyAR7cKez4=&emci=ef63c0cd-71c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=20e8d2d3-71c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=11037791)****
Thank you,
Keith Ellison

Peter, **Our mid-month deadline is TOMORROW at 11:59 PM.**
_But this isn’t just any deadline..._

Whip Clark is a fearless fighter for women’s equality, LGBTQ equality and for the rights of all who are disenfranchised and marginalized in our society. Throughout her career in public service, Whip Clark has focused on lifting up women and families.
We have much to discuss and we welcome you, our volunteers in politics, with gratitude for your support and engagement. Your advocacy and mobilization give us the strength and optimism to keep fighting and lead with our values — as we build on our momentum in the last election to take back our House majority!
Thank you,
NANCY

name: Coach
subject: Get in the Game!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Let’s go into the 2nd quarter even stronger >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/827ba7b5cc6270fc/d1c8bb795aa85a04c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, We’re nearly to the end of the first quarter of 2023, and I’ve always prided myself on preparedness – _and I know that success is a team sport. _ **Our team noticed that you haven’t donated yet this year. So, I’m asking for your help to chip in a contribution of any amount today. **
---
[**SUPPORT YOUR TEAM**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/827ba7b5cc6270fc/9770602e5609ef0dc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Right now, there is a concerted scheme to divide this great nation – I can tell you as someone who has led a group of dedicated individuals in our pursuit of victory, we didn’t always agree, but one thing always remained at the core: trust and integrity. [**Restore America’s Core Principles >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/827ba7b5cc6270fc/ffdf4584dea99f72c3d6b838967d376c/33013) In light of the ever-evolving revelations of D.C./Corporate corruption and collusion, it’s becoming harder and harder for Americans to sift through fact and far-left fiction. **They continually move the goal posts, then cry wolf when Washington Wokesters don’t get their way. It’s downright hogwash to hear the doubled-down lies coming from the Left. ** _...and it’s going to be our ruin if we don’t get in the game and fight! _ That’s why I’m reaching out, because you’re an American patriot. A fighter who doesn’t sit on the sidelines, and our team needs your valuable support right now.

clean_body: Let’s go into the 2nd quarter even stronger >>> | | | Peter, We’re nearly to the end of the first quarter of 2023, and I’ve always prided myself on preparedness – and I know that success is a team sport. Our team noticed that you haven’t donated yet this year. So, I’m asking for your help to chip in a contribution of any amount today. Right now, there is a concerted scheme to divide this great nation – I can tell you as someone who has led a group of dedicated individuals in our pursuit of victory, we didn’t always agree, but one thing always remained at the core: trust and integrity. In light of the ever-evolving revelations of D.C./Corporate corruption and collusion, it’s becoming harder and harder for Americans to sift through fact and far-left fiction. They continually move the goal posts, then cry wolf when Washington Wokesters don’t get their way. It’s downright hogwash to hear the doubled-down lies coming from the Left. ...and it’s going to be our ruin if we don’t get in the game and fight! That’s why I’m reaching out, because you’re an American patriot. A fighter who doesn’t sit on the sidelines, and our team needs your valuable support right now. \- Coach | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc. | | id:2023-03-09-13:45:09:143t

name: Sen. Chuck Schumer
subject: We need Letitia James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Hi, Peter, it’s Sen. Schumer – and I need to be blunt for a second.

I’ve seen a lot of things during my time in office – but the GOP’s _constant_ attempts to rip more and more rights from vulnerable Americans are among the most _alarming_ I’ve seen yet.

From the crusade against voting rights to the latest attacks on reproductive freedom, MAGA extremists in Congress have made it clear that they’ll stop at _nothing_ to push forward their agenda. And, while my colleagues and I are working around the clock to defend our fundamental rights in the Senate, we need strong defenders of progress at the state level, as well, to fend off the GOP’s attacks.

**Peter, Letitia James is _exactly_ the kind of fearless fighter we need defending New York. That’s why I told her team that I would help them raise $10,000 before midnight tonight to help power her work, and I’m counting on _you_ ****to chip in.**

[**Please, will you donate any amount you can spare to Letita James’ and my campaign now to help her fight back against the powerful and corrupt?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163302/396229021/-1790581528?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1007-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYyNGM2My03NWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAgW147bF7Z97QrX__ZGpTe3vpp5_iZIrrHeA7K5CFI=)

As someone who was _also_ born and raised in Brooklyn, New York, I’m incredibly proud of the work that Letitia James has done for our state. She has brought many of the most powerful and well-funded actors in our nation to justice, tackled the housing crisis that has spiraled in New York, and fought to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care. And still, she’s not done fighting yet.

Peter, with MAGA extremists working to restrict abortion rights, gut Social Security and Medicare, and more, we _need_ a fearless fighter in office who refuses to bow, break, or be bullied. That’s why I’m proud to support Letitia James and the hard work she’s done so far for New Yorkers – and I’m counting on you to stand with me.

[**So please, will you make a split donation between me and Letitia James to help fund her fight for justice and progress? Any amount you can spare will make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163307/396229026/-1790581528?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1007-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYyNGM2My03NWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAgW147bF7Z97QrX__ZGpTe3vpp5_iZIrrHeA7K5CFI=)
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163308/396229027/-1790581528?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1007-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYyNGM2My03NWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAgW147bF7Z97QrX__ZGpTe3vpp5_iZIrrHeA7K5CFI=)
---
Thank you for stepping up for New York’s working families.

Onward,

Chuck Schumer

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: GoFundMe shut down our fundraiser
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfro2bo586ueha83eeji3p71tsb2nu1en7ehs6h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf9euchqjuunkm4085g531v39873cini63f7bojg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z50rk09mhsae7kpudogr1citqf9to1tc2q64vqhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7fpn1e292vp4svsmo5f1n6mpsarro1c9010jg10_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4q3835mnvtnk5uubu1vbpp4hdsp4mm6smn1jr3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlen90s0oqdkdehv2oqqhsffkleuc7dsdsnvf528_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7i8te49djkb0vcp2lhehdlu6p792ll2mnkns9ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv9sk8kvatpjlmtmlg5c4qiipi82vp4i4g0qmc80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv9iogc208fm715ar185vfrk7uq29djrmi28d3r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9oohhfmfg8qg4cnmvvprkhk5mr8hk5ouv885ido_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0ajql4mir0k3lv4n1vbou18pio16ulk0ndf17b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60or5c3hmeoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkcp0ruq94h1c8rdgf7hgcutbptftugaqkrn4moo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7n4ng1nsvh7n39fllesthsppbd17b2lnki2vct8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Ed Markey
subject: I know I can count on Becca Balint to get it done.

body:
Hi Peter, I’m Ed Markey, proud U.S. Senator from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163771/396230651/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3MGYyZC03NmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTGs0t4cFtdmXHefCp9rxJj7rm3sG96NLb048GGCQWg=&emci=c7e0a64b-e3c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=86970f2d-76c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163772/396230652/510315814?refcode=E20581-20230314-MarkeySurrogate-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3MGYyZC03NmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTGs0t4cFtdmXHefCp9rxJj7rm3sG96NLb048GGCQWg=) Hi Peter, I’m Ed Markey, proud U.S. Senator from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts. When it comes to fighting the good fight and sticking up for workers, seniors, LGBTQ+ Americans, immigrants, and everyone else who has been long overlooked in Washington, **I know I can count on Becca Balint to get it done.** As a former public school teacher and President Pro Tem of Vermont’s state Senate, Becca is well versed in hard work and public service. And as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to represent Vermont in Congress, her historic victory brought long overdue representation to my neighboring state. We’re coming up on a big end-of-quarter deadline on March 31, and Becca’s team tells me that she still has a ways to go to reach her $32,000 online fundraising goal for the quarter. **Becca’s fighting like hell for us in the House of Representatives, so if you can swing it,[_I’m asking today if you’ll support her re-election campaign with a contribution of $5 or more._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163773/396230653/510315814?refcode=E20581-20230314-MarkeySurrogate-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3MGYyZC03NmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTGs0t4cFtdmXHefCp9rxJj7rm3sG96NLb048GGCQWg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163774/396230654/510315814?express_lane=true&refcode=E20581-20230314-MarkeySurrogate-EG-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3MGYyZC03NmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTGs0t4cFtdmXHefCp9rxJj7rm3sG96NLb048GGCQWg=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163775/396230655/510315814?express_lane=true&refcode=E20581-20230314-MarkeySurrogate-EG-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3MGYyZC03NmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTGs0t4cFtdmXHefCp9rxJj7rm3sG96NLb048GGCQWg=)**

Becca’s in the thick of the fight to win Medicare for All, tackle the climate crisis, invest in affordable housing, protect our democracy, and rebuild America’s middle class. As an original co-author of the Green New Deal, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a fighter like Becca on the House side who understands that future generations are depending on us to pass a New Green Deal _now._
There are so many forces against us in the fight to pass progressive policies in Congress — but Becca has never shied away from a challenge before, and isn’t backing down now. [_**If you’re with her, click here to donate whatever you can to Becca’s campaign for Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60163780/396230660/510315814?refcode=E20581-20230314-MarkeySurrogate-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3MGYyZC03NmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTGs0t4cFtdmXHefCp9rxJj7rm3sG96NLb048GGCQWg=)
Thanks,
— Ed

“The Dealmaker”_

clean_body: Hi Peter, I’m Ed Markey, proud U.S. Senator from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts. | | = Hi Peter, I’m Ed Markey, proud U.S. Senator from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts. When it comes to fighting the good fight and sticking up for workers, seniors, LGBTQ+ Americans, immigrants, and everyone else who has been long overlooked in Washington, I know I can count on Becca Balint to get it done. As a former public school teacher and President Pro Tem of Vermont’s state Senate, Becca is well versed in hard work and public service. And as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to represent Vermont in Congress, her historic victory brought long overdue representation to my neighboring state. We’re coming up on a big end-of-quarter deadline on March 31, and Becca’s team tells me that she still has a ways to go to reach her $32,000 online fundraising goal for the quarter. Becca’s fighting like hell for us in the House of Representatives, so if you can swing it,= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Becca’s in the thick of the fight to win Medicare for All, tackle the climate crisis, invest in affordable housing, protect our democracy, and rebuild America’s middle class. As an original co-author of the Green New Deal, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a fighter like Becca on the House side who understands that future generations are depending on us to pass a New Green Deal now. name: JD Vance
subject: I wanted to keep you in the loop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Hey, friend, I hope you’re doing well

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrj9gai3qf3tllqeil282uv53g3l8upqcvf7msbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4clh2bs)
---
Hi friend,

I’ve been on the road non-stop since before the election; I feel like I haven’t had a chance to introduce myself properly.

I was born and raised in Ohio, and while I didn’t have the easiest upbringing, it taught me a lot. I’m no stranger to hardship, but I found early on that my love for my country was the driving force in my life. I knew that I had to give back to my country in the best way possible by joining the Marines and serving in Iraq. After this experience, **I no longer took most things in my life for granted because I saw these freedoms taken away firsthand.** I also learned the importance of patriotism, respect, and perseverance.

After serving this great nation, I returned to Ohio and founded a business, where I very quickly learned how countries like China were stealing our jobs and hurting our workers. This career path emphasized what I learned in the military about dedication and hard work. Seriously, owning a business when every Democrat is after you is no joke.

I decided to run for Senate in Ohio because I knew that this was lacking in the US government. Our elected officials have failed to protect us, and I won’t let that happen any longer. I won because you trusted my mission and my character. **I won’t let you down.**

I’m so honored to have your support, friend. Knowing you had my back through one of the craziest adventures of my life was all I needed to make it worth the fight. I’m looking forward to representing the values you and I hold dearly in the U.S. Senate in these upcoming years. I want to protect my fellow Ohioans and Americans, and I hope you have my back on this journey.
| [**STAND WITH ME**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z40fkngcbljso01govnp4tsb8e3asogancspo3oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4clh2bs)
---

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

_If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation._ [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zva6h4cqtllo0pc9mls1qfeoapc177e0t8541g2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4clh2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo5daqkseo9clf94mqg0t05u3ullu62en3cilob0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4clh2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4brhih6nu4e7n19nj206p9k4cfvqfkfghineso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3i61or4clh2bs)

body:
This is how we defend our democracy. Let’s keep up the momentum.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60164276/396232674/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230314Philly_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MDQ4NmU4LTc3YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIm4FJa3QHcuQV2lZ6L8_kBnAvGE1dGnH_fjxpl0y9I=)
| Fellow activist, We’ve made some big moves in 2023. Just last month in the special elections, we proved that when we put in the work in our communities – educating, engaging, and empowering them to make their voices heard – it pays off.

Now, it is time to make even bigger moves. **The New Pennsylvania Project is expanding our operations to Philadelphia to start expanding the electorate in Pennsylvania's most populous city.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60164277/396232675/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230314Philly_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MDQ4NmU4LTc3YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIm4FJa3QHcuQV2lZ6L8_kBnAvGE1dGnH_fjxpl0y9I=) Regional Organizing Director, Carrie Fowler, already building relationships in Philadelphia **[Fellow activist, we are beyond excited to execute this expansion. Here in Philly, we can transform the electorate into something that is truly representative of our Commonwealth. Pitch in $10 today to help us raise the resources we need to empower Philadelphia’s historically disenfranchised and neglected communities.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60164278/396232676/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230314Philly_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MDQ4NmU4LTc3YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIm4FJa3QHcuQV2lZ6L8_kBnAvGE1dGnH_fjxpl0y9I=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60164279/396232677/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230314Philly_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MDQ4NmU4LTc3YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIm4FJa3QHcuQV2lZ6L8_kBnAvGE1dGnH_fjxpl0y9I=) Philadelphia is Pennsylvania's biggest and most populous city, but it has long been extremely underrepresented in the electorate. And this problem isn’t disappearing on its own. In 2022, Philadelphia’s vote share dropped to the **_lowest levels in two decades_** , especially in immigrant communities and communities of color.

The New Pennsylvania Project aims to not only expand the electorate in Philadelphia but also build a strong foundation of community power within neighborhoods that often get left behind. Consistent, year-round voter engagement and civic education are not happening here, but we are about to change the narrative. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60164280/396232678/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230314Philly_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_G2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MDQ4NmU4LTc3YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIm4FJa3QHcuQV2lZ6L8_kBnAvGE1dGnH_fjxpl0y9I=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60164281/396232679/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230314Philly_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_G3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MDQ4NmU4LTc3YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIm4FJa3QHcuQV2lZ6L8_kBnAvGE1dGnH_fjxpl0y9I=) **[In order to reach as many members of these communities as possible, we are not just finding a new base of operations for Philly, we are hiring new Philly organizers. clean_body: This is how we defend our democracy. Let’s keep up the momentum. = | Fellow activist, We’ve made some big moves in 2023. Just last month in the special elections, we proved that when we put in the work in our communities – educating, engaging, and empowering them to make their voices heard – it pays off. Now, it is time to make even bigger moves. The New Pennsylvania Project is expanding our operations to Philadelphia to start expanding the electorate in Pennsylvania's most populous city. = Regional Organizing Director, Carrie Fowler, already building relationships in Philadelphia = = Philadelphia is Pennsylvania's biggest and most populous city, but it has long been extremely underrepresented in the electorate. And this problem isn’t disappearing on its own. In 2022, Philadelphia’s vote share dropped to the lowest levels in two decades , especially in immigrant communities and communities of color. The New Pennsylvania Project aims to not only expand the electorate in Philadelphia but also build a strong foundation of community power within neighborhoods that often get left behind. Consistent, year-round voter engagement and civic education are not happening here, but we are about to change the narrative. = = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Happy Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Hi Peter,
Happy Women’s History Month! While I’d argue that acknowledgement of the history of over half the world’s population should be relegated to more than a month, it’s a good time to reflect on the incredible contributions of women in Tennessee.
As I walk the hallways of our state offices, lined with portraits of almost all-male legislatures from the late 19th century, I know that I wouldn’t even have a senate seat if it weren’t for the brave women who came before me like our first female legislator Anna Lee Worley, who was elected in 1921, or Diane Nash, a freedom rider and civil rights icon who fought on the street right outside of our office.
The role that the Tennessee state legislature and the city of Nashville played in the ratification of the nineteenth amendment is one of our country’s most important and under-shared stories. For anyone who’s interested in reading about it I highly recommend The Woman’s Hour [https://www.penguinrandomhouse.com/books/318833/the-womans-hour-by-elaine-weiss/] by Elaine Weiss.
Unfortunately, our rights and freedoms are being taken away from us. This past summer Tennessee became a forced-birth state, denying life-saving healthcare to women- even in cases of rape and incest, even when the woman’s life is in danger. Every Tennessean deserves the right to determine our own destiny, and free and equal access to reproductive healthcare is inextricable from this right.
It’s in troubled times that our greatest work is done, and this is undoubtedly one of those times. We’re a powerful force when we work together to support candidates who will stand up for our rights.
I promise to continue using my voice in the Tennessee State Legislature as a force for change, and I am grateful to have you with me in this fight.
Best,
Heidi Campbell
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

subject: Three numbers we need you to know: 1, 16, and 5.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
1.
That’s the number of seats Democrats need to win in order to flip the GOP's 14-year Wisconsin Supreme Court majority.
16.
That's how many days we have until our first end-of-quarter deadline when we must make budgetary decisions on who we can support — including whether we can help Judge Janet Protasiewicz combat right-wing mega-donor attacks and flip the GOP-led Wisconsin Supreme Court.
$5.
That’s the contribution we are asking you to make to The Long Run today to help us continue to support and elect changemaking candidates across Wisconsin and the country.

body:
With the first FEC quarterly fundraising deadline quickly approaching at the end of the month, we’re counting on grassroots support to fuel our success.

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so _[here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60165802/396239146/838935893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4NDdkYjBjLTdiYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=67kJtG56JhIosSxnapSEiuQgqv3Qz963qFUCOP9qXOQ=&emci=8dac868a-dcc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0847db0c-7bc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22408598#candidate-inner)_ And of course, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/z4lkEUrOvESaGxr1QVEGJw2?unsubscribedata=9dh3XLJBZL2PnbYAEtQbz1llpLK9fke43ov2Ub49x8jUAMA6tRTX0lumsEnIdmHIf8zr%2FSwJs2RFceDMW2mMTFSbEA6ZqGvxAtq9KLk%2BKnhok7SL3CHU3%2BXR%2B%2FO0xIIzPDlkhl6xHFPNmZSjAZFDdFwDna8nbp9nXLIE9rIJ4ptViI5V3KdTQKOAgACMPOfE3o45FzGHW0bMPDpMwc6zqUDqpkqS%2FFxifIE06MHCKfhTdUxzNZuNam1RTw%2BkxP3EHA2cSAri3EkMdWTVPeUMoFfyuAcMq0%2FNhY31%2FCFvuL0HBxMI%2FtrkwwHFCHG4yHfUGLBXamSHF44Wz506%2BbUHxlKJsdzbcUiZNHGQZsHnXnkTRF56ba3V7F9E7KvJrKFTN2JKb1nGJxoiDo95Z5fIhhGlfwPO6qf3leIzZCEWFdA%3D) at any time.

| Peter,

Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and we need your help to reach our goal. With the first FEC quarterly fundraising deadline quickly approaching at the end of the month, we’re counting on grassroots support to fuel our success.

name: JD Vance
subject: I wanted to catch up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Hey, friend, I hope you’re doing well

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0vsohorkveenmr9l6nkhhqcoc17gj6kl9grllro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h68pj6c5h2bs)
---
Hi friend,

I’ve been on the road non-stop since before the election; I feel like I haven’t had a chance to introduce myself properly.

I was born and raised in Ohio, and while I didn’t have the easiest upbringing, it taught me a lot. I’m no stranger to hardship, but I found early on that my love for my country was the driving force in my life. I knew that I had to give back to my country in the best way possible by joining the Marines and serving in Iraq. After this experience, **I no longer took most things in my life for granted because I saw these freedoms taken away firsthand.** I also learned the importance of patriotism, respect, and perseverance.

After serving this great nation, I returned to Ohio and founded a business, where I very quickly learned how countries like China were stealing our jobs and hurting our workers. This career path emphasized what I learned in the military about dedication and hard work. Seriously, owning a business when every Democrat is after you is no joke.

I decided to run for Senate in Ohio because I knew that this was lacking in the US government. Our elected officials have failed to protect us, and I won’t let that happen any longer. I won because you trusted my mission and my character. **I won’t let you down.**

I’m so honored to have your support, friend. Knowing you had my back through one of the craziest adventures of my life was all I needed to make it worth the fight. I’m looking forward to representing the values you and I hold dearly in the U.S. Senate in these upcoming years. I want to protect my fellow Ohioans and Americans, and I hope you have my back on this journey.
| [**STAND WITH ME**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpl38h1ti7k52rjsj4sk5bp9raho9nsdthq8vku8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h68pj6c5h2bs)
---

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

_If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation._ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmmgl9r9fsdt318qht4qte6q1k1atu0cu6a28lho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h68pj6c5h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlfp3oidnfi0mjur2ters9djajd0lvk5nlt0fjc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h68pj6c5h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdtef0bt0qp9irasemrq96ceau073sv6uegigqto_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h68pj6c5h2bs)

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Help protect our state on Rise Above Plastic Pollution Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60166326/396241143/1099629678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNjE1ZTlmLTdjYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k36QLzHqgjiTz4QtGpM4xaWXEyUyqFhnefwk0S_QLaY=&emci=50721bb7-77c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3a615e9f-7cc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Hello Peter, Plastic is everywhere, and today is Rise Above Plastic Pollution Day. **In a couple hours, one of our priority bills in the Zero Waste Bill Package is getting its final vote in the senate!** This bill would modernize our health code to allow for reusables (SB 545).** [On Rise Above Plastic Pollution Day, will you write to your state senator and help protect our state from further plastic pollution?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60166327/396241144/1099629678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNjE1ZTlmLTdjYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k36QLzHqgjiTz4QtGpM4xaWXEyUyqFhnefwk0S_QLaY=&emci=50721bb7-77c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3a615e9f-7cc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** We must reduce the production of single-use plastic and shift to reusable alternatives for the betterment of our environment, communities, public health, and local economies. Oregon’s laws currently do not allow for customers to bring reusable containers for refilling, shopping in bulk, buying produce, or bringing home take-out food. These rules are unnecessarily prohibitive and inconsistently enforced, creating cultural and business confusion about what is allowed. While many obstacles remain in reducing packaging and increasing sustainability, Oregon’s health code should not be a barrier. **Passing the Enabling Reuse Bill would allow customers to bring their own reusable containers and enable businesses to create their own reuse systems by updating the current health codes and rules.** [Ask your state senator to vote yes on the Enabling Reuse Bill (SB 545).](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60166328/396241145/1099629678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNjE1ZTlmLTdjYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k36QLzHqgjiTz4QtGpM4xaWXEyUyqFhnefwk0S_QLaY=&emci=50721bb7-77c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3a615e9f-7cc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Without immediate changes to the way we use plastics, the total amount of plastic waste generated is expected to double in the next five years. **Allowing reusable containers is something we need to do now.** [Please write to your senator today asking them to support the Enabling Reuse Bill (SB 545).](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60166329/396241146/1099629678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNjE1ZTlmLTdjYzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k36QLzHqgjiTz4QtGpM4xaWXEyUyqFhnefwk0S_QLaY=&emci=50721bb7-77c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3a615e9f-7cc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you for taking action,

Julia DeGraw, OLCV Coalition Director | |

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, Plastic is everywhere, and today is Rise Above Plastic Pollution Day. In a couple hours, one of our priority bills in the Zero Waste Bill Package is getting its final vote in the senate! This bill would modernize our health code to allow for reusables (SB 545). We must reduce the production of single-use plastic and shift to reusable alternatives for the betterment of our environment, communities, public health, and local economies. Oregon’s laws currently do not allow for customers to bring reusable containers for refilling, shopping in bulk, buying produce, or bringing home take-out food. These rules are unnecessarily prohibitive and inconsistently enforced, creating cultural and business confusion about what is allowed. While many obstacles remain in reducing packaging and increasing sustainability, Oregon’s health code should not be a barrier. Passing the Enabling Reuse Bill would allow customers to bring their own reusable containers and enable businesses to create their own reuse systems by updating the current health codes and rules. Without immediate changes to the way we use plastics, the total amount of plastic waste generated is expected to double in the next five years. Allowing reusable containers is something we need to do now. Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1Uktv3CAQ_jXemy2Mje0efEiz3aiKorZSEiknNIbBRsGPGhxr8-s7bLY5VCoCJL4XjwHbvKqbhtWNEAfdlhxyow625YwXrMjLXBRMFFnX1Kih5EzoxtSdSUqGI1iXmRUxDHZ6xVXT-pypeTwMLW80CI5VDho6pkv-xSjVlEqA0Kh4eXDtEMLik-Im4Sfq-75nA8Jqpz4Fq1PQb1ZhTCNS0-jQB3lVSFJ4CcawMrqLE6iQFMeb20cWm2AVa2iR8GoLo_TztiokPoxwhUbUdhsJogzrLAS8EgrGBWw_EbV5iZMEJwcA-amTFBKR1MzbpHH1qZ63zqGc3XlcrIrJIE3QMnDJ5H-OtJDF-gFX-f1IW_348D5ELyn81n3gp8fj33PNU8ApXnJSLn2_X95-vQz3755oOTmrifgHHOiJCO3hmx97evC11ctuHW1b1VS9_lK9WCy6sbPm3Cb114Tzi43zS134FopneHp6WM_p7597eieeeR9JfktzOC_4qbyGZJdPEdH6-Ae5-sMg)
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1Uklv3CAU_jX2zRYGYzwHH6aZTtRKUXtIot7QM4uNgpfauJb76_uYTHOoVARIfBvLwzRFJeqaiJrzVDclhcKq1DWUUEZYURacEc7ythZGQ0kJ17UVrU1KYgZwPreLMaF345tZNK6PXE1D2jdWWHbibc1pSwt7UqKFE-WcaiUYnHSR-qYPYV4Tdk7oFfu-73lvYHFjl4HTGehfTpmYhqTG0Zo1yLtComKVYC0po5tdQYWEXc4PzyQ2TipS4yKh1RYGuU7bogzyYYA7NBjttgEhzHDeQTB3QsEwg-tGpLZVmlGClz2A_NBJDIlIZqdt1GZZMz1trTdy8scwOxWTQdqgZaCSyP8caUaLW3uzyC8X3Orbu_cpelGxbu07fn2-_D3XNAYzxkuOymfz7676-uO0nnek5eidRuIfsMcnQrSDz-vQ0TJdGj3vzuO2lcDqdbfqxWLhjb2zR5OITwmlNxult7rQLbBXeHl5Wo7s5_c9e-SvtIskfcA5HLP5UN5D8tuniKi4_AH7RsGo)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1Uktv3CAQ_jX2zRYGY8jBhzSbjXqI2kMeR4RhsFHxozbuyv--w2abQ6UgsMT3gmEMbdUIKYmQnOe2ramunMl9SwllhFV1xRnhrOykAKtrSriVTnQuqwmM2ofSrQBx8NMvWC3uj9LMYz60XDApa05NTRqoGbMcBPCKCs1EdQeQh3aIcdkydp_RM87L5VIOoFc_9YX2ttD2jzeQ0pC0uDrYoropFCo2pZ0jdXKzszYxY6f7hxeSBicNkbjJaLPHUW3zvhpAPo76Bo1g_T4ihBk-eB3hRhg9Ltr3E1L7pmBSOqhBa_WpUxiSkMLN-2Rh3Qo7710ANYdjXLxJyVq5aFWkiqgvrrSgxW8DrOr7CY_68eF9Tl5UbHv3gZ9fTv_uNU8RplTkZELx_u7WQ95Jg-U3agreIvEfOOATIdrrx23saZ2vrV0uPuCxjcDu9dfupWZhxcG7o83Et4zSq43Sa1_oHtmbfn19Xo_i989L8cTfaJ9I-oDfeCzwqbyFlNefIqHi9BcmDcBN)

name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: A University is making me pay up because my name is“Trump”
body:
Trinity University in Texas labeled me an “elevated risk” for their school’s security ... simply because my last name is Trump!

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt8daufls11kheppimvc3gr0644sagvn98i2341g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h64oj0cjh2bs)
---
Friend, **Trinity University in Texas labeled me an “elevated risk” for their school’s security ... _simply because my last name is Trump!_** That’s right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this****outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.** ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z41b005d5mo24omjhgicqv013v9293ccuopg6930_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h64oj0cjh2bs)
---
[Stand with Speech First](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeatdt5lkttd68jb1f6n1cd1s4ia1nf7qml2fmm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h64oj0cjh2bs)
---
Friend, even if I _were_ related to President Trump (I’m no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call – and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the “Woke” student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let “Woke” student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation – and our educational system – ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don’t think so! Friend, let’s add one more win for free speech to Speech First’s Texas Victory Tour. [**Add your name to Speech First’s open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.** ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdspr0su972akv96g7goj38j1713ned06gdhopao_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h64oj0cjh2bs) There’s barely any time left, and I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist Administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise TrumpSpeech First

clean_body: Trinity University in Texas labeled me an “elevated risk” for their school’s security ... simply because my last name is Trump! | | | Friend, Trinity University in Texas labeled me an “elevated risk” for their school’s security ... simply because my last name is Trump! That’s right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. Friend, even if I were related to President Trump (I’m no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call – and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the “Woke” student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let “Woke” student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation – and our educational system – ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead? I don’t think so! Friend, let’s add one more win for free speech to Speech First’s Texas Victory Tour. There’s barely any time left, and I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist Administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support! Cherise TrumpSpeech First 1300 I St NW Suite 400EWashington, DC 20005 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Real Republicans don't do that
body:
All across the country, traditional values, freedom, and patriotic Americansare under assault by Joe Biden and progressive liberals. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/862efc10f071/failed-border-policies-threaten-rural-america-356854?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| Dear Fellow Conservative,

All across the country, traditional values, freedom, and patriotic Americans are under assault by Joe Biden and progressive liberals. People are concerned about the epidemic of violence and lawlessness in our cities, like Memphis. And they are worried the same radical liberal agenda that is destroying those cities will also destroy ours. Make no mistake, the progressive Democrats despise our conservative, pro- freedom way of life that we enjoy in rural America where we call home. It’s why Democrats, with George Soros’ billions, have worked so hard to elect progressive district attorneys, like my opponent who voted for the party of Barrack Obama, Hilary Clinton, and Joe Biden. My opponent even donated to out-of-state liberals who support the radical left- wing agenda of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC. Real Republicans don’t do that. I owe it to the voters of DeSoto County to tell them what I know when someone, who is trying to earn their trust, is also trying to deceive them. You understand the value of a safe community, good schools, and high property values. These qualities are what make our county so attractive. The last thing we want to do is jeopardize this attractiveness by electing a pretend Republican who supports the Democrat platform with votes and donations. We’ve seen what liberal prosecutors can do to cities across America. Their soft-on- crime policies are eroding the bedrock of communities like ours. If we elect a D.A. who shares these priorities, I’m afraid we will be next – and we cannot afford that. As a parent, my aim will be to always keep DeSoto County the best and safest place to raise your family and mine. Visit my website to see my conservative agenda that prioritizes families over criminals, and ensures your Constitutional rights are not violated. The newest battleground for your freedom and Constitutional rights is the District Attorney’s office. Choosing the right D.A. matters, and that’s why I am offering myself as the real tough-on-crime candidate, the real DeSoto County resident, and the real Republican in this race. If we are not careful at the voting booth, we will become South Memphis, but I am prepared to keep that from happening. With your help, we will make sure DeSoto County is the safest and freest county in Mississippi. Thank you in advance for your support of my conservative leadership and efforts to be your next D.A. Liberals would love to have this seat, especially in a red county like ours. I need your help to ensure that doesn’t happen. I know times are hard, but please consider a small donation to make sure our campaign has the resources to keep reaching voters, building momentum, and winning this August. Any amount you send will be used to help keep DeSoto County red and stop Democrats from obtaining a footprint in our county.

---
| [HELP MATTHEW STOP DEMOCRATS](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=b6ca3ef808&e=3c5d31b5ad "HELP MATTHEW STOP DEMOCRATS")
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=af8991c83a&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=60cb549095&e=3c5d31b5ad)_

body:
For weeks after the catastrophic train derailment in Ohio, the Biden administration was radio silent...| | | |
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bfc218a83f5942ccb9d1c7a298b4295c&_e=bsNuYuHRNnTJBhc4aLs3HiW99oyKvtiWRwrUhzUx3lTaT37KluuYs8xB3qk9s7fOFNVJxe9B-RgfhAo7ipFqe7r8TdxNFmrYZSnt5kSZpcq_ttB7QrpRbfDxPMNI2U4vXjElggUC0NyUA9BMI_Whnve6bevnWCs83goSmETYWGqV4xSfO057oDGW8-zfp-qxZWkIjLU6zibQCsTYd0k-mDOh5UVaO1HcikhT_gg1VqXMMW3HleSgwFopdynymzht6Q_Y_f4EZlguqf3Cmc_QBT6_y4_ngk5gWIFDSrgFnr2pIho6MSTxE-gZqEdkFTV4ppw4SYroP8bEbBq2FS1f_5Zn3pT-cspgp1i8BdV1fvBtmX2NEXCoQMF9bPZEIzZm)
---
Peter, the Biden administration was virtually radio silent for weeks after the catastrophic train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio. The situation has turned into a crisis for the residents who are struggling to obtain clean drinking water, but where are the Green New Deal radicals shouting for accountability? **They’re too busy trying to ban your gas stove, push Woke ESG standards on companies and your retirement savings accounts, or outlaw the future sale of gas-powered cars. **
Peter, this disaster exposed that their climate radicalism is more about government control and power than protecting the environment or the well-being of our communities. [**Peter, we need your help to halt this radical agenda. Can we count on your support BEFORE our March 31st deadline?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bfc218a83f5942ccb9d1c7a298b4295c&_e=bsNuYuHRNnTJBhc4aLs3HiW99oyKvtiWRwrUhzUx3lTaT37KluuYs8xB3qk9s7fOFNVJxe9B-RgfhAo7ipFqe7r8TdxNFmrYZSnt5kSZpcq_ttB7QrpRbfDxPMNI2U4vXjElggUC0NyUA9BMI_Whnve6bevnWCs83goSmETYWGqV4xSfO057oDGW8-zfp-qxZWkIjLU6zibQCsTYd0k-mDOh5UVaO1HcikhT_gg1VqXZYWY-LSh1aJgJhUGFxUGu6J7vlVHZKEv927ofkBzuPz47IuzV7IhCINRznjiLbIVOkKfeNe6xgJYJ6CGCj0fg6qscqdMCTBsPqKPutD4cEU1hnUzjhQ03w8WQnEsVanWoidhMuFVDDPlVduysoHoy)

| | Peter, the government’s top-down response to this situation, from Joe Biden and Pete Buttigieg to the EPA’s outright failure, highlights that the government**is terrible at responding and excellent at covering up.** [**Join Heritage Action – Stop Biden’s Woke ESG Agenda that gives government control and makes our communities less safe. Get Your Membership Card Now >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bfc218a83f5942ccb9d1c7a298b4295c&_e=bsNuYuHRNnTJBhc4aLs3HiW99oyKvtiWRwrUhzUx3lTaT37KluuYs8xB3qk9s7fO4R2SVI95SNE8G_t7Ck95dfYnCHau0x3pDLrw5-0PYuJg_g6Ly782it9s6-Ta0nV-au0zvLPpGUBDRPDmK81rLwcl3b93fsD-ojlnuTheHvDqxVfN2O5kDe-vqzF-wBshuTMxfWmWJ_OgjAJY02xDgBooiYElP1hQOoRqb1nxQjbMGCwPAxlPLEFob8iGufzgaoiFAA2Q40tZ-9Ze00q4xKtl-nRvH9PwDfLPAd_4HZoJyTPW4obSY6er1xqA4IZZhbVoGWYChJd9xxloSOmVq6EqIIa8GAh7EaaEG5USCJPb1oczLzbYIvxdHuYLexCH7CS-z22UeqF9mpA42bb65A%3D%3D) ESG hurts our states and it hurts our communities. [**As we documented here**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bfc218a83f5942ccb9d1c7a298b4295c&_e=bsNuYuHRNnTJBhc4aLs3HnQelu2-jMLO5pB2gbaf2KGYyVLB0bzJCSqZy3citYi-yiPCJaU54VbpZV4vJ6bMwcG2wjjJdVMCZNlTx2uw7pcQv2Zua3W65ZMZqP9T-Ee-ayq1gp8eC0voXVVLi7Qu-ntFkKpzMAR9dm51t8PJTEYxXbrjP6tzeq4M7vJyxxrXrFbWHQywBSTCcCgO0qf9kE9miw27jP18_QR7BgydLahdmEc6QZJ6Mk1vBDW7SJKyQCcGIFZb5lCZTpcueCUCalVaO4_iQYfYnUraHof3wE7B0X63v2dreTVqNA8CDmDasI18X454CNLQIzktsp5YwtVbhRf-kt_WCBolkjSEXFuv2SEZ0bsy3q_ebjX9JxOHfWql_5SjMGZvn3te-_9KZA%3D%3D)**, the railroad that spilled deadly chemicals in East Palestine had an ESG report**. But clearly, focusing on rail safety would have served the people of Ohio much better.

Our grassroots activists have been working for months in states across the country to protect taxpayer dollars from funding the ESG agenda. And they sent calls to Congress—by the thousands—to support conservative efforts to overturn Biden’s latest pro-ESG regulation.

ESG stands for “environmental, social, governance,” but it’s a sham agenda that focuses on pushing companies to conform with the Left’s agenda. ESG is:
* Anti-American energy - ESG will make us dependent on Chinese solar and lithium
* Anti-American values - ESG is pro-abortion, and pro-radical gender ideology

Please help us work to pass legislation to end ESG.
