body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132896?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend, **We are having a FLASH SALE for tickets to our luncheon with Betsy Devos, and tickets are selling fast!**

DeVos gained popularity with her push in the school choice movement. Under the Trump Administration, she fought for educational freedom, elimination of unnecessary spending and school reopenings during the COVID-19 pandemic.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b06974ce0a&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_
| DeVos will be promoting her new book “Hostages No More: The Fight for Education Freedom and the Future of the American Child” at the event. The book is a roadmap for the changes we need to put our country back on the right path.

**Right now tickets are only $30, and the link to purchase them can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b9ff49c809&e=5703353baa)!**

I hope to see you there!

---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

name: Andy Kim
subject: Voting is the heart of our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
This Women's History Month, I want to share a bit about Alice Paul, who grew up right here in New Jersey's Third Congressional District.

Born in 1885, Alice became an influential voice in the fight for women's suffrage. Alice organized massive protests, endured jail time, engaged in multiple hunger strikes, and eventually even shifted Woodrow Wilson's opinion. She was instrumental in securing the passage of the Nineteenth Amendment, which guaranteed women nationwide the right to vote in 1920.

Alice's story never ceases to inspire me.

The right to vote is sacred. Voting is a powerful tool for change and the heart of our democracy. It is not something to take lightly.

We must do everything we can to make voting as accessible as possible. That's why I'm proud to introduce legislation, in honor of Alice Paul, that makes hindrance or prevention of voter registration or voter registration aid illegal.

Though voting rights are constitutionally protected, voter suppression continues in many places. Even more troubling, we've recently seen a significant increase in voter suppression tactics nationwide. Whether it's reducing the number of polling locations, purging voter rolls, or creating confusion around registration, we must stop voter suppression.

We must protect every aspect of the voting process.

The fight won't always be easy, but we draw inspiration from Alice Paul and the many others who came before us. Together, we will ensure everyone has unfettered access to the ballot box.

Andy

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: My opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends, making sure you saw this update from my campaign team about our new opponent. I’ll let you read for yourself, but... Wow.
Here’s what I’ve got to say about this development in the race: I know the people of our district- and I believe in each and every one of them. I know that our values of inclusion, fairness, and justice are sincerely held. And I can say without a shadow of a doubt that the extreme ideas and policies pushed by my opponent do NOT reflect our district.
But I won’t take a single thing for granted in this campaign. We’ve seen far too many extremists push their agendas straight into Congress to think that any one of us can rest on our laurels.
I’m always going to fight for my district, and I hope I can count on you to stand with me. Will you donate $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help power my re-election campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230314_em_sjj_opponent]
Thank you.
-Sara

We’ve seen far too many extremists push their agendas straight into Congress to think that any one of us can rest on our laurels. I’m always going to fight for my district, and I hope I can count on you to stand with me. Will you donate $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help power my re-election campaign? [] Thank you. -Sara ------------Forwarded message------------ From : Team Sara Date : Sun, Mar 9, 2023 Subject : NEWS: Sara has an opponent - and you need to hear about him. Breaking news, team: Sara Jacobs officially has an opponent in her upcoming re-election race — and his ideology is far too extreme for our district. Add your name now to say you’ll fight for Sara’s re-election. [] Here are the basics on El Cajon Mayor Bill Wells: In the past few years, he’s denied the realities of climate change, espoused COVID-19 misinformation, and of course, hero-worshipped Donald Trump. Right now, we need your help to send a clear message that this guy’s ideas don’t represent the people of California’s 51st District — and they certainly don’t belong in the United States Congress. Please sign on today if you’re ready to make sure we hold Sara’s seat. [] ADD MY NAME 👉 [] Here’s what else you need to know about Bill Wells: He thinks climate change is a hoax used to control people. He opposes abortion under all circumstances. He wants to ban same-sex marriage. He claims that COVID-19 vaccines don’t work, and government efforts to keep people safe are evil. To say he’s an extremist is frankly an understatement. Look, this fight isn’t just about Sara’s re-election — it's about our collective future. Right now, Democrats hold a narrow Senate majority, and Sara and her colleagues face an uphill battle in the Republican-controlled House. If we’re going to fight climate change in earnest and stand up against the wave of abortion bans, we have to prevent extremists from making their way into the halls of the Capitol. Are you in? [] Thanks for your support. More to come soon on our re-election efforts! -Team Sara CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States [] [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

Friend, **I noticed that you haven't had a chance to sign my rapid-response petition, so I wanted to follow up right away.**
As anti-choice politicians put pressure on companies like Walgreens to stop selling safe and effective medications used for abortions, we need to speak out with everything we've got. **But I still need another 53 signatures from your area on my rapid-response petition, and yours is missing.**
**[Please, friend: Will you add your name now to defend abortion rights from the GOP's attacks? Jacky

From: **Jacky Rosen**
Date: Sat, Mar 11, 2023
Subject: re: Walgreens
| | |

Friend – it's Jacky Rosen. **I just sent a letter to the Walgreens CEO condemning the company's decision to stop selling mifepristone –** **an FDA-approved medication used for abortion and treating miscarriages. Here's why:**
Medication abortion is the most common abortion method in our country. It's safe. It's effective. And it's been widely used for the past 20 years.
And yet, _Walgreens made the decision to not sell mifepristone_ , which will affect access to reproductive care across the country. It's an outrageous decision based entirely on pressure from anti-choice politicians – not science.
**That's why I put together a rapid-response petition to send a loud and clear message that the majority of Americans won't stand for the GOP's draconian attacks on our reproductive freedom. I'm looking for 10,000 people to add their voices with mine before midnight, but your signature is missing, friend.**
**[_Please, will you add your name right now to my rapid-response petition to stand up to the GOP's attacks on abortion access? There is simply too much at stake to stay silent in this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60190230/396295955/-117416970?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2432-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc2NTAzMS1hNGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGErnhmkce2tRNmiv4ZeTPx_DpgQ_Jhv_gEqaVubvrA=&emci=207b9f26-efc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b765031-a4c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)**

Happy Pi Day!
Although I was an English teacher, March 14th was always a math day in my classroom (and a little culinary arts, with pizza and apple pie). Who knew food was all it took to get 7th graders excited about the ratio of a circle’s circumference to its diameter?
I became a teacher to make a difference and ensure the next generation was set up for success. Since then, I have worked to deliver a quality education for all students and now want to multiply that impact (bad math joke) in Congress.
[**Can you join me in celebrating Pi Day by giving $3.14, $31.41, or $314.15 to help us raise $3,141.59 by 3:14 pm today?**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=18812b2865&e=1012843e9c)

name: Mark Warner
subject: What’s on the line in the Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This November, we face a tough battle

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60169409/396254191/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzc0NThjYy04NGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B9z42D0T2ZF9jGYtzX71bpMvT5vqY6Rpb4iAmPKHiiY=&emci=a468fe26-c2c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=077458cc-84c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I’m working tirelessly in Washington, D.C. to build a brighter future for the Commonwealth, but I wanted to take a moment to tell you about a battle that’s coming up right here at home in Virginia. The truth is, the General Assembly election this November matters more than it ever has before. All 40 seats in the State Senate and 100 seats in the House of Delegates are up for grabs – and there’s a lot on the line. Republicans in the House of Delegates refused to remove language from the state constitution that prohibits gay marriage. The VA GOP made it perfectly clear that they’ll ban abortion after _just 15 weeks_ of pregnancy if they take control of both chambers. We’ve witnessed Republicans in Richmond attempt to roll back environmental protections. And the only reason voting rights haven’t been ripped away from Virginians is because Senate Democrats blocked a handful of GOP proposals aimed at weakening voting rights. Folks, we have to win these seats. **_[**Can you chip in to my campaign right now to help me elect strong Democrats to the Virginia General Assembly?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60169410/396254192/783205722?refcode=mw_em_230314_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzc0NThjYy04NGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B9z42D0T2ZF9jGYtzX71bpMvT5vqY6Rpb4iAmPKHiiY=)_** clean_body: This November, we face a tough battle | | | Derek, I’m working tirelessly in Washington, D.C. to build a brighter future for the Commonwealth, but I wanted to take a moment to tell you about a battle that’s coming up right here at home in Virginia. The truth is, the General Assembly election this November matters more than it ever has before. All 40 seats in the State Senate and 100 seats in the House of Delegates are up for grabs – and there’s a lot on the line. Republicans in the House of Delegates refused to remove language from the state constitution that prohibits gay marriage. The VA GOP made it perfectly clear that they’ll ban abortion after just 15 weeks of pregnancy if they take control of both chambers. We’ve witnessed Republicans in Richmond attempt to roll back environmental protections. And the only reason voting rights haven’t been ripped away from Virginians is because Senate Democrats blocked a handful of GOP proposals aimed at weakening voting rights. Folks, we have to win these seats. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = We have to do everything we can to elect the next generation of Democratic leaders to the Virginia General Assembly. We’re facing long odds and a tough battle, but I know this grassroots movement has what it takes to stay in the fight. = Thank you for your support, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Our very first FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We need to stay on track. That’s why I’m setting a goal of raising 1,250 donations by midnight tomorrow — and it’s why I need your help.
#
Peter,
I launched my campaign to replace Josh Hawley on January 6th because we can’t afford to send another fraud or coward to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate.
**As a 13-year Marine veteran, I know what it means to serve my country.** And as a Missourian who watched my own community be stripped for parts by massive corporations and corrupt elites like Hawley, I’m ready to fight back.
Our campaign is on a mission to give power back to everyday, working people — and we’re building it the right way, with no money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma executives. That’s why I need your help today:
**Our very first FEC deadline is just around the corner, so I’m setting a goal of raising 1,250 donations by midnight tomorrow to help us stay on track** — and I’m asking you to chip in $10 right now to make it happen.
**[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you think is best right now to help our campaign stay on track for our first end-of-quarter deadline? If we keep up our momentum early on in this race, we really can defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29049?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29050?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29050?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29050?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29050?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29050?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29050?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29049?refcode=em20230314-2859&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=2859%2E614464%2E7-YPli)

Missourians have spent the last three election cycles taking back their power at the ballot box by rejecting anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws, raising the minimum wage, expanding healthcare, and legalizing weed.
Next year, we’re going to make it four by defeating Josh Hawley and electing a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
Thanks for being part of it,
— Lucas Kunce

Jason is the definition of servant leadership. As an Army Ranger, he served three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. But his work didn’t stop there:
He’s continuing his record of service to deliver for hardworking families — including fighting to invest in our workforce, reform our broken campaign finance system, and defending our democracy.
**Birthdays only come around once a year, so we’re hoping you can help make tomorrow extra special.**

clean_body: | Folks — | Jason is the definition of servant leadership. As an Army Ranger, he served three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. But his work didn’t stop there: He’s continuing his record of service to deliver for hardworking families — including fighting to invest in our workforce, reform our broken campaign finance system, and defending our democracy. Birthdays only come around once a year, so we’re hoping you can help make tomorrow extra special. We’re so excited to share your birthday responses with him tomorrow. Thank you, Team Crow | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: GoFundMe shut down our fundraiser
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652062%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YffsiG5iF2%2bnY%2fzcWh4zmA&sysid=1)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652063%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xUYYwyV7kU8eSCtn7%2bZpxA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652063%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xUYYwyV7kU8eSCtn7%2bZpxA&sysid=1)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It’s been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn’t expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it’s all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor’s office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael’s back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael’s_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652064%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zR7w%2fTaDLko3HdMqvo4r8g&sysid=1)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652075%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HAR8WuLnFgvYJxlSGlqrUw&sysid=1)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652076%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vAgYjDYH6KXAvCYSpcqjIQ&sysid=1)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652077%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rKxpW%2bMUVwIQ0NqjMKcsPA&sysid=1)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Mt%2bjKd2xMYMGg0H9GMvvg&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652079%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gd1dhStjWBNe%2bGX6GG32Ew&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652070%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cn8v3SzUb%2fbtyeb7HNM2Ww&sysid=1)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1850%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=LkgIwIDEQUhbdwFrAbNing&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652071%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=flGCWNbxXvaKothJkcbULQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652072%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=usPBGUe09yursm629BhD8g&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1850%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=LkgIwIDEQUhbdwFrAbNing&sysid=1)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
I don't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dd6c10709c3d48c8a790a44467a3d3ff&_e=4XniSBRtHM8haDIpj9k-vjQ0vYnosUcKgcCd5YSbhY6BUQpCxfAx-vL0zBvsw70Kx8KWT-r4j7Zv1b5titEnFhKxD3B4KdNyuh1auo0-JNBjALsx27N0hSdeE7lRmIOC971EOZX1G__ryftZr5hYm38GM46jSvODlSpUCmQtwp7eN-GbS_Mfb_ysXSCJRT_3PwQPRlkjn1KrS3JUiHXX0vME5cSyNhq_EPao7nWNjEVo-hG4sAifB5Vg8iqGREstitFLnTolDuRj-OHfQOuoYQp-_Iw5r_DkxG9_tonT8vHzXhLxDv235s71ZuSS3O_2C162Vfgd-u4e66RQ4MKtEYfbir1LdMu09CQkYj7Gc7QhpjwtXSVnuCmeCInxyLuxW3HaVKExG-21brfylATO7g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's [**RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dd6c10709c3d48c8a790a44467a3d3ff&_e=4XniSBRtHM8haDIpj9k-vjQ0vYnosUcKgcCd5YSbhY6BUQpCxfAx-vL0zBvsw70Kx8KWT-r4j7Zv1b5titEnFhKxD3B4KdNyuh1auo0-JNBjALsx27N0hSdeE7lRmIOC971EOZX1G__ryftZr5hYm38GM46jSvODlSpUCmQtwp7eN-GbS_Mfb_ysXSCJRT_3PwQPRlkjn1KrS3JUiHXX0vME5cSyNhq_EPao7nWNjEVo-hG4sAifB5Vg8iqGREst8sZcy1LP_xulvmvQSjTUtCEAAmi_jZdH-O3kyRnTrZljxQH2oMWYkycNCu0YaxfYGA04lo6h_yEF2AmjwGCYDs4RhXpGDHwWt0BjXL4HI7oeAZKfcsiiliLV5wC20MNI1FvMjskTBwxXq2WQ8wvK3g%3D%3D) My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times'_ "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." **" Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written."** Outrageous! _The New York Times '_ stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times '_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dd6c10709c3d48c8a790a44467a3d3ff&_e=4XniSBRtHM8haDIpj9k-vjQ0vYnosUcKgcCd5YSbhY6BUQpCxfAx-vL0zBvsw70Kx8KWT-r4j7Zv1b5titEnFhKxD3B4KdNyuh1auo0-JNBjALsx27N0hSdeE7lRmIOC971EOZX1G__ryftZr5hYm38GM46jSvODlSpUCmQtwp7eN-GbS_Mfb_ysXSCJRT_3PwQPRlkjn1KrS3JUiHXX0vME5cSyNhq_EPao7nWNjEVo-hG4sAifB5Vg8iqGREstXiLvf2Gg_zdTCDxkWBQ8fLERiWRhmlrdW92o0_r_gsdYOFsCsJh_PbWoWM6A_HDvJmoITL2TSZb1rdlAk_5B2P3cY7T0vvX-TF4eME2Sl-XzSi3Hl4A5CxcBnP0-RL04b71vJbgInjNpLQEchHcH2w%3D%3D)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That's so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College 's educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation's youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dd6c10709c3d48c8a790a44467a3d3ff&_e=4XniSBRtHM8haDIpj9k-vjQ0vYnosUcKgcCd5YSbhY6BUQpCxfAx-vL0zBvsw70Kx8KWT-r4j7Zv1b5titEnFhKxD3B4KdNyuh1auo0-JNBjALsx27N0hSdeE7lRmIOC971EOZX1G__ryftZr5hYm38GM46jSvODlSpUCmQtwp7eN-GbS_Mfb_ysXSCJRT_3PwQPRlkjn1KrS3JUiHXX0vME5cSyNhq_EPao7nWNjEVo-hG4sAifB5Vg8iqGREst_1uasUgaKgz-FxI3-2GpYaFyTc8mKiV1fY6PRyOCNOaTELxaDo2lmyX3VcnbFy-QHgkVSEJT65iPPM381vkQ8HnnLv1Enzp9TaWCE_XNd2uXGVoiJgeayUZEH9h2fJWwCGJmadHLyxA9Psb2G9wOGQ%3D%3D)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they 're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I'm counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America 's Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America's history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project." This free course is called **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America's past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America's most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the "fake news" _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common History?" set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our American classical K-12 curriculum, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale 's American classical K-12 curriculum has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with over 14,500 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We've now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dd6c10709c3d48c8a790a44467a3d3ff&_e=4XniSBRtHM8haDIpj9k-vjQ0vYnosUcKgcCd5YSbhY6BUQpCxfAx-vL0zBvsw70Kx8KWT-r4j7Zv1b5titEnFhKxD3B4KdNyuh1auo0-JNBjALsx27N0hSdeE7lRmIOC971EOZX1G__ryftZr5hYm38GM46jSvODlSpUCmQtwp7eN-GbS_Mfb_ysXSCJRT_3PwQPRlkjn1KrS3JUiHXX0vME5cSyNhq_EPao7nWNjEVo-hG4sAifB5Vg8iqGREstARGMfnFCw2RjSgawxsRjZ2vsc11U1TUnPvLA7Y0tkjgCoj8e6dDPj-QYgG_-K9m5XCrO6annM3W8wNg_DNJudir5CJoW73IVM0eOegt4OnMVA-Y-ClwqJNg-EVYiBx-JcPiXfKmWUcdqlLphMbb7ag%3D%3D)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left's agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. clean_body: I don't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times' "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." " Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written." Outrageous! The New York Times ' stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times ' efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline for you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That's so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College 's educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation's youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they 're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I'm counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America 's Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America's history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times ' "1619 Project." This free course is called " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" and presents an unbiased and complete account of America's past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America's most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the "fake news" New York Times. Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common History?" set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our American classical K-12 curriculum, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale 's American classical K-12 curriculum has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with over 14,500 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. ### **There is no way to avoid this moment**
---
| Dr. Naomi Wolf, author and lifelong liberal, has penned a major apology to conservatives who refused to swallow the Democrat-left narratives surrounding the Jan. 6 Capitol false flag in 2021. We all know that a riot of some kind took place at the Capitol that day. We all know that then-President Donald Trump gave a speech near the building. But what we have also long known is that the deep state fomented the riot by using undercover operatives that witnesses actually saw that day. And now, after Fox News host Tucker Carlson has aired actually never-before-seen footage from that day — footage that has revealed the Democratic left’s lies — Wolf believes she owes conservatives who never bought into them a big mea culpa. “There is no way to avoid this moment. The formal letter of apology. From me. To Conservatives and to those who ‘put America first’ everywhere,” she began on her Substack page.[https://naomiwolf.substack.com/p/dear-conservatives-i-am-sorry](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/bCxNhl0g9KSbcK7MRhiImh3tpJy7CXkdeTk2D3StCfLxgpDaIrZEaiu60RZ74lSfKJiONpmnO6GQFUmqsQko3oZI1h6neoz3oiOjqxqg0L9kngL19QCxWSgdYBa21wAola37y17_aUySCnDhiIQGExleA7kFUSdusw_xsYkRgSI7wrWkzwIIkhAei-n7xc9BrwqMXSiJrZqmtzN5-ioTLNw2xt2i2BpiDWZGZ44u-z7ewouq4GK4Sv6TqJEUSg) “It’s tempting to sweep this confrontation with my own gullibility under the rug — to ‘move on’ without ever acknowledging that I was duped, and that as a result I made mistakes in judgement, and that these mistakes, multiplied by the tens of thousands and millions on the part of people just like me, hurt millions of other people like you all, in existential ways,” she continued. “But that erasure of personal and public history would be wrong. I owe you a full-throated apology.” In a letter of apology, she admits to having believed lies and causing damage to the reputations of conservatives based on false claims.“While ‘fact-checkers’ state that it is ‘misinformation’ to claim that Congresswoman Nancy Pelosi was in charge of Capitol Police on that day,” she wrote, “the fact is that the USCP is under the oversight of Congress, according to — the United States Capitol Police.” Wolf noted:_This would be the same Congress that convened the January 6 Committee subsequently, and that used millions of dollars in taxpayer money to turn that horrible day, and that tragic event, into a message point that would be used to tar a former President as a would-be terrorist, and to smear all Republicans, by association, as “insurrectionists,” or as insurrectionists’ sympathizers and fellow-travelers._ “There is no way to unsee Officer Brian Sicknick, claimed by some Democrats in leadership and by most of the legacy media to have been killed by rioters at the Capitol that day, alive in at least one section of the newly released video. The USCP medical examiner states that this Officer died of ‘natural causes,’ but also that he died ‘in the line of duty,'” Wolf continued. “Whatever the truth of this confusing conclusion, and with all respect for and condolences to Officer Sicknick’s family, the circumstances of his death do matter to the public, as without his death having been caused by the events of Jan 6, the breach of the capitol, serious though it was, cannot be described as a ‘deadly insurrection.'” Sicknick was not killed that day, and he did not die at the hands of ‘rioters.’ He died of two strokes he suffered at the base of his skull the next day. The only person killed at the Capitol that day was a young Air Force veteran, Ashli Babbitt, who was unarmed. She was shot to death. Even lifelong Democrats cannot deny that Senator Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) did not claim that the footage aired by Carlson was fake, but instead criticized Fox News for allowing it to be broadcast. The Guardian‘s characterization of Carlson and Fox News as guilty of “over-use” of the Jan 6 footage is strange, she noted, adding: “Isn’t the press supposed to want full transparency for all public interest events?” [https://www.naturalnews.com/2023-03-13-naomi-wolf-apologizes-to-conservatives-j6-propaganda.html](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/5ymkiRYfyFymBiG620MYr3sh0TQuJrFf8rXiM64eppAad5bl6rlDeaJgIch4fXSUiJfBV5svN7s0lyp2fri9LXCSOJm4xT7W7JPZGEFGgmK0FYybCKJEcmj1mQYxWGes6L2xsqZf_hxTR7CytC7f8MLHSuZxK-8VNDNDAHq__6TihHJjHt1CycYotc-hFudTTJcOLOQIlF-eCOGRgS0Z8c8VqjrnuoEY2n_pDM54FIKIyocH4a3Q0oXEgeAM1kf8_0ckeyEPlh2HgzhXTTcLNG159GZL-GqhNN5sIp3J)

subject: ⏰ Time is running out to renew your membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Reserve your spot as an official 2023 DNC membership cardholder to help us strengthen our party and elect more Democrats nationwide. | |
---
Hi, Derek As we gear up for elections in 2023 and beyond, we’re asking our top supporters (that’s you!) to chip in $10 to become Official 2023 Membership cardholders. Every dollar raised will be put to work immediately to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide _and_ hold Republicans accountable as they try to undo the progress we’ve made together. We only have a limited number of Official 2023 DNC Membership Cards left -- and we expect them to go quickly. So this could be your last opportunity to reserve your card. Act fast and renew your membership with a $10 donation today.

subject: How can we expect kids to pay attention in class, learn, and succeed if they’re hungry? We can’t.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
So Governor Josh Shapiro just proposed something huge:

Derek, Governor Josh Shapiro just proposed something huge:

**Universal free lunch for every student in Pennsylvania’s public schools.**

In a Commonwealth as well-resourced as ours, no kid should go hungry. But the reality is: they are. And we must change that now.

**If you believe no child should go hungry, sign your name to support Josh Shapiro’s universal school breakfast plan →** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60191093/396299099/-662387369?utm_campaign=email_031423_school-breakfast&source=email_031423_school-breakfast&refcode=email_031423_school-breakfast&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODE0N2Y4Ny1hOGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i4KuGuF4wL8JdqU9EZI0gepZJn23Bxfkk0s4M4NkwHU=&emci=2bd883dc-89c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f8147f87-a8c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)

How can we expect kids to pay attention in class, learn, and succeed if they haven’t eaten all day?

_We can’t._

That's why Josh Shapiro wants to provide free breakfast to every child in our public schools. His plan will provide universal free breakfast for 1.7 million Pennsylvania kids — and will cover the full cost of lunch for 22,000 Pennsylvania kids who are currently eligible for reduced-price lunches.

**Every kid should have access to a healthy and nutritious meal. If you agree, sign your name to support Josh Shapiro’s groundbreaking universal breakfast plan for Pennsylvania:**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My blood is boiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztaokb255fnh59cpeg57l4q3ktplgpn08sk95kco_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjt8k3n8m65t0c2dbmmqf7q1ggst8sbdutburgp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7prjlfo32ua9dh0dq2qdomanv1k3l0p6eage2pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zifpblcvt96kn1sdsa1oqh09fattkf7ot51ov9n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh5g4tjqddlk0p2f2nj2r56vfsbeebm05p9sm1m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zad7f8e9rfvq7kugo9djij13m4g49snav1j2baq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)**

[** WATCH NOW -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1vesdn6lffvpfja47l3e1jjqfcgvekul939h33g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdilflnbhm30gl64gl54meoqrnm01cg5qrsl1rm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)

---

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq44hdpcdisfa2tuhhc4di2497i086psdvdofp4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs) | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z03gj639e5l6fmlauhlfdujql6m02nncqadluaj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs) | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zspjerc2c8uf65o08be9c057nrfu8m5lo7fja3jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h66pb0clh2bs)

clean_body: This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government. | Fellow American, Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild. It makes my blood boil. The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets. This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility. | It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people. Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me. Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| Peter, Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) has been all over the news for collapsing last Friday. SVB was one of the 20 biggest US commercial banks, and it experienced the second biggest bank failure in US history, since Washington Mutual in 2008. But that's not all... On Sunday, just two days after Silicon Valley Bank was seized by the FDIC, state regulators closed New York-based Signature Bank, which ended up being the third largest failure in US banking history. Remember, the FDIC only insures up to $250K per depositors, so when banks fail there is a chance that money could be permanently lost. **Consider this a wake up call to protect your money from bank collapses.** **Last week, I told you that my friend and Financial Expert, Rob Gill, is hosting a LIVE Special Meeting on how to protect your assets from taxes and beyond. body:
We need to hear from you!

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=729d4eb5438c45ccb17d5cd1865815ab&_e=ms_xmKCQBrWJB71584i3Isif8RB41yvf3OCtcNNxbbugEBFDN9VhJIRK_auG855GPeGDx5zvmY7n3bie3QOP2_T9TG6qLiGwPYDJpeGc4UpbGaXctwAOWW3qK0Dmv745fM4gHQI-nL_8VJanTlegVGnMQ2bj6rDrlzgy8nWrcPxr3ATuRbcPADsA3CHDl2U5kWZenF3kh0DLQiDrGw24XK_cAojjCBpmOyhI_orH1_oaArByx09QMcTSTcFn8RrWnb8Q3U_Glk58WFWtmoFTm_lShQ02E6vwyv-k8yRdfF1i8Dl5r5HolHVBg7MuXWxxtc9E0pcx0E46s3IfhWUF03z4-BA24zFgN67xsa1h7oHdXsmHACEeBBdkkX2BzF820tqLIipO8CSnN7Frdj2M0MyoBNlaFl0VIhQ8ko_xwgaJOjOl0jhMjELJtV42U9rK)

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**

2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Adam=20Laxalt?=
subject: Save the Date - 8th Annual Basque Fry
body:
Mark your calendar now for the 8th Annual Basque Fry on June 17 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/adamlaxalt.com/radical_left-457990?e=b87806bd09)
---
| | [ ](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=bb9554eb5c&e=b87806bd09)
---
| Dear Peter, Mark your calendar, work up your appetite, and get ready for the single largest annual political rally in all of Nevada ... The 8th Annual Basque Fry is coming ... and we hope we’ll see you there!

That’s right — our Morning in Nevada PAC team will once again be at Corley Ranch in beautiful Gardnerville, Nevada, for this one-of-a-kind, can’t-miss event that Silver State conservatives have come to love.

The 8th Annual Basque Fry will be held on Saturday, June 17, from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. PT, and we want to make sure YOU have the opportunity to join us. [Just click here to be among the very first to get your tickets and reserve your spot.](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=5e3e66c3ea&e=b87806bd09)

What makes the Basque Fry so special? Lots of things, actually. Whether it’s the delicious Basque meal, the live family-friendly entertainment, the opportunity to meet with local elected officials, or our always-spectacular lineup of superstar conservative speakers from across the country, the Basque Fry has something to offer for everyone. It’s no wonder the event is attended by thousands of great patriots every year!

And the good news doesn’t end there: If you reserve your spot now, you can get your general-admission ticket for our early-bird price of just $50.

[Just click here to see our ticket options, including general-admission, VIP tickets, and more, and reserve your spot at Corley Ranch!](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=a46ed88a4d&e=b87806bd09)

The annual Basque Fry was started in 2015 by then-Nevada Attorney General Adam Paul Laxalt as a celebration of both conservative principles and the state’s rich Basque heritage. Perhaps the most famous descendant of Basque sheepherders in Nevada history was also among our most respected political figures: Adam’s grandfather, former Governor and U.S. Senator Paul Laxalt, who regularly hosted Basque lamb fry events throughout Nevada and in Washington, D.C.

We hope you’ll join us on June 17 as we continue this great Nevada tradition!

We’ll have a lot more exciting details on this year’s Basque Fry to announce in the coming days and weeks, including the many outstanding speakers who will be joining us. So be sure to keep an eye on your inbox!

In the meantime, don’t miss this opportunity to [get your tickets right now](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=451c79f0fe&e=b87806bd09). They always go fast, and we don’t want you to miss out on all of this year’s action.

Thank you, and we’ll see you at Corley Ranch!

Sincerely,

Adam P. Laxalt
Former Nevada Attorney General
President, Morning in Nevada PAC
---
| **Follow us:
[](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=d670021488&e=b87806bd09)[](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=7ea9834727&e=b87806bd09)**
---
|
---
| |
---

---
