name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My blood is boiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z18rbau8i50ujdie1nhjf8nsp8fbgatc440cq280_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhfs4gqdd32dsdvmf5tg2h8b5bhdd5e0mbh1sng8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkuic8ra40dl4g356tghsn9i670f3rpnko09cnk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsi162eo3nd5iqdh1v9ngb3re0hl53n5v66dae2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8h2luls7sftfuuda5o5gecb0rlt2dt6qfkkr8fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr93akgld2qcir7f9ct3udki96anvhh5vpe8c87g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)**

[** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5h6a0mjcjjnb7fs57t4odf8e9fhum57c2q8pkdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zms168vhjhg09ji8iftevtlakpv2uugs1jf54vp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7vuq0hq3iip60nseq45bnrjn44a24961ej7k4eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z684ake7rkt7vqbdnjlpe216go00fiepjjuhi97o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg579ke3ctjviber17qkht2pnjs9ulhkaitotfq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3h6eor4cph2bs)
---|---|---

Deroy Murdock

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: The First Amendment is UNDER ATTACK
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432548:61j8LMGMN:m:1:3331421248:9DB05B1181619792594AE0369605B356:r)
---
Peter, Democrats seem to DESPISE the First Amendment, arguing that we don't have a right to free speech and that the GOVERNMENT should be able to decide what we can say and when.
Make no mistake about it, they prefer censorship. They want the power to control what American citizens like you can say and what you can hear.
**They have ignored the fact that we have First Amendment rights in this country.**
My team is conducting a flash poll and we need your response ASAP - [**do you believe our First Amendment rights should ALWAYS be protected?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432548:61j8LMGMN:m:1:3331421248:9DB05B1181619792594AE0369605B356:r)
I'll say it again: The Democrats don't like the First Amendment. But if true patriots like you stand with us, we will continue to defend our right to say things that the liberal left and globalists don't like.
[**Will you stand with us?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432548:61j8LMGMN:m:1:3331421248:9DB05B1181619792594AE0369605B356:r)
We need an overwhelming response from true conservatives like you by 11:59 PM tonight so that we can show not only Democrats but the entire country that we will ALWAYS stand up to defend our Constitutional rights.
| [ **PROTECT THE FIRST AMENDMENT!** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432548:61j8LMGMN:m:1:3331421248:9DB05B1181619792594AE0369605B356:r)
---
Now is the time for conservatives to unite and fight back against THE DEMOCRATS' attack on our fundamental rights.

I hope to see your name on the list when we review it tomorrow.

[**Be sure to add it right now.

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62432548:61j8LMGMN:m:1:3331421248:9DB05B1181619792594AE0369605B356:r) Thank you, Harriet Hageman

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Crony Capitalism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01550%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mo69RECv9RnWgPDsNPdvxA&sysid=1)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01551%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aiRX%2b7JIAukykMwNcmrQew&sysid=1)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01552%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ayo4T24j4nGB7D%2fI3n1oaA&sysid=1)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K1%2feMIi39wNIXZghxqpMGQ&sysid=1)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01550%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mo69RECv9RnWgPDsNPdvxA&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01554%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zRxPzEaM9cp6yJp7tbJ0Pg&sysid=1)**

[** WATCH NOW → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01565%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HHZ5OFEW4ZzeAiB4XoUsIg&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01566%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GGsNzeotLRaG%2fjifDTMocw&sysid=1)

---

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01567%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3lqLM2Jb%2fJgDUEmA47xPMw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01568%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F69oORkqo51Dfi8tYfMrig&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01569%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3iT5DfyesKFldcI3Uket2Q&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01560%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5lEi7SdQPBg243D6V8j6mw&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01561%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3PGYK%2f9HjEFRfBoMjBiXjA&sysid=1)_

Donald J. Trump March 13th, 2023
Today, President Donald J. Trump announced his Eastern Iowa Leadership Team, demonstrating support from the most conservative and influential Republican leaders in a key region of the Hawkeye State. Since President Trump’s historic 2016 election, Iowa has fundamentally transformed from a swing state to a reliable MAGA stronghold. President Trump’s America First Policies continue to resonate with the men and women of Eastern Iowa and will propel him to an overwhelming victory in the First-in-the-Nation Caucuses.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: WATCH: Rachel Maddow CALLED OUT Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
Sinema voted to weaken regulation on big banks before the SVB collapse. | |

Peter – This past weekend the Silicon Valley Bank collapsed, sending investors’ into a panic and leaving everyone else to wonder: aren’t there any protections in place to avoid a catastrophe like this? name: Gabby Giffords
subject: President Biden is announcing gun safety executive actions TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today is a monumental day for our movement
#

Friends -
Today is a monumental day for our movement. President Biden announced historic executive actions to expand background checks and better implement extreme risk protection orders (aka red flag laws), and safe storage.
Along with many survivors, volunteers, and advocates, Giffords has long been a champion of these policies. We’re grateful to see that President Biden understands that these commonsense gun safety solutions will save lives.
President Biden ran on the strongest gun safety ticket in American history. He is the first modern president to consistently and comprehensively take on the gun lobby. Last summer, he also signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act into law, which was the most significant gun safety legislation to be enacted in nearly 30 years.
All of us at Giffords are proud to stand with President Biden today, and I hope you are too. Because without your support of our organization, this would have never been possible.
That’s why I’m humbly asking you today:
[**In honor of this historic moment, will you contribute $3 to Giffords PAC? This important executive action is a huge leap forward, but we still have so much more to do to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=1&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-mar23.bWo1sU&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=20&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-mar23.rDG5iQ&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=21&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-mar23.Va9Ph9&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=22&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-mar23.wWLaGB&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=23&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-mar23.nODn2F&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=24&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-mar23.x28Ypi&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=25&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)**
---
****
I know many days the fight to end gun violence isn’t easy. But we must remember: the fights worth having rarely are. It’s days like today where we can directly see that our work—our years and years of advocacy and research—is making an impact.
Today, I encourage you to join me in feeling hopeful. We **_can**_ create a better future for our nation. Thank you for being with me in this fight.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230314-1-15&t=26&akid=4406%2E3935704%2EuybUoh)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cda05918bce403ab36bfb8ee587b09a&_e=9Y7zX_sQauFtEau0VFcrcmmyLVphEUEv1wkITmNuGBwa3vUpg6anFdBf9A_WK6wax3HSD11ay52RWUcNFGP4flh7_k0NlMbRVB7oktUIQLBBBAtYKIXbObyI3ZaMdbG1Gc95zCWb1ntfTBfkw3z17bb4fslsCMc_7rqo5LFYMF6g6CJiNAFyC3ZzbBNim-2fu4cKCIQQD_zwotTUqM-q4YXWYiVKNDpK8P4ktdsW_XZRyHXfMN9cOwEliPCWiDvP0_K76K9IHfn0rRFltlQyU5ZbVvV1Fs2hBhy4OGos77PTplWOfTTSdklat7S98jS5aw04eKv2zvW18i7eFRbfMHdxseGkSUvcxqOKtd53tUQ%3D) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cda05918bce403ab36bfb8ee587b09a&_e=9Y7zX_sQauFtEau0VFcrcmmyLVphEUEv1wkITmNuGBwa3vUpg6anFdBf9A_WK6wax3HSD11ay52RWUcNFGP4flh7_k0NlMbRVB7oktUIQLBBBAtYKIXbObyI3ZaMdbG1Gc95zCWb1ntfTBfkw3z17bb4fslsCMc_7rqo5LFYMF6g6CJiNAFyC3ZzbBNim-2fu4cKCIQQD_zwotTUqM-q4YAFnjfCCWve16wVfIAQoKcnFfDFNDqq6xNCH8YVnWXBMw3EMTyVI9iBKfiZUeQ_L_XshdMpJo3icsb9CMGEkd48bIQOtGUraBi8juLYE67wi7yugXW-1okHcsUjCWAc5qfYbm-bXIBqb-bCMsWG83o%3D "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/") Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cda05918bce403ab36bfb8ee587b09a&_e=9Y7zX_sQauFtEau0VFcrcmmyLVphEUEv1wkITmNuGBwa3vUpg6anFdBf9A_WK6wax3HSD11ay52RWUcNFGP4flh7_k0NlMbRVB7oktUIQLBBBAtYKIXbObyI3ZaMdbG1Gc95zCWb1ntfTBfkw3z17bb4fslsCMc_7rqo5LFYMF6g6CJiNAFyC3ZzbBNim-2fu4cKCIQQD_zwotTUqM-q4SCFF_glNePY1Hi_-y3L7OGKEk8CDPqO3T4TdUdRSimUVkLqCMx_kw9x8nvcn3FmdstHvmqMXeAd_iBzuct6CF1RhesxWvWI_T1TrsGVbBchfWzjMfo-g0ITckqY0sqsw_CJJtVt6KFBVoNGwOq4ZCA%3D) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cda05918bce403ab36bfb8ee587b09a&_e=9Y7zX_sQauFtEau0VFcrcmmyLVphEUEv1wkITmNuGBwa3vUpg6anFdBf9A_WK6wax3HSD11ay52RWUcNFGP4flh7_k0NlMbRVB7oktUIQLBBBAtYKIXbObyI3ZaMdbG1Gc95zCWb1ntfTBfkw3z17bb4fslsCMc_7rqo5LFYMF6g6CJiNAFyC3ZzbBNim-2fu4cKCIQQD_zwotTUqM-q4ZD3E7NWzn34LZpHvePjTptVAS71m2YFy3JM7ocmpHVgPqott8XGItu1k2TqgdrYAly5m66aEasbWsWNF3n1sjBY9ZJn46-Ij9LwZA1UcOegGpxtEX08Ai3nWQ0q-SYSKuzBiWhRBlcdsRdfRzfJN38%3D)

body:
Hey there, folks — Michael Bennet here! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60173462/396267789/-1338045988?refcode=X_031423_Hirono_Split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzQ4ZjFkNi04ZGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LrHvq6uA42BG6-3TuNj-w46xw9-YaucU77PPporckY8=) Hey there, folks — Michael here. **Senator Mazie Hirono and I agree: No one should be investigated for receiving reproductive healthcare.** That’s why we introduced the Secure Access for Essential Reproductive (SAFER) Health Act to protect the privacy of those seeking abortion services by prohibiting health care providers from disclosing any personal information without the patient's consent. Passing the SAFER Health Act is one step in the right direction, and we will work together to pressure Congress to pass this critical bill.** ** Team, Mazie just launched her official re-election campaign for 2024. And with 23 Senate seats to defend in 2024, supporting Mazie’s race now will ensure our Democratic Majority’s ability to deliver progress on reproductive rights for years to come. name: Adam Schiff
subject: It makes all the difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| It’s no secret that running for office is really expensive — especially in California. Whether it’s traveling the state, grassroots organizing, or running ads in multiple expensive media markets, the costs add up real quickly.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1939%2E5257348%2EXrfg2Y)
Hi Derek,
I know we’ve asked you recently **[to pitch in a monthly recurring contribution, and I want to take a moment to explain why it’s so, so important to our campaign’s long-term success.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2023_abs_em_recurring.aHVfwh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230314_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1939%2E5257348%2EXrfg2Y)
It’s no secret that running for office is really expensive — _especially_ in California. Whether it’s traveling the state, grassroots organizing, or running ads in multiple expensive media markets, the costs add up _real quickly._
When my finance team and I put our heads together to figure out what we can afford to do to run the best possible campaign, we need to know how much money we can count on coming in the door every month — _and that’s where your monthly contribution is so important._
Knowing that we can count on you chipping in $5, $10, or $20 a month means we can use our resources strategically. It means we can add an extra stop at a college campus to meet young voters. Or when we decide to run an ad campaign online, we can keep it going an extra few weeks. And when Tucker Carlson or Sean Hannity go after me on Fox News, it means we have the funds to respond quickly.
**With your monthly recurring gift, we can budget for all these expenses and don’t have to risk cutting corners in our campaign.**
**[Derek, I’m hoping you can start a monthly recurring gift today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2023_abs_em_recurring.aHVfwh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230314_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1939%2E5257348%2EXrfg2Y)

Adam

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: A wake up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78290%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rGI3U2lFeD3QoQsIsFWn9Q&sysid=1)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78291%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HpMbKAP6zEH4CfiaQxvjTw&sysid=1)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78292%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l5aOo%2fmvWM7RwEWZWqdjcg&sysid=1)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78293%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2My5jZr21DOd6FT4ll%2bZFw&sysid=1)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78290%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rGI3U2lFeD3QoQsIsFWn9Q&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78294%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fvJGa80T30CEgXHm%2fCWznQ&sysid=1)**

[** WATCH NOW → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78205%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5dhLG5juLak8OgWckMElRQ&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78206%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k%2fh86ABo4D26Aj3np%2fUhFg&sysid=1)

---

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78207%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WG1PzPFNBfpKdt3300or8A&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78208%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CT56InockaWm1v1DiNqQRg&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78209%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vsfi4hfO3h1PP%2fzBvmkJcg&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8bm1eqr8JWDijboU7bW-mSTwN1Z4f7bOccb5HEUFYwmoLJxT2ul0kMb6qT_n1yUbuv5diBBVsdbTH0CaEDfvLl5XipdnDaeWAEKFQBxHqIsNR9A-DHnqeoytJmdvK9xLDhTYKcD4VNHE-Nh69breaqiGabkvs9l8OBmP3iwLW2i0VDrzmTd1XYrVXJqFSHTrCnPK59bkXpDDgEcwH1auMyIcLPof3TXeIg28U-RxPMVMpzTuAnxuQhNg-MUDKl9u72Qmd11013Zg-W_S4W9RgDdgQqmYptPqJjGIdvsQLJMwN99_bV2LlFr4RegA1Rfnmya90MivRJiEpa_TpRo8SFQ/3uh/zsR39nQhT16HQrMhKpZZAw/h0/OSRgPZ3tf9H5vOQGVGAbNoDb1-TqMLQ9CMg8mORU0VA)
| | _PETER: DID YOU SEE THIS???_

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwItfuzkl4DHjWKC_SNIHuLeuhKPtnGLdVj7atQQtWzl2TGmHCt8pASmu-K_uoTkDudmi-yFIwzJ9dcvKC8rH7uF5yExqG-t4gLG96nGxsB6lllKXNkXYXinQVQl3ZKM2j-8KCXVvSg5GsgvB62DVFJfHDZLLqYakZARimUfyKZbseApzKU_a3SseG81z0yEjj0eZzgG3gPrL_BgquzJazZ3iCV-t563Nf307C6wmDajeJmwMDmNHnAaUP6Xje0Sq_ZSSr-UBZQV6obArZmadgTMTkeH8w7gvCvSNVRk0V_HN9gTNJcfxEK95mUPAzrZV6pqf1YxVfSgSimBk4yAxt-EzX4IRSmMRGAh2xHD63meRkMD-lDp4WhbDFxhF-ZXsJvOLVfqlJqzqkhqFtuI1MVx1YlUZv5tS1wbZfYBh7cdh0/3uh/zsR39nQhT16HQrMhKpZZAw/h1/CE6Qf92PBXpZQgdg8mk137TO8btk5gfWef7MyaBmhd4)

It’s time to face the music: In 2022, we didn’t work hard enough to protect the House from MAGA Republicans, and it showed.

We CAN’T make the same mistakes in 2024 — especially with not one, not two, but _FOUR_ of our progressive Black champions on the NRCC’s top target list for this cycle, including Don Davis, Emilia Sykes, Jahana Hayes, and Steven Horsford.

| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Equal pay for equal work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60173609/396268487/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTc5MmZkMC04ZWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kZHuYgWfaHQqIdVUn1DiU9MBQPtYnBWi1u4W-3qT6-4=&emci=9a85f59e-70bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1e792fd0-8ec2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)
---

| | On this Equal Pay Day we recognize the work that is left to do and we celebrate the gains we have made. Equal Pay Day — on March 14 this year — represents the number of days that women need to work into the new year to match the wages earned by men in the previous year. **A bit of good news: Today is the earliest Equal Pay Day since we began observing it in 1996, one day earlier than it was last year**. But it's not good enough: On average, women only make **84¢ for every dollar made by men.** The disparity of income is even more pronounced for women of color, Native and Indigenous women, and mothers: For Black women, Equal Pay Day lands on July 27 this year. Four months from now. For moms, Equal Pay Day is on August 15. Five months from today. For Latinas, Equal Pay Day will be on October 5. Seven months from now. For Native and Indigenous women, Equal Pay Day will be on November 30. To put this in perspective; Native and Indigenous women have to work for almost two years to earn what the average man earns. None of this is OK. Everyone deserves to be compensated fairly for the work they do and **we must all work to overcome and end the barriers, systems, and prejudice that lead to these inequalities.** We are making progress. I am writing to you today and not tomorrow. We are one day closer to pay equity. But we have so much more to do. I will continue to work to close the gender pay gap and I know you will join me in this movement. Onward! **_Jeff_** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | name: Trump Indictment? (via Left Action)
subject: Sign the petition: Tell NY you support indicting Trump! >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Tell NY officials It’s time to indict Trump! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a219de9-3b38-4147-a462-63adb746a788/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T529641b3-e8a2-40f6-a3e8-78f7c312c720/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Prosecutors in the Manhattan district attorney’s criminal investigation into Donald Trump may be nearing the end of their investigation and moving towards an indictment – finally! There are multiple signs that an indictment is imminent! [Add your name, and tell NY officials you support an indictment >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8448680-8219-483a-83de-43d86a2342e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is at the center of several ongoing investigations, this one involving his hush money payment to Stormy Daniels. We need Trump to be held accountable for his many, many crimes – and this indictment would be a great start! [Just like in the federal cases](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf73eb04a-b3ed-44d7-a950-2c535ddcd5cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), Trump committed crimes in NY in plain sight, and it shouldn't take years for him to face consequences. We’ve waited long enough – he is an ongoing threat to our nation, and NY could take a big step towards getting the justice we need. [Sign the petition now: Tell NY It’s time to indict Trump! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bfbaa8e-ac91-469d-a270-aa9ed7968ae1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team IDCCA
subject: Only 3 weeks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Far-right extremists are trying to infiltrate our state in the local elections.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MWrxENG5ji2F9QlpQYbsmdwSqPsiyE3TN_yp140WBWs=/Ff748yAstMEBEkmgutLJ-GZv5q9sJ-OHxY2ci7xqUNg=?refcode=EM_FR_230314MM1_Team_90DO_4_NG_A_Logo)
Fellow Democrats, **we have exactly three weeks left until Illinois ' Consolidated Elections**, and we have a lot of work to do before then.

There are more than 6,000 offices on the ballot on April 4th, with little public information on many candidates' beliefs or stances. In many of these races, far-right extremists are trying to exploit the lack of information to sneak their agendas of hate into our schools and local governments.

The IDCCA's grassroots network of Democratic County Party Chairs across the state is playing a crucial role in exposing these fringe candidates and protecting our state by getting the word out about the stakes, directly supporting our Democratic candidates, and making sure Democrats turn out to vote.

And as of tomorrow, we only have a few more fundraising goals left before April 4th, which is why it is critical we are reaching every single one to ensure our success on Election Day.

**[Fellow Democrats, tomorrow is our last major fundraising deadline well in advance of this election, and we need as much help as we can get to carry out all the work ahead of us. Will you donate $10 right now to help us meet our $3,500 mid-month fundraising goal and beat back the far right on April 4th?](https://act.myngp.com/el/MWrxENG5ji2F9QlpQYbsmdwSqPsiyE3TN_yp140WBWs=/Ff748yAstMEBEkmgutLJ-GZv5q9sJ-OHxY2ci7xqUNg=?refcode=EM_FR_230314MM1_Team_90DO_4_NG_A_L1&amount=10)**

Team IDCCA

Federal law requires political committees use their "best efforts" to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500.

A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board's official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL

Friend -- We have a make-or-break goal of raising $125,000 by tomorrow's mid-month deadline, and I need your help right now to hit it. **This _has_ to be a top priority for Democrats today.**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My blood is boiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24ba6d6e914804ba56373c2ed43827&_e=kg5MNCsMQk3GBAO2jQ4vzQHJE6iqtaNgZzRK3EWBQHRthfnph8qc0RlblU7ouhVr-UofFQI_YlVVMxs77HIgXCw63vTB-Wam0FRtdOgu2vs1kKojVbrcLwSSWU287e5F_TqxuoUaaoiVN5e39Y-_tRL1q9chOXY27ZNoNwSqAjVEORW2VeCwS8VyyaDfUOvSYiUWtcPpD85h9256lrQz1V1w2FTou5UftTBiPgWRMJF5c-eXh7N7y-MOrf1KUdcviEFmGxrt-cyvHd_9ih0TL5PRjIQVJkp-sHjvvr1z3PC654vSXUMcPcai2sWg1QgSfx9i-7ZRccWqoJNbSUcZqgn6zOXlBbKiqt2e7aWN_6_JsXAU_MLU6npMcslnvmzRcBwKGQ0HoBh--1jEKiwGFw%3D%3D)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24ba6d6e914804ba56373c2ed43827&_e=kg5MNCsMQk3GBAO2jQ4vzQHJE6iqtaNgZzRK3EWBQHRthfnph8qc0RlblU7ouhVr-UofFQI_YlVVMxs77HIgXCw63vTB-Wam0FRtdOgu2vs1kKojVbrcLwSSWU287e5F_TqxuoUaaoiVN5e39Y-_tRL1q9chOXY27ZNoNwSqAjVEORW2VeCwS8VyyaDfUOvSYiUWtcPpD85h9256lrQz1V1w2FTou5UftTBiPgWRMJFazQNodty9404pRTjnc4uHvbMhhEz-vwuJko_ZneM6kh8pc__NKP-FTigj5ARQ5cT94MdbhPMOU_F6-7EUPqn9AhFBVKVhXktF-YDDsmHblPo0Ki1x1WXyNv8YiTTo7bFnkervHyhvSjoaYbRGhAvQiiWJ3ayrs0qYPFYJTU_LTw%3D%3D)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24ba6d6e914804ba56373c2ed43827&_e=kg5MNCsMQk3GBAO2jQ4vzQHJE6iqtaNgZzRK3EWBQHRthfnph8qc0RlblU7ouhVr-UofFQI_YlVVMxs77HIgXCw63vTB-Wam0FRtdOgu2vs1kKojVbrcLwSSWU287e5F_TqxuoUaaoiVN5e39Y-_tRL1q9chOXY27ZNoNwSqAjVEORW2VeCwS8VyyaDfUOvSYiUWtcPpD85h9256lrQz1V1w2FTou5UftTBiPgWRMJHcD30xvOdVx_LzqQOZ3NvJGBsbB1YFo9g6U4AnGrwh1zn7E5VExOLFVkYFnB-PfkjcAZlA_KNzKIY6dVyEA0iZGBvJiYChS-RCIKl9p0eRtPxxvgcXwEHOwPMQPd7V_G2G9IbcadBSiPJaq-4AFo9lmQSIEXL_neM8IeJns8csww%3D%3D)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c24ba6d6e914804ba56373c2ed43827&_e=kg5MNCsMQk3GBAO2jQ4vzQHJE6iqtaNgZzRK3EWBQHRthfnph8qc0RlblU7ouhVr-UofFQI_YlVVMxs77HIgXCw63vTB-Wam0FRtdOgu2vs1kKojVbrcLwSSWU287e5F_TqxuoUaaoiVN5e39Y-_tRL1q9chOXY27ZNoNwSqAjVEORW2VeCwS8VyyaDfUOvSYiUWtcPpD85h9256lrQz1V1w2FTou5UftTBiPgWRMJGkQyvrd4VBwh32VLyqpQm1RpFzY5MCWasNeWB51Y1zFtjRjY3Z9_rvfF4a4R6vYDlgTD9_JBIW7AeavDBAmGTDx1WKxGmqP-JDdm6V3uL_lfy4SXNNxzhDkR-2mVYBk88xHnS8B9JIcRTcyS39R_2gahdRFn4hOy3iLT6P-dyKJw%3D%3D)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
At the end of this month, we plan to stop submitting membership card orders to our printer -- meaning this might be one of your last opportunities to renew your membership. | |
---
Derek -- We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. clean_body: At the end of this month, we plan to stop submitting membership card orders to our printer -- meaning this might be one of your last opportunities to renew your membership. | | Derek -- We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, and that means our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats running for office in every ZIP code across the country. At the end of this month, we plan to stop submitting membership card orders to our printer -- meaning this might be one of your last opportunities to renew your membership. The team at the DNC is already looking ahead. Democrats won across the country in 2022 because of grassroots support, and we’re prepared to do it again. Here are just a few things your Official 2023 DNC Membership will help support: 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground; 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure; 💪Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day. With not much time left to renew your membership, we’re counting on you to donate today before it’s too late. Thanks for being a part of this team, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. body:
They want to know if there's blood in the water. We need to show them that our movement stands stronger than ever.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
Friends -
I'm writing today to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign, but before I do, please give me a chance to explain why.
Here's the deal:
March is an especially important month for our campaign, and a big reason for that is our official FEC fundraising deadline at the end of it.
Once that deadline passes, we're legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers for the year so far. The amount we've raised, how many contributions make up that amount — everything will be available for all to see. Good or bad, no matter what.
I can guarantee you that once that report is filed, our opponents — like right-wing Republican lobbyists and dark money super PACs — will be pouring through the receipts to see how we did.
The truth is, they want to know if our campaign has the resources necessary to fight back against them or not.
They want to know if it's worth pouring millions upon millions of dollars into Minnesota this election cycle to try and defeat us.
**_They want to know if there's blood in the water — that means our job is to show that our movement stands stronger than ever.**_
We don't want our opponents to like what they see when we file our FEC report, but the only way we can make sure that happens is if we're in this together. What do you say?
**[Can you make your first online $3 contribution to stand with our campaign today? Every donation — no matter how big or small — will show everyone the unmistakable strength of our movement for justice.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=2&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-march23.NFCjOS&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=21&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
[Express Donate: $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-march23.EPY-4j&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=22&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
[Express Donate: $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-march23.jvEbQE&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=23&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-march23.RtteqN&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=24&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-march23.G2siDR&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=25&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=26&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
I'm incredibly proud of the way we fund this campaign. No corporate PACs, just lots and lots of people standing together and chipping in what they can.
I hope you're proud of that too.
Thank you for being a part of our movement.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230314-ak-g-act&t=27&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=30&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=18_791427_2KMMdP&akid=18%2E791427%2E2KMMdP)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

body:

---

---

**He's betrayed our nation.**
**He's allowed MILLIONS of illegals to waltz into the country unopposed.**
**And he's given violent drug cartels FULL CONTROL of our border,** **where they sell fentanyl on our streets to MURDER our kids.**

Look, here's why our mid-month fundraising deadline this week is critical:
* Jennifer just faced her closest race yet, as her district shifted eleven points to the right from 2020 to 2022.
* VA-10 is going to be a top Republican target again, and they'll be working to beat us to the punch in early field, digital, and TV communications.
* **We won't keep pace with the GOP if we fail to meet our fundraising benchmarks — and need to raise $5,982 more by our deadline on Thursday.**

[**It's going to take a team effort to reach our goal this week, but we'll be in a good position if just 45 more supporters pitch in by this time tomorrow. Jennifer's pitch is simple: she's successfully worked to deliver jobs and economic relief to Northern Virginia, and helped pass historic legislation to revitalize our infrastructure, improve access to public transportation and broadband, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and invest in climate protection and clean energy.

**But that message will be lost in the shuffle if the GOP starts outspending us. And if we fall short of our fundraising goals, we risk giving them an opening.**

So we're counting on you. It's because of supporters like you that Jennifer's won tough races in the past – and we'll need that same groundswell of grassroots energy this time around.

**[So please chip in whatever you can today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60175843/396276539/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230314MM_MM_HQ_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTllNDQ2NS05NWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L90-Q-4AHk3RfxcwlgYZzD1aCY_4SBF6a_xU1EFW0Ps=)**

Thank you!

Team Wexton

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Greenhalgh for Delegate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Geenhalgh for Delegate**
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Friend,
In 2021, I was able to win by 112 votes with the support of people like you who gave their time,
treasure, and prayers to help get our campaign over the finish line.
As I talk with people who live in my district, I realize we want the same things for Virginia: \- Safe neighborhoods to raise our families.
\- Schools that prepare students for college, career, or starting their own businesses.
\- Lower taxes to make living in Virginia more affordable.\- A strong economy with stable businesses offering good jobs.
I won the 51st seat in the House of Delegates, giving Republicans the majority. We were able to pass
large portions of Governor Youngkin’s agenda for Virginia by cutting the grocery tax, improving our
schools, and increasing job opportunities. We are winning the things we all want for Virginia! It has been the honor of my life to serve in the House of Delegates and stand alongside Governor
Youngkin as he works to renew Virginia’s promise. As I run for reelection this year, my race will be heavily contested by the Democrats as they try to win
back the House of Delegates. However, our work in the House is not yet done! We need to expand economic opportunity by cutting
the gas tax, ending the grocery tax, and continuing to lower income taxes. We need to continue
reforming our schools and putting dollars directly into the classroom. We need to expand workforce
training programs and make it easier for businesses to create good paying jobs in the Commonwealth. I have also defended our Constitution which protects the rights of our citizens, and worked to create a
government that lives within its means. This year I am running for re-election to work with Governor Youngkin and the Republican majority to
accomplish these critical priorities. Make no mistake, I am the 51st vote required to pass Governor Youngkin’s agenda. However, I need your help to stay in that role and hold this district. Democrats are already running a well-funded opponent against me in the hopes of retaking the House
of Delegates and undoing the progress that has been made by our majority. They are set on hiking
taxes, making our streets less safe, and keeping parents from having a voice in our schools. We MUST hold the House of Delegates and prevent more flawed liberal legislation from becoming law.
Your donation of [$1,000, $500, $250, or even $100](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/0cee56f6f8ab2413/985a317467edaccbc3d6b838967d376c/37923) will go a long way in helping me hold this seat. Your support is necessary for our campaign to have the resources we need to get our message out and
make strategic investments early in data, field and other infrastructure to help get me over the finish
line.
Thank you for your continued support.
Sincerely,

Karen Greenhalgh

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, In 2021, I was able to win by 112 votes with the support of people like you who gave their time, treasure, and prayers to help get our campaign over the finish line. As I talk with people who live in my district, I realize we want the same things for Virginia: \- Safe neighborhoods to raise our families. \- Schools that prepare students for college, career, or starting their own businesses. \- Lower taxes to make living in Virginia more affordable.\- A strong economy with stable businesses offering good jobs. I won the 51st seat in the House of Delegates, giving Republicans the majority. We were able to pass large portions of Governor Youngkin’s agenda for Virginia by cutting the grocery tax, improving our schools, and increasing job opportunities. We are winning the things we all want for Virginia! It has been the honor of my life to serve in the House of Delegates and stand alongside Governor Youngkin as he works to renew Virginia’s promise. As I run for reelection this year, my race will be heavily contested by the Democrats as they try to win back the House of Delegates. However, our work in the House is not yet done! We need to expand economic opportunity by cutting the gas tax, ending the grocery tax, and continuing to lower income taxes. We need to continue reforming our schools and putting dollars directly into the classroom. We need to expand workforce training programs and make it easier for businesses to create good paying jobs in the Commonwealth. I have also defended our Constitution which protects the rights of our citizens, and worked to create a government that lives within its means. This year I am running for re-election to work with Governor Youngkin and the Republican majority to accomplish these critical priorities. Make no mistake, I am the 51st vote required to pass Governor Youngkin’s agenda. However, I need your help to stay in that role and hold this district. Democrats are already running a well-funded opponent against me in the hopes of retaking the House of Delegates and undoing the progress that has been made by our majority. They are set on hiking taxes, making our streets less safe, and keeping parents from having a voice in our schools. We MUST hold the House of Delegates and prevent more flawed liberal legislation from becoming law. Your donation of will go a long way in helping me hold this seat. Your support is necessary for our campaign to have the resources we need to get our message out and make strategic investments early in data, field and other infrastructure to help get me over the finish line. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Karen Greenhalgh PS: even $51 to be Governor Youngkin’s 51st vote would be greatly appreciated and help give me the resources I need to win this campaign. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Karen Geenhalgh for Delegate

Hi there, Fellow Conservative.

I’m reaching out on behalf of Team Morrisey to give you a critical update of where things stand.

For those unfamiliar: Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is a true conservative fighter and one of the leading voices in the America First Movement.

He’s had the support of leaders like President Trump in the past, and now he is hoping to gain the support of proven patriots like yourself, Fellow Conservative.

With one of his most trying deadlines of the year just 24 hours away, there is no other time that your support would be more meaningful than right now.

[_**To join Team Morrisey and learn more about the Attorney General’s fight against the Woke Mob and passion for preserving American values, click here.**_](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=1da0f5ce65a747789ae695d9c70f8f48&_e=mot2mkuoYBugNDkqFf92s8MrefoO5ykzf4Al5oOt7Ka9ug2m3F9EN24EpCL94IdTyNSNM2vfWQIhYg-HsYzUlRtfwY9lQ6dQKV3m1Zb8dcE_oUBBrN5vfyPwn8vdZXev0CrnheO-j3pMqN92Q3g1KPO68lIcDH447B_nGICMKo8KZxEFwQA38zu-D4btNNzPDKZCgWNvdUIG8c9ya5qfZzI5surFgJNExtgMToGC4jLbFlvDELePcq4_OSlgFWbh0YM_37yTXxdni8dDhkcJ_upSOfhKqU4HemfE_j-7X5FBGwt9PX25oFH-rU8FBJR_k7uzfbw-stJt6EUrbPlIJnhV2m9KtukB6vtlsWT1HyoPOEeLEXM1SDWigM12TFHjRVGiA-h0tBPWpbLceXIZW7nZNA_vxJvOzfwITW74Kk4%3D)
What is happening in our country right now is a crying shame.

We have succumbed to the destruction and deprivation of the Woke Mob. From the West Coast to the East Coast America has nearly become unrecognizable.

Defunded police, wide-open borders, criminals going free, drugs being sold at every street corner, homeless populations taking over the streets, servicemen and women having our backs turned against them, Communist China given free reign to occupy our airspace, an economy in shambles and one weak and feeble President who sits back at his vacation home in Delaware while it all happens.

I mean good night, Fellow Conservative, what more can our country take?!

We need a return to normalcy — a return to American values. AND FAST!

That is why I am on Team Morrisey: Because I know the Attorney General is EXACTLY the kind of America First leader we need.

I believe in Patrick Morrisey, and I believe in America.**[Will you join me before the deadline tomorrow night? ](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=1da0f5ce65a747789ae695d9c70f8f48&_e=mot2mkuoYBugNDkqFf92s8MrefoO5ykzf4Al5oOt7Ka9ug2m3F9EN24EpCL94IdTyNSNM2vfWQIhYg-HsYzUlRtfwY9lQ6dQKV3m1Zb8dcE_oUBBrN5vfyPwn8vdZXev0CrnheO-j3pMqN92Q3g1KPO68lIcDH447B_nGICMKo8KZxEFwQA38zu-D4btNNzPDKZCgWNvdUIG8c9ya5qfZzI5surFgJNExtgMToGC4jLbFlvDELePcq4_OSlgFWbh0YM_37yTXxdni8dDhkcJ_pr_zWJ1zXr6y8OHYzA7YHIt9NSQDe578acQfvemjHUhA-YS7Lk59HIP1Id1H7CdzYBmKKu7NqNjF6JBjSdqGs6yQWgbftUXKwtcC733nTBsFhGNuwqtFEiIdFeXw8NENBz7_hwCBfS8P0vseRUcpU8%3D)**
Thank you for your time and support,

Jesse,
Team Morrisey

clean_body: it’s sad, but true | | | Hi there, Fellow Conservative. I’m reaching out on behalf of Team Morrisey to give you a critical update of where things stand. For those unfamiliar: Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is a true conservative fighter and one of the leading voices in the America First Movement. He’s had the support of leaders like President Trump in the past, and now he is hoping to gain the support of proven patriots like yourself, Fellow Conservative. With one of his most trying deadlines of the year just 24 hours away, there is no other time that your support would be more meaningful than right now. What is happening in our country right now is a crying shame. We have succumbed to the destruction and deprivation of the Woke Mob. From the West Coast to the East Coast America has nearly become unrecognizable. Defunded police, wide-open borders, criminals going free, drugs being sold at every street corner, homeless populations taking over the streets, servicemen and women having our backs turned against them, Communist China given free reign to occupy our airspace, an economy in shambles and one weak and feeble President who sits back at his vacation home in Delaware while it all happens. I mean good night, Fellow Conservative, what more can our country take?! We need a return to normalcy — a return to American values. AND FAST! That is why I am on Team Morrisey: Because I know the Attorney General is EXACTLY the kind of America First leader we need. I believe in Patrick Morrisey, and I believe in America. Thank you for your time and support, Jesse, Team Morrisey | | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915.

name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Action
subject: The news I never wanted to share
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The Biden administration approved the Willow project.
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4440?t=2&akid=13297%2E53494%2EglmY0c)
---
Friend,
Yesterday, the Biden administration officially approved the Willow Project, ConocoPhillips' massive oil drilling expansion in Alaska's Western Arctic.
I won't mince words. This is an unacceptable departure from President Biden's climate and environmental justice commitments. He ran and won on the most ambitious climate agenda in U.S. history—yet now, his administration has approved one of the largest fossil fuel projects proposed on public lands.
Make no mistake: This decision sells out frontline communities to Big Polluters. Alaska Native communities living alongside this vital Arctic ecosystem will be the ones to bear the burden of the ensuing toxic fossil fuel pollution.
**President Biden must get back on track to deliver on his commitments to the American people—and find a way to ensure dangerous fossil fuel projects on public lands are never approved again under his watch.[_Our policy team details three ways the Biden administration and Congress can stop future climate disasters like Willow in our latest blog post._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4440?t=3&akid=13297%2E53494%2EglmY0c)**
[READ MORE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4440?t=4&akid=13297%2E53494%2EglmY0c)
---
While this isn't the outcome we wanted, I'm still proud of everything we accomplished. Thanks to your advocacy, countless more people are aware of Willow and are primed to fight against the next dangerous project Big Polluters propose. This isn't the first setback in our fight for our clean energy future, and it won't be the last. But all the while, our grassroots power is growing. We will win the future we deserve.
Onward,
Mattea Mrkusic
Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=13297%2E53494%2EglmY0c). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Wisconsin Senate Update (via Tammy Baldwin for Senate)
subject: Potential MAGA candidate for Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter — There have been several developments over the past week
about potential challengers to Tammy Baldwin’s Senate seat, so we wanted
to break it down for you:

FIRST: Rumors started circulating that Paul Ryan — yes, former Speaker of
the House and Trump friend and foe — is considering a run for the U.S.
Senate. He’s on a book tour trying to rewrite his record and separate
himself from Donald Trump, but we all know what he really stands for.

THEN: We just learned that former Sheriff David Clarke Jr. is strongly
considering running, too. In case you haven’t heard of him, here’s what
you need to know: he supported Steve Bannon’s scam to “build the wall,”
defended January 6 insurrectionists, and is so extreme that he was even
banned from Fox News! No way we can let this guy represent Wisconsin.

NOW: We are just one day away from our final mid-month deadline before our
first FEC fundraising deadline of the year. We’re a bit behind where we
need to be, and with all these Republicans swarming to run for Senate, we
can’t afford weak numbers in our report. That’s why we’re asking:

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/735?t=1004&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]Can you chip in $10 or any amount before tomorrow night to keep our
fundraising on pace? With folks as MAGA-extreme as Paul Ryan and David
Clarke thinking about running for Senate, we need all the resources we can
get to hold onto this seat.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/736?t=1005&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/737?t=1006&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/738?t=1007&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/739?t=1008&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/740?t=1009&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/741?t=1010&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your support. We’re going to do all we can to keep Paul Ryan
and David Clarke as far away from the U.S. Senate as possible.

— Team Baldwin

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=44%2E35263%2EHdL5h1 ]Privacy Policy

name: Chrissy
subject: March recap from my office
body:
A NOTE FROM CHRISSY

This Congress - the 118th - got off to a rocky start with the election for Speaker taking not one...not two...but 15 rounds of voting. The only time this process took longer was leading up to the Civil War. The business of forming committees took most of January, but it’s finally all sorted out. I’m excited to continue serving on the House Armed Services Committee where I focus on the needs of military families, nuclear weapons, and missile defense. I’m also proud to have earned an appointment to the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence which oversees the different branches of the U.S. intelligence community. AKA, spy stuff. :-)

In February, my team and I participated in a two-day staff retreat in beautiful, historic Southern Chester County, held our 70th town hall, kicked off the Bipartisan Paid Family Leave Working Group, published an op-ed on the need for reforms to how Presidents and members of Congress handle classified material, and more.

Thank you for being part of this journey to make our communities and our country better. Thank you for the honor of serving our community.

https://chrissyhoulahanforcongress.com

70th Town Hall: Resources at our Fingertips

I was delighted to have community members join me at a town hall - our 70th! - at Reading’s Miller Center for the Arts. These meetings offer an important opportunity to listen to one another and learn about the excellent resources in our community. I am also profoundly grateful to our special guests – Dr. Susan Looney, Mayor Eddie Moran, Michael Toledo, Anne Fisher, and Dr. Michael Stauffer – for the many ways they support and improve the livelihoods of our residents.

Renewing the fight for Paid Family Leave

Rep. Stephanie Bice and I sat down with CNN’s Dana Bash to discuss our bipartisan working group on paid family leave. The lack of federal paid family leave is forcing mothers out of the workforce, asking them to choose between being a parent and staying in a job they love. That’s what happened to me when I was a young Air Force lieutenant and pregnant with my first child. Fixing this is important to me and it’s personal. Not only will paid family leave meet the modern needs of businesses, workers, and families alike, but it also delivers on our promise, by both Republicans and Democrats, to build stronger communities.

State of the Union

President Biden gave his second State of the Union address and both took a victory lap and offered his vision for the future. Did you know that members of Congress are able to take one guest? My guest was Jessica Goldenberg, a local mom who didn’t get much leave and had to resign her job shortly after giving birth. You can imagine how thrilled I was to hear the President prioritize paid family leave in his address. Together we will get this done.

Much lies ahead in our work to bring a better future for all of us. Rest assured that we will continue to fight for you. But in the meantime, I love to hear from community members about how our office has helped resolve their issues or how we can best serve folks like you. Remember, our website is always a resource for you and your family. As always, we invite you to call one of our offices or fill out our contact form. We're all in this together.

https://houlahan.house.gov/connect/

There’s work to be done.
– Chrissy

Chrissy is proud to be your voice in Congress and is committed to fighting for the values that matter to our community. But a divided Congress means that this year has challenges ahead. We must all work together to have any chance of creating a better future that works for everyone. So we're counting on the support of people like you to keep Chrissy’s momentum going throughout the year. Can we count on you to join us and donate whatever you can spare right now?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan-digital?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk791-ot-text

Thank you for your support and for believing in our vision for a better future.

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=vKo4QHGWMxUACfSvso%2BefExCNKjsMHy%2F1L%2F5I%2FG1X5fz%2FxzpB125pEM1l5BSjN%2FrDIZ2YgtcY3I59%2FTHtKo%2F1tWLeg93pfdAmaRaCnij6NBE8P4iRVrSHSNqFr%2FolkLWXcYOhJQzRp5HayX546a5irN3GfLEWwUxLkwjX3yswBTO5izgkAd%2BFgMqEpyfe9CRjanwk2rJ%2FZX5d3uJV5dPVJkVtPG%2FqI6Iaj%2FlO0aHaGv9j1Gl0v3tD8XvY7Nrv7480hECFrs8scic7I1KGjOX%2BHd8BIZDM2sIWxga0jj%2Fu6yWil%2ByF43H%2FZdsNPmnZtqQ3BazvwvzZk%2Br1nqtv0m9%2FfCwmKEqfzUoko53Q58v53Hs7F4WBUau%2Bw%2F76hvVWl7%2B161UIkYUORCld9yo5SQE%2F6BpsiygL%2B6YxfYbEj4QJx%2FzSur05yYw%2BjQt87hLnKSS

Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States

Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click here:

https://secure.ngpvan.com/umOwNNYDOkWBBmk0KPHJaw2

Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force.

name: Larry Hogan
subject: Our greatest enemy...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | | Who is our greatest enemy, my friend? 40 years ago that was an easy answer – the Soviet Union. In fact, 40 years ago, President Ronald Reagan delivered his famous "Evil Empire" speech. In the speech, he framed a CLEAR moral divide between the United States and the Soviet Union. While he acknowledged the importance of a strong military, President Reagan said, _**"The struggle now going on for the world will never be decided by bombs or rockets, by armies or military might. The real crisis we face today is a spiritual one; at root, it is a test of moral will and faith." **_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=8710421fb6644e828c8418460b178784&_e=CZ9WvBKpIqb7Pfb21a0dDHH4heoRY2AIu_VWVcI7t4iEXsNW0np8qlMwJE1liFL0JpLIr7G43t-LxuwZ3HWXK-bYYv1bp6QlCIn_XS2C6I3m_OAksex6Gzvs0BxnYjbADMtBWMw1X5G8lngk4Q-1yDu0LwJfeLruSAMiARESVLTtci71wbS6p7GNmuaoE_NE1r_UCvsnuPCQ7hJF_PexjieshaE_0firQjO6AB7B9cc30zC1TqzTDBPDYHvGQGwFL00vHNZTOsAIBVmZEA5I6A%3D%3D)
---
Both sides, Democrats and Republicans, are facing a moral crisis today. We are becoming our own worst enemies. It grieves me to see our politics so broken. Too many people blame their fellow Americans for the woes of our country while making excuses for our true enemies. [**An America United****is working to make sure that America remains a force for good and for freedom. Please join us now and help us find a better, more hopeful path forward.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=8710421fb6644e828c8418460b178784&_e=CZ9WvBKpIqb7Pfb21a0dDHH4heoRY2AIu_VWVcI7t4iEXsNW0np8qlMwJE1liFL0JpLIr7G43t-LxuwZ3HWXK-bYYv1bp6QlCIn_XS2C6I3m_OAksex6Gzvs0BxnYjbAr6TbczCDsMZMDlMKI1GYOOe6nA2Q1p5tlL7VGiv8HPGhdHDKbvvhMqK338DQUgGTKAH3IPV4smKJzADIRuQJWhpTa4Ut99NfXVn5Bey5UJ-Xq2xJEDnZKEujDGBSWEG3eRHzZ4glqBargBQ4MVWBSA%3D%3D) Now, more than ever, OUR country needs clear moral leadership. Leadership that stands against evil in the world through faith, hope, and love for our fellow Americans. Join us in the fight for the soul of America. Thank you, **Larry Hogan** _Former Governor of Maryland (2015-2023)_

Peter,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**
