name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: I was punished because my name is “Trump”
body:
Trinity University in Texas labeled me an "elevated risk" for their school's security

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10c5481ebf7e4dba9f8ee1e81ca7c11b&_e=ncXEiX0nj74iT-iqMmpl5zxfuAbeIZyw0aBWBxf8UQ4kqTOTpc97Hb5O33pflBxOxAVhowctrLDBwZ4FvME_Z67euf9r4JU17rVvcne94hc1xgNF59OBLoBG2c8aDUJPKq46r8xh36AWquKganEYgwovj0SsjJgJXG7PXDYbnNkv7AWoTQ6eyrboV_WXO5STdDeYhGFq4S5EOHrll8mTtUvhK9BTQor4SXljJLpk6yWMueU2ywY0ZvTXgbI4DMBmTe9ICGgVOvBYrH5vZ8MZxpQa2G5TvYyTRHL7VlVqAsA%3D)
---
Friend, **Trinity University in Texas labeled me an "elevated risk" for their school's security ... _simply because my last name is Trump!_** That's right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this****outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10c5481ebf7e4dba9f8ee1e81ca7c11b&_e=ncXEiX0nj74iT-iqMmpl5zxfuAbeIZyw0aBWBxf8UQ4kqTOTpc97Hb5O33pflBxOxAVhowctrLDBwZ4FvME_Z67euf9r4JU17rVvcne94hc1xgNF59OBLoBG2c8aDUJPKq46r8xh36AWquKganEYg8wq4AQZNPwVJF4wTuwWt_k46XRuze08BA9IyzAUvDxwoGB3ZUHpTd52-N0S_flEk3nbVU_VvGWiuxc3QAcRW7AvYaTuqNNREQvLQ1pDx5yuuSgXyb2ppFqqOgkQJquZtYa5WYd8a0bBD5HiwXmX53Q%3D)
---
[Stand with Speech First](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10c5481ebf7e4dba9f8ee1e81ca7c11b&_e=ncXEiX0nj74iT-iqMmpl5zxfuAbeIZyw0aBWBxf8UQ4kqTOTpc97Hb5O33pflBxOxAVhowctrLDBwZ4FvME_Z67euf9r4JU17rVvcne94hc1xgNF59OBLoBG2c8aDUJPKq46r8xh36AWquKganEYg2hJnePx65DMQNdOW8CReMrxiIqjcRd_ZPtzrP8zP0Y5qWuvWZvJUzsEVGbfjtDcsYM33y3VfrrGligHapvgp85sIn2tErL4NpRM8FmGWKaa-mNLsGmwrF2-7Q_SJ6voEjlRpWPWdJiW8_Gvkq7I2s0%3D)
---
Friend, even if I _were_ related to President Trump (I'm no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call - and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don't think so! Friend, let's add one more win for free speech to Speech First's Texas Victory Tour. [**Add your name to Speech First 's open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10c5481ebf7e4dba9f8ee1e81ca7c11b&_e=ncXEiX0nj74iT-iqMmpl5zxfuAbeIZyw0aBWBxf8UQ4kqTOTpc97Hb5O33pflBxOxAVhowctrLDBwZ4FvME_Z67euf9r4JU17rVvcne94hc1xgNF59OBLoBG2c8aDUJPKq46r8xh36AWquKganEYgyizlrTQZBws59dvX60wR9su3gavcaTp1UqMyn4xoIvYT1JM1ifB0DXXw-TQXQDwoHCf6nU4mWeRSYSqQicWb1M1ySVW37X_qSzDs2FCkFGeseRirLOIduA_4PArgdCPOc0RkkTXvS026DWkOZV2J8E%3D) There's barely any time left, and I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist Administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise Trump Speech First
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10c5481ebf7e4dba9f8ee1e81ca7c11b&_e=ncXEiX0nj74iT-iqMmpl5zxfuAbeIZyw0aBWBxf8UQ4kqTOTpc97Hb5O33pflBxOxAVhowctrLDBwZ4FvME_Z67euf9r4JU17rVvcne94hc1xgNF59OBLoBG2c8aDUJPKq46r8xh36AWquKganEYg0xpX12zUFkbH-0QQlWLTHoT_0X9X--aaf5MbpSKeOBd3fPrhM78JyTHKCAW1OZX-L7s9CJWoXNCCCLzabQnVL60yIYOZL51wO49XtTrEmk9L8X0gU5NyMAFRBFyW7qPyeSLY3ATEj-SPqMpGFdpM60%3D)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: fighting woke policies (2 min read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Here's what House Republicans are up to >> | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. After a few busy weeks in Washington, It's great to be out of the swamp and back home meeting with hard-working Kansans.

Last week on Capitol Hill, I was focused on pushing back against Biden's failed border policies, stopping Big Tech from colluding with the federal government to censor Americans, finding the truth about the origins of COVID, and protecting parents' rights, and highlighting the reckless tax and spend proposals in Joe Biden's liberal budget proposal.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICANS PASSED A BILL TO DECLASSIFY ALL INFO RELATING TO COVID ORIGINS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4905b254a5&e=1050d051da)
---
| [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE FULL NEWSMAX INTERVIEW**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=65b3087db2&e=1050d051da)
---
| This week I voted in favor of a bill that would force the Biden administration to declassify **ALL** information relating to the origins of COVID-19.

**The Senate passed this bill back in 2021, but Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats REFUSED to bring it to the floor for a vote.**

We could have known this crucial information two years earlier, but because Democrats love to put politics above the truth, we are behind the curve.

Republicans promised the American people that we would get to the bottom of the origins of COVID and we are delivering on that promise. Passing this commonsense bill is a great first step to holding Communist China and those responsible inside our federal government accountable for covering up the truth. I joined Sean Spicer to update the American people on our COVID-19 origins investigations. [**WATCH the full interview here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c7289324b4&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **PUSHING BACK ON BIDEN'S FAILED BORDER POLICIES**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2c32caaa27&e=1050d051da)
---
| Biden's border crisis continues to get worse by the day. This self-inflicted humanitarian and national security disaster is impacting families and communities across America—including Kansas.
**Joe Biden and liberals in the White House refuse to take meaningful action to stop the flow of criminals, drugs, weapons, and human trafficking from coming over the southern border and into our communities. **
This week on the Oversight Committee, I discussed how the record amount of fentanyl being trafficked over the border is impacting Kansans. I highlighted the heartbreaking story of Cruz Burris—a 15-year-old high school student who died of a fentanyl overdose earlier this year.

Enough is enough. Republicans are taking action. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4f75543092&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **PARENTS BILL OF RIGHTS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f0c9462142&e=1050d051da)
---
| As a father of four young kids, I know how important it is that parents, **NOT POLITICANS** , are in control of their children's education. This may seem like common sense to many Americans, but unfortunately, Democrats are hellbent on taking away parents' rights and indoctrinating our youth with their woke ideology.

During the pandemic, we got a glimpse into what information was being taught in the classroom. When concerned parents went to their local school boards to make their voices heard, they were kicked out and labeled as domestic terrorists by their own federal government.

**This is unacceptable and un-American.** That's why I am proud to back the House GOP's Parents Bill of Rights to ensure parents ALWAYS have a seat at the table. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f3fabe9efa&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **DESIGNATING MEXICAN CARTELS AS TERRORIST ORGANIZATIONS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3fa16135f9&e=1050d051da)
---
| Mexican cartels are taking advantage of Joe Biden's weakness and lack of action at the southern border. For two years, these criminal organizations have had operational control of the border and used it to traffic drugs, criminals, weapons, and humans into America illegally.
**I joined Chip Roy in introducing legislation to call these criminal organizations what they truly are** —**terrorists. **
Mexican cartels are using fentanyl to target America's youth. The time for action was yesterday. We can't just sit by and watch America's next generation fall victim to accidental fentanyl overdoses fueled by fake pills flooding our border. We must hit back, and hit back hard. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6f9cfc50a4&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
|
---
| **PROTECTING FREE SPEECH**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5fbde02ad5&e=1050d051da)
---
| Joe Biden and his liberal staffers in the White House bullied social media companies into censoring conservatives online.

We saw it with the New York Post's reporting on the Hunter Biden laptop and we saw it with COVID-19 origins.

Big Tech and Biden bureaucrats have **NO BUSINESS** telling Americans what is and isn't "disinformation." This week, House Republicans passed legislation that would block Biden from colluding with Big Tech to censor lawful speech on their platforms. I will ALWAYS fight to protect Americans' right to express their views online. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9472ac9814&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **BIDEN'S RECKLESS TAX & SPEND BUDGET PROPOSAL**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7d9f5fc8b6&e=1050d051da)
---
| This week, Joe Biden released his massive tax and spend budget proposal. This far-left wish list doubles down on the policies that crushed our economy, created the border crisis, and forced tax hikes on Americans in every single income bracket.
**Rest assured, this ridiculous proposal is DOA in the Republican House.**
I will expand more on Biden's budget in a future email, but here are a few highlights.

Over the next decade:
* **$82 TRILLION** in spending
* **$65 TRILLION** in new taxes
* **$17 TRILLION** in deficits

---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Stop Democrats from forcing their woke climate agenda into retirement funds
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Protect America’s emergency oil reserves
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency
✅ End COVID-19 vax mandates for healthcare workers
✅ Condemn socialism

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=858c0351cd&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved._

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=2a625282a2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=2a625282a2).
---

During the pandemic, we got a glimpse into what information was being taught in the classroom. When concerned parents went to their local school boards to make their voices heard, they were kicked out and labeled as domestic terrorists by their own federal government. This is unacceptable and un-American. That's why I am proud to back the House GOP's Parents Bill of Rights to ensure parents ALWAYS have a seat at the table. | | DESIGNATING MEXICAN CARTELS AS TERRORIST ORGANIZATIONS | | Mexican cartels are taking advantage of Joe Biden's weakness and lack of action at the southern border. For two years, these criminal organizations have had operational control of the border and used it to traffic drugs, criminals, weapons, and humans into America illegally. I joined Chip Roy in introducing legislation to call these criminal organizations what they truly are —terrorists. Mexican cartels are using fentanyl to target America's youth. The time for action was yesterday. We can't just sit by and watch America's next generation fall victim to accidental fentanyl overdoses fueled by fake pills flooding our border. We must hit back, and hit back hard. | | | PROTECTING FREE SPEECH | | Joe Biden and his liberal staffers in the White House bullied social media companies into censoring conservatives online. We saw it with the New York Post's reporting on the Hunter Biden laptop and we saw it with COVID-19 origins. Big Tech and Biden bureaucrats have NO BUSINESS telling Americans what is and isn't "disinformation." This week, House Republicans passed legislation that would block Biden from colluding with Big Tech to censor lawful speech on their platforms. I will ALWAYS fight to protect Americans' right to express their views online. | | BIDEN'S RECKLESS TAX & SPEND BUDGET PROPOSAL | | This week, Joe Biden released his massive tax and spend budget proposal. This far-left wish list doubles down on the policies that crushed our economy, created the border crisis, and forced tax hikes on Americans in every single income bracket. Rest assured, this ridiculous proposal is DOA in the Republican House. I will expand more on Biden's budget in a future email, but here are a few highlights. Over the next decade: $82 TRILLION in spending $65 TRILLION in new taxes $17 TRILLION in deficits | | HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE | I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that REVERSES Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts AMERICA FIRST** : ✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army ✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech ✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak ✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending ✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes ✅ Stop Democrats from forcing their woke climate agenda into retirement funds ✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable ✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government ✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda ✅ Protect America’s emergency oil reserves ✅ Unleash domestic energy production ✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency ✅ End COVID-19 vax mandates for healthcare workers ✅ Condemn socialism | "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY" | | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved. Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . |

subject: Why membership matters:

body:
|

| | Our March Membership Drive has *officially* begun → [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60181236/396285234/809333048?sourceid=1048760&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmJjMTE1YS05ZGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwOdUTgJ4wWrgNznwrxB0KftCYnEbDe-poUzjXSCuVU=&emci=ee5558a1-9bc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bbc115a-9dc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

In 1985, the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List set an ambitious goal: we wanted to build a network of at least **1,000 members** who were committed to our mission of electing Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. We surpassed that goal in just ten months.

Today, 38 years later, our community is now _millions-strong_ and as dedicated as ever.

Though the political landscape may look different now than it did in 1985, our mission hasn't changed a bit. EMILYs List members are still tenacious, passionate individuals committed to breaking barriers for women, fighting back against Republican extremism, and supporting incredible leaders who _get things done_.

**[**That's why I'm inviting you, Peter, to pledge your support and become an official 2023 EMILYs List member.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60181245/396285243/809333048?sourceid=1048760&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmJjMTE1YS05ZGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwOdUTgJ4wWrgNznwrxB0KftCYnEbDe-poUzjXSCuVU=&emci=ee5558a1-9bc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bbc115a-9dc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Like you, I was furious when the conservative-packed Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ this past summer. But while far-right Republicans celebrated the decision, we rolled up our sleeves.

And because of our hard work as a community, we were able to hold the Senate, defend critical governorships, and block Republicans from enacting even more extensive and draconian abortion restrictions last cycle thanks, in large part, to investments made by EMILYs List members — people like you! Without the support and determination of our pro-choice supporters, _none_ of those victories would have been possible.

But this fight is nowhere near over. The 2023-2024 election cycle is now underway, and the battle for our democracy and autonomy continues.

**Peter, this week is your _last chance_ to become a 2023 EMILYs List member. Please donate any amount to activate your membership, help hit our total annual goal of 150,000 new and renewed members, and stand with our millions-strong pro-choice community:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Membership-Last-Chance](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60181246/396285244/809333048?sourceid=1048760&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmJjMTE1YS05ZGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwOdUTgJ4wWrgNznwrxB0KftCYnEbDe-poUzjXSCuVU=&emci=ee5558a1-9bc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bbc115a-9dc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**

Thank you for your support,

Ellen R. Malcolm
Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60181248/396285247/809333048?sourceid=1048760&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmJjMTE1YS05ZGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwOdUTgJ4wWrgNznwrxB0KftCYnEbDe-poUzjXSCuVU=&emci=ee5558a1-9bc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bbc115a-9dc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60181249/396285248/-1808286107?sourceid=1048760&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmJjMTE1YS05ZGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwOdUTgJ4wWrgNznwrxB0KftCYnEbDe-poUzjXSCuVU=&emci=ee5558a1-9bc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bbc115a-9dc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) \--- If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to activate your 2023 membership, thank you! clean_body: | | | Our March Membership Drive has officially begun → Peter, In 1985, the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List set an ambitious goal: we wanted to build a network of at least 1,000 members who were committed to our mission of electing Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. We surpassed that goal in just ten months. Today, 38 years later, our community is now millions-strong and as dedicated as ever. Though the political landscape may look different now than it did in 1985, our mission hasn't changed a bit. EMILYs List members are still tenacious, passionate individuals committed to breaking barriers for women, fighting back against Republican extremism, and supporting incredible leaders who get things done. Like you, I was furious when the conservative-packed Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade this past summer. But while far-right Republicans celebrated the decision, we rolled up our sleeves. And because of our hard work as a community, we were able to hold the Senate, defend critical governorships, and block Republicans from enacting even more extensive and draconian abortion restrictions last cycle thanks, in large part, to investments made by EMILYs List members — people like you! Without the support and determination of our pro-choice supporters, none of those victories would have been possible. But this fight is nowhere near over. The 2023-2024 election cycle is now underway, and the battle for our democracy and autonomy continues. Peter, this week is your last chance to become a 2023 EMILYs List member. Please donate any amount to activate your membership, help hit our total annual goal of 150,000 new and renewed members, and stand with our millions-strong pro-choice community: ** Thank you for your support, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List \--- If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to activate your 2023 membership, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded. | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: RELEASE: SEIU Endorses Dave Min for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
The 1.9 Million Members of Service Employees International Union Are “All In For Min” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/33e3760987b7/release-seiu-endorses-dave-min-for-congress-15651631?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** March 14, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**SEIU Endorses Dave Min for Congress** The 1.9 Million Members of Service Employees International Union Are
“All In For Min” **IRVINE, CA** — Today, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), which represents nearly 2 million members across the United States and Canada, endorsed State Senator Dave Min for California’s 47th Congressional District. This endorsement also includes the support of SEIU California and its 700,000 healthcare workers, janitors, social workers, security officers, in-home caregivers, school and university employees, court workers, and city, county and state employees. SEIU California is the largest employee union in the state. This early endorsement from one of the most important labor organizations in the country is just the latest in a long string of impressive and decisive endorsements for Senator Min, who launched his campaign for CA-47 in January with the support of the incumbent Congresswoman Katie Porter. In recent weeks, Min has announced the endorsements of International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47, California Attorney General Rob Bonta, California State Treasurer Fiona Ma, California Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, California Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, California Senate President Pro Tempore Toni Atkins, California Assembly Speaker Anthony Rendon, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=32fde53577&e=7017cc100e).

**“Dave Min has been a fighter for working families across Orange County and we are proud to endorse him,”** said David Huerta, President of California SEIU State Council. **“From standing up to Wall Street banks on behalf of Orange County homeowners during the mortgage crisis, to advocating for a living wage and affordable healthcare for working women and men, to passing consequential gun-safety legislation to protect our children, Dave is a true public servant who has always put the well-being of Californians first. The 47th District is critical for Democrats to retake the House of Representatives and Dave Min is the only candidate with the track record of accomplishment and electoral victory to win this seat.”** Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout. ############ _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 4.3%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| **Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
PO Box 5959
Irvine, CA 92616
---

You can [update your preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=c096c2890b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=c096c2890b).

Dear Peter, In an exclusive article, Breitbart released a poll by National Research Inc, showing I have a STRONG, DOUBLE DIGIT LEAD over any other candidate for Governor of West Virginia. “If Attorney General Patrick Morrisey were to announce his candidacy for Governor of West Virginia, he would become the instant front-runner in the Republican Primary,” said Adam Geller, President of National Research Inc. West Virginians support me because they know I don't just talk the talk - I've FOUGHT and WON for West Virginians on HUGE issues over my ten year tenure. They've counted on me, and I've delivered. As you know, I'm still strongly considering what office to pursue. But, I'll be making a decision very soon, and plan to take West Virginia to the next level in whatever I do next. Stay tuned. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My plan to fix banking regulations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The banking industry needs to follow stronger rules ASAP. I’ve proposed a bill with Congresswoman Katie Porter to get this done. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196171/396317742/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12E_SVB_E_20230314_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODcwZmVhYi1jMWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CR_qXrBaZlqsD0u66-OAvCwedq5PHvz20r197urABbw=&emci=6077163e-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f870feab-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
The failures of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank were a direct result of Donald Trump weakening our banking regulations. We can’t just wait for an even bigger bank failure before taking action. The banking industry needs to follow stronger rules ASAP. And I’ve proposed a bill with Congresswoman Katie Porter to get this done. This legislation repeals a key piece of Trump's bill, which eased regulations on banks that controlled assets ranging from $50 billion to $250 billion. I don’t know about you, but to me a minimum of $50 billion in assets is not pocket change, and needs to be strongly regulated. [_**Add your name if you agree: We must restore the strong bank regulations that were undone by Donald Trump in order to protect our economy and prevent another financial crisis.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196172/396317743/1254782432?refcode=EMZ12E_SVB_E_20230314_V1S1_F&ms=EMZ12E_SVB_E_20230314_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODcwZmVhYi1jMWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CR_qXrBaZlqsD0u66-OAvCwedq5PHvz20r197urABbw=&emci=6077163e-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f870feab-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196173/396317744/1254782432?refcode=EMZ12E_SVB_E_20230314_V1S1_F&ms=EMZ12E_SVB_E_20230314_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODcwZmVhYi1jMWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CR_qXrBaZlqsD0u66-OAvCwedq5PHvz20r197urABbw=&emci=6077163e-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f870feab-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
Here’s the way I see it: banking should be boring. It should never involve this kind of high-stakes theatrics, especially when the livelihoods of so many are involved.
And anyone who wants to take on a lot of risk to make a lot of money quickly should not be in banking.
Trump’s bill made it easier for banks to load up on risk to boost their profits without being subject to enhanced capital requirements and stress tests to prevent a collapse. We need to go back to better regulation to make banking more boring again.
[_**We’ve got to fight for this right now. If you’re on board with stronger banking regulations that protect consumers and our economy, please click here to say you support this legislation.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196174/396317745/1254782432?refcode=EMZ12E_SVB_E_20230314_V1S1_F&ms=EMZ12E_SVB_E_20230314_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODcwZmVhYi1jMWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CR_qXrBaZlqsD0u66-OAvCwedq5PHvz20r197urABbw=&emci=6077163e-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f870feab-c1c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)

body:
Let's send Lamont Bagby to the Virginia Senate

|

Lamont is running to fill the seat of his friend and our friend, Congresswoman-elect Jennifer McClellan, in a seat that was also held by his late mentor, Congressman Donald McEachin. As Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus, Lamont has fought for Virginians every step of his journey in elected office. I know that he’s ready to take the next step and represent the people of the Ninth Senate District.**[I’m asking for your help to send him to the State Senate on March 28th! clean_body: Let's send Lamont Bagby to the Virginia Senate | Derek, Delegate Lamont Bagby is your Democratic nominee for the Virginia Senate in SD-09! Lamont is running to fill the seat of his friend and our friend, Congresswoman-elect Jennifer McClellan, in a seat that was also held by his late mentor, Congressman Donald McEachin. As Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus, Lamont has fought for Virginians every step of his journey in elected office. I know that he’s ready to take the next step and represent the people of the Ninth Senate District.= This special election and our razor-thin majority in the State Senate are too essential to take this race for granted. = Susan Swecker, Chairwoman, Democratic Party of Virginia | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** ******=******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: AOC is holding special interests accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230314-4001-header&t=1&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)
The era of ‘too big to fail’ was supposed to be over.
After the 2008 financial recession, Congress passed legislation to increase oversight of financial institutions, so that the bad actions of a handful of CEOs could never again crater the global economy and crush countless families. But just a decade later, under pressure from lobbyists, Congress rolled back some of those new regulations, and President Trump signed these changes into law.
[This is the problem with money in politics. Lobbyists will always have the ear of Congress until we have politicians in power who refuse to take their money. Alexandria takes 0 corporate donations. She relies only on you. Can you make a donation today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230314.RZTK7U&refcode=em20230314-4001-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230314.RZTK7U&refcode=em20230314-4001-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)**
What’s happening with Silicon Valley Bank doesn’t yet appear to be as severe as what happened to our economy in 2008. But make no mistake, once again, the risky actions of one bank are having serious repercussions on our entire financial system. Another regional bank, Signature, has already been taken over by the government, as well.
Silicon Valley’s CEO was among the many bank executives who lobbied Congress to roll back the very regulations that might have kept his bank from failing. Last year, he took home $9.9 million in compensation and a $1.5 million bonus. There must be accountability — and Alexandria is calling for it.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230314.RZTK7U&refcode=em20230314-4001-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)
**Alexandria is only able to stand up to the big banks because she doesn’t take a single cent from special interests — instead she depends on you, the people she serves, to keep her in Congress fighting for us all.**
[Can you make a $3 contribution today to our campaign to ensure Alexandria is able to keep calling out special interests and corporate greed?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230314.RZTK7U&refcode=em20230314-4001-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)
Thank you for your continued support,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230314?refcode=em20230314-4001-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=24&refcode2=4001_2526796__o_gVH&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230314-4001-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=25&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=4001%2E2526796%2E_o_gVH)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4825870-fe5e-4889-ab19-4ed94141be0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Fighting for a fair wage – now
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60189456/396291635/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFhZWJjZC1hMmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKaNpJVjHak3YJ58WryA3tPnbut2-buSm0HHuFw2mgM=&emci=3ffbdefa-91c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cf1aebcd-a2c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – **Today marks Equal Pay Day – the day that symbolizes how far into the year the average woman must work to earn what the average man did in the previous year. Women in the U.S. still earn only about $0.84 for every dollar that a man earns. When we look at this gap specifically for women of color, it only gets worse. ** I believe in equal pay for equal work, simple as that. As a working mother, I understand all too well that each one of us deserves the dignity of a fair paycheck and a livelihood that can provide for our families. **Today, I'm renewing my promise to fight for tougher pay discrimination enforcement, raising the federal minimum wage, ending the tipped minimum wage, and passing the PRO Act so workers can freely organize for better wages and benefits.** The 4th district sent me to Congress to fight for fair wages for all, and today is a reminder that we've still got a long road ahead to correct the wrongs of the past. All the best, _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | Peter – Today marks Equal Pay Day – the day that symbolizes how far into the year the average woman must work to earn what the average man did in the previous year. Women in the U.S. still earn only about $0.84 for every dollar that a man earns. When we look at this gap specifically for women of color, it only gets worse. I believe in equal pay for equal work, simple as that. As a working mother, I understand all too well that each one of us deserves the dignity of a fair paycheck and a livelihood that can provide for our families. Today, I'm renewing my promise to fight for tougher pay discrimination enforcement, raising the federal minimum wage, ending the tipped minimum wage, and passing the PRO Act so workers can freely organize for better wages and benefits. The 4th district sent me to Congress to fight for fair wages for all, and today is a reminder that we've still got a long road ahead to correct the wrongs of the past. name: Team Cori
subject: 314 STL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Happy 314 Day for St. Louis!
#
Today is 314 Day, Peter!
**While many think of today as “Pi Day”, for St. Louis residents past and present this date shares the digits of our favorite area code (_314_) — and it’s a day to celebrate STL!** Like so many great things in Missouri and across the country, 314 Day originated as a celebration of Black St. Louis residents and has since served as a reminder to take pride in the region.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/799?c0=cori-em-20230314.Q5xRYA&refcode=em20230314-2330&t=1&akid=2330%2E1082990%2Ew25lex)
Today, in honor of 314 Day, Team Cori suggests you rep’ your Team Cori merch or St. Louis sports teams, listen to some of the great artists from STL, like SZA’s latest _SOS_ — and if you’re lucky enough to be local: indulge in a classic St. Louis meal at Mom’s Soul Food Kitchen & Catering. **[But before you go — Team Cori is working to raise 314 contributions of $3.14. Can you pitch it to keep this lifelong St. Louis resident in Congress?](https://act.coribush.org/go/799?c0=cori-em-20230314.Q5xRYA&refcode=em20230314-2330&t=2&akid=2330%2E1082990%2Ew25lex)**
**[Chip in $3.14](https://act.coribush.org/go/799?c0=cori-em-20230314.Q5xRYA&refcode=em20230314-2330&t=21&akid=2330%2E1082990%2Ew25lex)**
Join us in celebrating The Lou and all the incredible communities that call St. Louis home. 💜
—Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230314?refcode=em20230314-2330-footer&t=22&refcode2=2330_1082990_w25lex&akid=2330%2E1082990%2Ew25lex) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

name: NC Supreme Court Alert [AOTL]
subject: It will irreparably damage the legitimacy and reputation of NC's highest court…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

* * *
_**“Let me be very clear: neither the map nor the law has changed, only the composition of the Court. It is my hope that the Court applies the law without bias or political agenda and puts a halt to Republican attempts to undermine free elections through egregious gerrymandering.”**
\-- A.G. Holder_
* * *
Friend,
Today, the North Carolina Supreme Court heard oral arguments as it reconsiders its most recent decision in _Harper v. Hall_ , a landmark state redistricting case. Experts predict extreme ramifications ahead of the 2024 elections if the decision is overturned.
_“It will irreparably damage the legitimacy and reputation of NC's highest court.”_
_\-- WRAL News_
---

subject: needed to reach out ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend: I wanted to pass along this urgent message from my finance director. **As of now, we're still falling $22,374 short of our $50,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and time is running out before tomorrow's midnight deadline.**
---
We need one final push to close this gap, so I'm asking grassroots supporters like you to make your first contribution.
**[Please, will you give $5 or more right now to help us hit our ambitious goal, win in Nevada, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a critical difference in a race this competitive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60197079/396325742/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2394-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWM4N2ZiOC1jNWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RnWvEnKnxjbiT--e7aTn_EqXqMplyjluuBOm3jJsg8s=)**
Thank you.

– Jacky
\---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: **Lexie (Finance Director)**
Date: Tue, Mar 14, 2023
Subject: could you reach out to your most engaged grassroots supporters before EOD?
| | |
---
Hi, Senator – we’re still behind on our fundraising, but I think we can close the gap quickly if we reach out to the team (especially those who are waiting for the perfect time to make their first contribution).

I'm attaching a list of your most engaged grassroots supporters so far this year – if you have the time, could you check in with them? I'm sure it would make a big difference hearing from you directly.
With _The Washington Post_ calling you one of the most vulnerable senators in the country and national Republicans' latest attack ads, we can't afford to fall behind on our goals this early in the cycle.
Thank you!

Lexie
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

subject: “the biggest election of 2023”

at times like this, we’re reminded of what A.G. Holder said
|
---

Team, according to recent reporting, the Supreme Court seems poised to overturn President Biden’s plan to provide relief to thousands of Americans with student loan debt.

At times like this, we’re reminded of what A.G. Holder said after the Supreme Court handed down rulings gutting key provisions of the Voting Rights Act, eliminating reproductive rights, and more: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60190340/396296469/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230314_FR_3H_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNmE0ZmUzLWE0YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H57Y2FH1oLgVufqg51uLnHHO8dFKE_fWliX-we_mb_U=)

_He’s right._ For years, the GOP stacked federal and state courts with conservative justices who they believed would advance their far-right agenda. This tactic has been paying off – and now, Republicans are working to install judges who they think will rubber stamp their agenda in state courts across the country.

Their next target is an upcoming state supreme court race in Wisconsin, which _POLITICO_ called **“the biggest election of 2023,”** because it could have far-reaching impacts on abortion access, voting rights, and even the 2024 presidential contest. And election day is in less than three weeks!

[**_Right-wing activists are pouring cash into Wisconsin, and experts predict this could become the most expensive state supreme court contest in U.S. history. Can we count on you to donate today to support the NDRC’s efforts to elect leaders who will defend our democracy in Wisconsin and nationwide?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60190342/396296471/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230314_FR_3H_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNmE0ZmUzLWE0YzItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H57Y2FH1oLgVufqg51uLnHHO8dFKE_fWliX-we_mb_U=)

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Why we’ve sent A LOT of emails
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
There is honestly no more important time for people to give than during this launch phase.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=51%2E135344%2EH1WO7c)
Friend —
We know we’ve sent a lot of emails since Elissa launched her Senate campaign. We acknowledge it. We know your inboxes can feel like they’re bursting at the seams, from us and lots of other candidates.
Given that, we just wanted to take a second to explain why we’ve sent this many emails, and what they mean to our campaign.
First important fact: Elissa’s campaign isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money. We are going to be funded primarily by lots of people making small donations. That’s how it’s been these first few weeks, where nearly two-thirds of the contributions we’ve received have come from email and text messages – there’s no greater source of donations than those texts and emails.
Then there’s the timing: There’s actually no more important time for people to give than during this launch phase. Why? Because of the value of planning ahead. Raising money now helps us build the foundation for a winning campaign, and will allow us to start reaching voters sooner and more often, and more strategically.
So we hope you’ll excuse the intrusion, and when you see us in your inbox, remember that when Elissa wins this race you’ll never have to guess if she is working for us or for corporate interests.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: It'd mean a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The end of March (specifically 11:59 PM on Friday the 31st) is our first Federal Election Commission deadline of 2023.
#
Derek,
Here's what we need you to know:
The end of March (_specifically 11:59 PM on Friday the 31st_) is our first Federal Election Commission deadline of 2023.
If you've been getting our emails for a while, you know what that means. **After the deadline we have to report every dollar we've raised publicly, for everybody to see.**
This year was off to a slow start, and we want to show strong fundraising $$ to keep up our support of John's work in the Senate. Grassroots donations are the only way we'll be able to catch up -- **[so if you're able to now, will you make a contribution so we can finish the fundraising quarter strong?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230314-1?refcode=em20230314-1-8288&refcode2=8288_434096_-KWqqv&akid=8288%2E434096%2E-KWqqv)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230314-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230314-8288&refcode2=8288_434096_-KWqqv&akid=8288%2E434096%2E-KWqqv)**
Derek, keeping our fundraising up for every deadline matters, even in the off-years. It helps keep us prepared for anything that Republicans and their corporate PAC friends might throw our way.
Every time we've asked, this team has stepped up. **[It'd mean a lot to John + all of Team Fetterman if you could chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you right now to power our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230314-1?refcode=em20230314-1-8288&refcode2=8288_434096_-KWqqv&akid=8288%2E434096%2E-KWqqv)**
We know we can crush this FEC deadline -- and even if you can't chip in right now, thank you for reading these emails + being on this team. 😎
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230314-8288-footer&t=1&refcode2=8288_434096_-KWqqv&akid=8288%2E434096%2E-KWqqv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8288%2E434096%2E-KWqqv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8288%2E434096%2E-KWqqv)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My blood is boiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ad4e6c20e92483587f9b387b158496a&_e=PUvi5PLk0IxMUEIoaHFrwhuOMSSkis3jcH6MOZuKXRvJyXc4pAbZU49sGge5g960gPzUVA1s6aBqp3GFpAMQU82bydFQjcCZSY-u7QaiqnDeoOaEizduszzwHUd_kZf8xkm6zhR_wbu8xA-S8DlBq3uWYgjcqQqo9KUF85ThktUa8TBD5i0QB8_1ogc4QwIGNTsSIpRVOimaIH8rMV4qSaRIvvAFUFjbBRUz_kiYwCAppIxxvuQtMbebHY5cnf1jY0sXCyeeerGGXawzlYfh-fsIAPRDjAE9zHXrjQ_EB8mqgIuwU4TyA3B4mMCe_mCM3SsYpslncd9TwnhPbbvbZ-rvsd-6N4nea5udPA51qJtR9fxWG7Y4WXzT9GLRCmz685nTap2No38eEM23s9GmhA%3D%3D)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ad4e6c20e92483587f9b387b158496a&_e=PUvi5PLk0IxMUEIoaHFrwhuOMSSkis3jcH6MOZuKXRvJyXc4pAbZU49sGge5g960gPzUVA1s6aBqp3GFpAMQU82bydFQjcCZSY-u7QaiqnDeoOaEizduszzwHUd_kZf8xkm6zhR_wbu8xA-S8DlBq3uWYgjcqQqo9KUF85ThktUa8TBD5i0QB8_1ogc4QwIGNTsSIpRVOimaIH8rMV4qSaRIvvAFUFjbBRUz_kiYwCDvWIU0oyX9WWV1UC-cdG2MaCzIKyZE-GAQXididyGRMAZk0ec2l84ZwNabrufyeRV8IcfxjBeoXsZn-TY3CCH4IP49U1sVI_CNycz4uubPVH7p7uLuy0OtqKBbxZxxl-bO0IUzdm0TkraFwjvksDTbXRyn6vMo9PArHV_dbbV7GQ%3D%3D)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ad4e6c20e92483587f9b387b158496a&_e=PUvi5PLk0IxMUEIoaHFrwhuOMSSkis3jcH6MOZuKXRvJyXc4pAbZU49sGge5g960gPzUVA1s6aBqp3GFpAMQU82bydFQjcCZSY-u7QaiqnDeoOaEizduszzwHUd_kZf8xkm6zhR_wbu8xA-S8DlBq3uWYgjcqQqo9KUF85ThktUa8TBD5i0QB8_1ogc4QwIGNTsSIpRVOimaIH8rMV4qSaRIvvAFUFjbBRUz_kiYwCAwLK6mU_iXl7j0r-qTfrk9IJ1O7-iaL7SSNC_NTUu9E_TUKotoMc_vimKGbaCWLLge1_u9n15zYboaRVqynoWWjT883g-0I-E3FMqYTQKvTsNpcsZRderhh-g0FHxBNvCI06j4zX-KWj1wLPyDPiX6xWuFU9fhgyegh4ECv7yIMQ%3D%3D)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ad4e6c20e92483587f9b387b158496a&_e=PUvi5PLk0IxMUEIoaHFrwhuOMSSkis3jcH6MOZuKXRvJyXc4pAbZU49sGge5g960gPzUVA1s6aBqp3GFpAMQU82bydFQjcCZSY-u7QaiqnDeoOaEizduszzwHUd_kZf8xkm6zhR_wbu8xA-S8DlBq3uWYgjcqQqo9KUF85ThktUa8TBD5i0QB8_1ogc4QwIGNTsSIpRVOimaIH8rMV4qSaRIvvAFUFjbBRUz_kiYwCDeXsdk6pfL30nVYJukmiewmCYn2p7otXkJYbyrlK6DKukwPsiIRbM6HM3hOQKcQ7xZcOY9GeR5BKFCBwRxajGJowoq6-4UVi5WM7ba8tz28YM-k8hpKXJrRDmf-E5Is8EZBamQo_1EbgjTZhBN807JVwmaE6erlBtgox0uLNNA9w%3D%3D)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ad4e6c20e92483587f9b387b158496a&_e=PUvi5PLk0IxMUEIoaHFrwhuOMSSkis3jcH6MOZuKXRvJyXc4pAbZU49sGge5g960gPzUVA1s6aBqp3GFpAMQU82bydFQjcCZSY-u7QaiqnDeoOaEizduszzwHUd_kZf8xkm6zhR_wbu8xA-S8DlBq3uWYgjcqQqo9KUF85ThktUa8TBD5i0QB8_1ogc4QwIGNTsSIpRVOimaIH8rMV4qSaRIvvAFUFjbBRUz_kiYwCA1CXQKHop4045tHdc4tv3xliDC7F_qAWhuP_imKLp1jwF6diT6CoHW1lBtkOJLtudtkdAtUCl23YcNbKREns-dp1Nqtc8kDo3i7zV_M5ySoiF1gN6kO-6etIU_qWw_gFLbGj0Sg2Rnej8AUJfcppiNdjXmhOFa4YX_87iAZEjhTg%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government. | Fellow American, Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild. It makes my blood boil. The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets. This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility. | It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people. Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me. Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d5935c088ac64f648a88117d50083d74&_e=RkcWbyFqfikeydh0hSE7jPIdpUhDteVYlRBrifp7bP4jm03qiEn2NkYZeu0u_wDM6DaCPboNiwkmb9l9XcVkHWuA_oTZoWfPcuq5ZR-iBc2AUwpc1DvDjykZpnxagL94o4jtIpTWDwTpuMc6n8kD2bI-CCpL_IgV-RplBBTSVm8FPPo_IOtE26DuzoIR8bRirZzrdaXVtTGqyVuBlF3LWdqs-18u70-iFfJ5IPhU_eNpJWP772WPB6BAZRlYFx7AMt15sQX0V11IUKsxOOaaImdrUyube4XQyPLRFoUTZtA%3D)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d5935c088ac64f648a88117d50083d74&_e=RkcWbyFqfikeydh0hSE7jPIdpUhDteVYlRBrifp7bP4jm03qiEn2NkYZeu0u_wDM6DaCPboNiwkmb9l9XcVkHWuA_oTZoWfPcuq5ZR-iBc2AUwpc1DvDjykZpnxagL94o4jtIpTWDwTpuMc6n8kD2b3YXVcUZ8O-UmjyLxnSYc9fcmgnt-P-3Vp4z0sRKR_lvRRB13Lknsbi39ixtQUbbEt4G3whFgtjGAzM1RWycBBZ9dAp3YCUKl6ZM6gyCKMs_FOnxkTjXU3fXGXo9rfg0GgtrE4jyklyXJiAsz0l6Mc%3D)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children."**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d5935c088ac64f648a88117d50083d74&_e=RkcWbyFqfikeydh0hSE7jPIdpUhDteVYlRBrifp7bP4jm03qiEn2NkYZeu0u_wDM6DaCPboNiwkmb9l9XcVkHWuA_oTZoWfPcuq5ZR-iBc2AUwpc1DvDjykZpnxagL94o4jtIpTWDwTpuMc6n8kD2Zbxnm5dJX0I4mLS_-mYEslXytuOnlBEI3RepXaPzf_Qwi_ekRkvLFkURouSAdU_r_Kv8Yr2AYuce6YXl9c-smlsEJBDpgacJ25bELVsFvrsZDTzoSBlajhlyNKZM_Itc91etHR0uLpb5mhF5MxLsoM%3D)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d5935c088ac64f648a88117d50083d74&_e=RkcWbyFqfikeydh0hSE7jPIdpUhDteVYlRBrifp7bP4jm03qiEn2NkYZeu0u_wDM6DaCPboNiwkmb9l9XcVkHWuA_oTZoWfPcuq5ZR-iBc2AUwpc1DvDjykZpnxagL94F1dib411aVClhVReu1mEnQ7mwPpq5BOy1P0B1b9lKMzqzQd2rls_21YMlNj3zlQRHDddG6myLiMIF45b7IkLWD3ZlSuNpdACa-VNfa5j8pHtnMgvMSvT0X-NwDkcsdWgebpp_D5hReXdTMeGJfspnzDfwJbk35QiiZBcoHOZDkI%3D)

| Arizona is one of the most competitive states in the country, and many of our races going into the next election cycle look neck and neck. **Especially the GOP-held seats that we are looking to flip blue.**

Look, we will need to get started early in building the momentum and resources needed to ensure that Arizona turns blue. And the only way we can make that happen is by having a surge in grassroots donations from supporters like you right now.

That's why here at AZ Dems, we just set up our Blue Arizona Fundraising Goal of $10,000 over the next three days. $10,000 – _right now_ – is just what we need if we want to have any chance of being competitive in races up and down the ballot in Arizona.

The time we need to build our early momentum to flip these GOP seats will fly by quicker than we think. **[So reaching this goal is critical in laying the groundwork for flipping seats across Arizona blue. clean_body: | | | We just set an ambitious goal. | | | Arizona is one of the most competitive states in the country, and many of our races going into the next election cycle look neck and neck. Especially the GOP-held seats that we are looking to flip blue. Look, we will need to get started early in building the momentum and resources needed to ensure that Arizona turns blue. And the only way we can make that happen is by having a surge in grassroots donations from supporters like you right now. That's why here at AZ Dems, we just set up our Blue Arizona Fundraising Goal of $10,000 over the next three days. $10,000 – right now – is just what we need if we want to have any chance of being competitive in races up and down the ballot in Arizona. The time we need to build our early momentum to flip these GOP seats will fly by quicker than we think. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: – AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . body:
It’s hard to believe that in 2023, women working full-time, year-round are still paid on average only 84 cents for every dollar a man makes. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60192026/396302566/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRjMzU5YS1hYmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OdksPvEEBdiju4T_eie-zKdWDoLnqghYALGiVw-o7s=&emci=5cd71ae4-9ec2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5edc359a-abc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | Team: **Today marks Equal Pay Day** — the day in the new year that a woman must work until in order to make the same amount of money that a white, non-Hispanic man earned on average during the last calendar year. It’s hard to believe that in 2023, women working full-time, year-round _are still paid on average only 84 cents for every dollar a man makes._ And team — this metric only extends to white, non-Hispanic women. **Unfortunately the disparity for women of color is far worse: **
* _Black women are paid on average 64 cents for every $1 a man makes;_
* _Native American women make 58 cents on average;_
* _And Hispanic women make 54 cents compared to white, non-Hispanic men in the workforce._

We’re commemorating Equal Pay Day by joining the conversation and continuing our fight for fair wages nationwide. [_**If you’re with us, will you rush a donation to help us win more campaigns to raise the minimum wage in states across the country?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60192027/396302567/-1558224708?refcode=E20585-20230314-EqualPayDay-SL-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRjMzU5YS1hYmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OdksPvEEBdiju4T_eie-zKdWDoLnqghYALGiVw-o7s=) [FIGHT FOR FAIR WAGES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60192028/396302568/-1558224708?refcode=E20585-20230314-EqualPayDay-SB-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRjMzU5YS1hYmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OdksPvEEBdiju4T_eie-zKdWDoLnqghYALGiVw-o7s=) **So far, we’ve won ballot measure campaigns in 9 states to raise the minimum wage and give workers the pay raise they deserve.** _And team, it’s working._ These 9 campaigns have put $22 billion into the hands of workers and narrowed the gender wage gap in these states to some of the lowest in the country, according to US Census data! clean_body: It’s hard to believe that in 2023, women working full-time, year-round are still paid on average only 84 cents for every dollar a man makes. | | Team: Today marks Equal Pay Day — the day in the new year that a woman must work until in order to make the same amount of money that a white, non-Hispanic man earned on average during the last calendar year. It’s hard to believe that in 2023, women working full-time, year-round are still paid on average only 84 cents for every dollar a man makes. And team — this metric only extends to white, non-Hispanic women. Unfortunately the disparity for women of color is far worse: Black women are paid on average 64 cents for every $1 a man makes; Native American women make 58 cents on average; And Hispanic women make 54 cents compared to white, non-Hispanic men in the workforce. We’re commemorating Equal Pay Day by joining the conversation and continuing our fight for fair wages nationwide. = = So far, we’ve won ballot measure campaigns in 9 states to raise the minimum wage and give workers the pay raise they deserve. And team, it’s working. These 9 campaigns have put $22 billion into the hands of workers and narrowed the gender wage gap in these states to some of the lowest in the country, according to US Census data! We’re dedicated to fueling ballot measure campaigns everywhere possible in our fight for economic fairness for all. And team, that means livable wages for everyone. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your support, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. President Biden just approved “Willow,” a massive oil drilling project in the Western Arctic Reserve in Alaska. This $8 billion project is projected to produce 600 million barrels of oil, and when that oil is burned, it will emit** the equivalent of **_****66** coal fired power plants in terms of greenhouse gasses.**_

**As the climate crisis rages on, new fossil fuel projects like these will only make the problem worse. We need to send a strong signal to this administration, elected officials, and candidates running for office that we must phase out fossil fuels before it’s too late.**

The best way to send that signal is to make it clear that ending the era of fossil fuels is a winning strategy — the more we can support climate champions up and down the ballot this year, the more we can make fossil fuels a voting issue in years to come. clean_body: We need to take immediate action and demand the end of fossil fuel use. | = | | | BREAKING NEWS: Biden approves $8 billion Willow oil drilling project in Alaska | = President Biden just approved “Willow,” a massive oil drilling project in the Western Arctic Reserve in Alaska. This $8 billion project is projected to produce 600 million barrels of oil, and when that oil is burned, it will emit the equivalent of **66 coal fired power plants in terms of greenhouse gasses. As the climate crisis rages on, new fossil fuel projects like these will only make the problem worse. We need to send a strong signal to this administration, elected officials, and candidates running for office that we must phase out fossil fuels before it’s too late. The best way to send that signal is to make it clear that ending the era of fossil fuels is a winning strategy — the more we can support climate champions up and down the ballot this year, the more we can make fossil fuels a voting issue in years to come. = | = It is not too late to avoid the worst effects of irreversible climate change, but we need to act now. We need to take immediate action and demand the end of fossil fuel use. Local elections play a crucial role in fighting back, and we need to elect climate champions at every level of government to stop new fossil fuel extraction and other infrastructure from being built. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you invest has an immediate impact and helps us support climate champions in 2023 and beyond. Thank you for taking meaningful action, Jane Fonda Climate PAC P.S. In addition to donating, you can help by calling the White House, and making it clear that the voters expect the President to live up to his climate commitments and stop new drilling projects like Willow. Dial (202) 456-1111 for the White House comment line (open Tues-Thurs, 11am - 3pm Eastern). | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | Hi team, it’s Greg.

I wanted to reach out personally to loop you in on a major campaign milestone: **We were just named a Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee 2024 Frontline race!**

Here’s what this means: The election here in OH-01 will be one of the most competitive races in 2024 – _and it’s one we absolutely must win if we’re going to take back the House Majority from the MAGA Republicans._

[**The stakes of defending this seat could not be any higher. That’s why I’m personally asking: Is there any amount you can pitch in to fuel our Frontline campaign and keep Southwest Ohio blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60192502/396304866/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjYxNTM4Ny1hZWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IDFt2RyqXK37_Yq6vdrkg8HsMIl7CzjbXbyCr0_slE=)
