Greg

On Friday, March 10, 2023 **Suzan DelBene, DCCC Chair** wrote:
Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Greg Landsman to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Greg’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Southwest Ohio. But with Greg serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping him in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $10 to help keep Greg Landsman in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60192504/396304869/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjYxNTM4Ny1hZWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IDFt2RyqXK37_Yq6vdrkg8HsMIl7CzjbXbyCr0_slE=) | [PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60192506/396304874/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjYxNTM4Ny1hZWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IDFt2RyqXK37_Yq6vdrkg8HsMIl7CzjbXbyCr0_slE=)
---

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Greg.** I know Greg has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for OH-01, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

[**I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Greg Landsman in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60192508/396304882/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjYxNTM4Ny1hZWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IDFt2RyqXK37_Yq6vdrkg8HsMIl7CzjbXbyCr0_slE=)

I wanted to reach out personally to loop you in on a major campaign milestone: We were just named a Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee 2024 Frontline race! Here’s what this means: The election here in OH-01 will be one of the most competitive races in 2024 – and it’s one we absolutely must win if we’re going to take back the House Majority from the MAGA Republicans. = With appreciation, Greg On Friday, March 10, 2023 Suzan DelBene, DCCC Chair wrote: Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Greg Landsman to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November. I’ve seen Greg’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Southwest Ohio. But with Greg serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping him in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. = | = I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher. Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block. The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel. But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Greg. I know Greg has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for OH-01, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with us, Suzan DelBene Chair, DCCC | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: DEVELOPING... GOP-led House votes to gut drinking water protections
body:
__Triple Match Status: [ACTIVE] |
---

|
Yesterday, we shared the disappointing news that ConocoPhillips' Willow Project was approved -- and today, we expect the pro-polluter led House to release their dirty energy plan in a giveaway to the fossil fuel industry. But as we said, there is plenty of good we can still do, and we're just getting started. We have an update for you now about protecting clean water for our communities:

This week the extreme GOP-led House officially passed legislation to limit the EPA's authority to protect the waters our families and communities depend on for drinking, recreation, and protection from flooding.********

Now, it's headed to the Senate for a vote, and there is a serious chance that this could pass. **Peter -- it's going to come down to a couple Senate votes.** _We can 't let this move any further._ _****_

**We need your help.** Our policy teams are meeting with Senate staff. We're organizing folks from all over the country to message their lawmakers. **We need to keep raising our voices until the vote, and that takes resources we just don 't have right now. _A group of donors has put up an emergency triple match fund to help power our campaign -- so we're asking for your help to protect our critical waters._** ____

Peter, the Senate vote is imminent. [Join our environmental movement today and a group of committed donors will TRIPLE MATCH your gift. That means a gift of just $5 has the power of $15 if you act right now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)
|
---
**[**TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT IN
SUPPORT OF CLEAN WATER**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

The Biden administration recently finalized important safeguards to ensure that critical bodies of water -- from small streams to rivers to wetlands -- are protected from unfettered pollution and destruction. This new Clean Water Restoration Rule is grounded in science, which underscores that many waters are connected and thus must be protected to safeguard downstream communities and the environment.

By attempting to block these protections, some members of Congress would put the waters our families, communities, and economy depend on in jeopardy. It gets worse -- this legislation would also block future administrations from issuing "substantially similar" clean water safeguards, to the benefit of polluters.
****
This legislation, pushed by big polluters and led by their allies in Congress, is a serious threat to our clean water. Congress should be doing more, not less, to protect our waters and ensure that everyone, no matter their race, zip code, or income, has access to clean water.

Unfortunately, this is only the beginning of the attacks on our health and environment we're going to see from an extreme GOP-led House. Our families and communities cannot afford for us to be silent now. Please, help keep our campaign going:
[We're counting on supporters like you to help us reach our $40,000 fundraising goal. TRIPLE your impact by making a gift today. Don't miss this opportunity -- even $5 brings us closer to our goal.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

---
**[**TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT:
PROTECT CLEAN WATER**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

Thank you for your support and for being a critical part of this ongoing fight.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

name: BREAKING (via DLCC)
subject: Republican lawmakers want the death penalty for abortion
body:
BREAKING: South Carolina GOP lawmakers propose the death penalty for women who have abortions. | | |
---
| | **__BREAKING: South Carolina GOP lawmakers propose the death penalty for women who have abortions.__** 21 state Republican lawmakers in South Carolina are co-sponsoring a bill that could make a woman who has an abortion in the state eligible for the death penalty. **These Republicans have made it perfectly clear they believe women are second-class citizens who don’t deserve the right to govern their own bodies or the right to their lives.** But this is the despicable reality of what is happening in Republican legislatures across the country. And while we wait to see what the future holds for this bill, you can bet more state Republicans across the nation will start introducing similar legislation soon. **As it stands, every Democratic-led state has taken action to protect or expand abortion access, but Republican-led states continue to push for extremist abortion bans.** It’s simple: State legislatures led by Republicans want to dictate our bodies, our freedoms, and now, the right to our lives. This is just the tip of the iceberg. For far too long, the Democratic state ballot level has been neglected while Republicans have quietly advanced their far-right agenda. We cannot afford to sit idly by as bills like this are getting oxygen. Republicans already control 58 state legislative chambers – and many of those states have Republican governors who’ve already promised to sign further abortion bans into law. Our best chance at ensuring bills like this never reach a vote is by electing state Democrats who will safeguard abortion rights, fight for expanded access to care, and ensure the right to choose what they do with their own bodies without fear of violent repercussions. [So please, chip in to help us elect pro-choice Democrats who will be champions for reproductive rights. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mG_6dP46tIkaM6jjrNOV3u8bBwhTpmuKHBp4Q6LCbnRkYU5cqBYX8w-QnHAcob8uQBebBndZ2qfK6I-rxJ3rbAil9jSVXgEwGxeockAooucacHk9ahCLrMVfFCD7yMHXxdWatcb8IiUVsDOPbEQLH9uNKqvVYv8HH2JJ9eMR6y3FMdl4bqranLjJwg9Q3XNXu7qfIhMDCltbsiW-JKAvYm7OGpiX2V4D1DK5D6uJWGVTH9eO4YcXOS1kBJjBlhbcPTtBfHlc_qCJ3LyQbkSMbkOWSdqOjvnJM4rXGRwFs48HDfG7GWThEEwAdfqvwzmcnfcCZCrQNJvvPrCSazNczhHiTb0yJqmpFgrcJ1KM7TStbtEkcARBfT9JfoyFwQroaXVNNK-OJyhEsyWWZN8ZQFHE/3uh/cO2-MdvtSAa1L81WS5E8Fg/h0/tI0l5aIf5v5pfE2mg5ATiKqm56u1tOnF-7xYCtAZF5A) Thank you. subject: My thoughts about SVB

body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=149a141164e745ddb7373ce747ce429e&_e=UyazFcOGO7e7UlVSA9EL1n_FKzyNAIRuEffuv3WA1VDa-yi9FgOL9JmVbREK2CXQeAnK3TCFxnyijttE8iSD2265lY0FDsUqI4ffrocR_r3izjKmQINAoQ-hWgT0WAhdC6GIDTUGjLSbIFhndS4gmksFLb7kmiF5QKpELPlCZMKMa35vxGX_wz8MA_rjAOUE3WHXqMqPKz6ZwRQycDBMwHAiu9oFQCQelX8GA3pGlmCaFhJjnexqHN1q1VWrTVqQKMRW-viMdTTYCrJ453nLEuEV0Bfbse-ooK4dFp2pyQPzi8RKRGL2WFGE8tDaUoZxg7YevS-WkFSzPuEzjwGljVBJ2op7_6h2nJNc78ndE041UX7T-SpGvpt6vLE7yI7FfHPRRZctaWuXIRyTScWgSA%3D%3D)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=149a141164e745ddb7373ce747ce429e&_e=UyazFcOGO7e7UlVSA9EL1n_FKzyNAIRuEffuv3WA1VDa-yi9FgOL9JmVbREK2CXQeAnK3TCFxnyijttE8iSD2265lY0FDsUqI4ffrocR_r3izjKmQINAoQ-hWgT0WAhdC6GIDTUGjLSbIFhndS4gmksFLb7kmiF5QKpELPlCZMKMa35vxGX_wz8MA_rjAOUE3WHXqMqPKz6ZwRQycDBMwHAiu9oFQCQelX8GA3pGlmAVuTs602rV9BRvia7i0rb-nlGPO54VYkTjjnwqdFcKwQA4zy9bPFY_L-p_dLoM5qxstWzxJ-_pypCuujctoZFWAk7NuaVqXNTQiu0s7gYMua46f-MSUZA2jiECBQy7mVcWuqEirCp-zW76SueTPBBYza7KL59C5ofHfhCGVs8yrg%3D%3D)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=149a141164e745ddb7373ce747ce429e&_e=UyazFcOGO7e7UlVSA9EL1n_FKzyNAIRuEffuv3WA1VDa-yi9FgOL9JmVbREK2CXQeAnK3TCFxnyijttE8iSD2265lY0FDsUqI4ffrocR_r3izjKmQINAoQ-hWgT0WAhdC6GIDTUGjLSbIFhndS4gmksFLb7kmiF5QKpELPlCZMKMa35vxGX_wz8MA_rjAOUE3WHXqMqPKz6ZwRQycDBMwHAiu9oFQCQelX8GA3pGlmCYDv-R6KnT3VDySfwTJR51kDnkhfW6TgDnFxOK67HlcOCz5LTLmy06wIhA_OFKy4PS_ZfLXUaiFaXgr3YZGzdbdNv8RylsvhfQuSCwUxbcH6avsoJ4A09jUNm3N_WfDxheNXT5bSnawPsy3rZHrjZo1NUFyU7GmN0C1Lw531VH-Q%3D%3D)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=149a141164e745ddb7373ce747ce429e&_e=UyazFcOGO7e7UlVSA9EL1n_FKzyNAIRuEffuv3WA1VDa-yi9FgOL9JmVbREK2CXQeAnK3TCFxnyijttE8iSD2265lY0FDsUqI4ffrocR_r3izjKmQINAoQ-hWgT0WAhdC6GIDTUGjLSbIFhndS4gmksFLb7kmiF5QKpELPlCZMKMa35vxGX_wz8MA_rjAOUE3WHXqMqPKz6ZwRQycDBMwHAiu9oFQCQelX8GA3pGlmDSe_8_9PaKyQ_6KPipl_eBI8EB6RK4jCKOG9uroWj56OoqVsFuKOyqWpDmZbrRvIkH2v8AvHHk0hUmQmi5YEFmbSsAKoT_7VjbKuTyFTxuL1tcifaoNlysDYsywSigduw68JoKplQxe8hapT1GZsh3W2m18MoNBon0rNM5q4VRTw%3D%3D)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=149a141164e745ddb7373ce747ce429e&_e=UyazFcOGO7e7UlVSA9EL1n_FKzyNAIRuEffuv3WA1VDa-yi9FgOL9JmVbREK2CXQeAnK3TCFxnyijttE8iSD2265lY0FDsUqI4ffrocR_r3izjKmQINAoQ-hWgT0WAhdC6GIDTUGjLSbIFhndS4gmksFLb7kmiF5QKpELPlCZMKMa35vxGX_wz8MA_rjAOUE3WHXqMqPKz6ZwRQycDBMwHAiu9oFQCQelX8GA3pGlmAdTM5cjwj89yznmC26xySbqyfgIY-ISDxuhjlD3Y0P2fgLyFxyD_KdpM4gFmch6k8UNBE1jdSwvKwgLCjffLT0nZpWcltCVbnnqvq2D9NLaOVRDYWNcFJfeNF-gxBJpiHQ74SxJSNCnAoHyMeOnUfh5eYoBiG8hwN8kSODrgBiIg%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government. | Fellow American, Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild. It makes my blood boil. The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets. This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility. | It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people. Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me. Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. body:

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60194059/396309974/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQzODhmYS1iM2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zpD08oNWnYvCNX0x1uqDP3zz8v-3CE6KNBkGOpOVdbc=&emci=0c96448d-6fc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0f4388fa-b3c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Democrats on the House Oversight Committee, one of the most powerful committees in Congress, requested that their Republican counterparts sign onto a letter denouncing white supremacy... _**and they ALL refused!**_

When given the chance to speak out about white supremacy, Marjorie Taylor Greene and her MAGA allies turned it down.

subject: Why did Congress deregulate banks?

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In 2018, Republicans and corporate Democrats came together to deregulate
banks. 😰

Now, in 2023, Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) is collapsing. As AOC said “the
regulators were there until SVB lobbied Congress to remove the
guardrails.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131041?refcode=em20230314-27983&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=27983%2E1203867%2EbBEfLi ][IMG]

We don’t need any more Democrats in Congress who will take orders from
lobbyists and deregulate entire industries while doing nothing for working
people in this country.

We’re outraged by this and need your help to elect more progressives like
AOC who will speak out against corporate lobbying and deregulation.

Team JD

body:
In precisely three weeks, Wisconsin voters will vote in two critical elections: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60194798/396312582/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzNiZGVjMS1iN2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oluztcbnrot_Gi_pJ8etI_GNvxVA5nEIGbKkXnR_GBc=) | In precisely three weeks, Wisconsin voters will vote in two critical elections: One to determine the fate of our Supreme Court and create a liberal majority, and another to break Republicans’ supermajority in the State Senate. These elections are so important to the future of our state and the future of reproductive rights across the country! Here are just a few issues Wisconsin’s next Supreme Court could hear:
* The Supreme Court will decide access to legal abortion in Wisconsin. Following the overturn of _Roe v. Wade_ , Gov. Tony Evers filed a lawsuit to overturn Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban, a case that’s widely expected to go before the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
* Redrawing our legislative maps – In 2022, the Supreme Court ruled 4-3 in favor of a legislative redistricting plan which gave Republicans an advantage. This new Supreme Court could hear a challenge to current maps if filed. This could help deconstruct the GOP’s hold on Madison!
* Rules for voting in the 2024 presidential election – The current conservative majority ruled that absentee drop boxes are illegal, and Republicans would like to make voting even HARDER. With a liberal majority, we could defend access to the ballot box for our seniors, disabled folks, students, and more.

[**So please, I’m asking you to make a donation to both Judge Janet’s race to flip the Supreme Court as well as Jodi’s race in Senate District 32 to break the GOP supermajority in the State Senate. Together, we can turn the page in Wisconsin history!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60194799/396312584/172520374?refcode=E20587-20230314-ThreeWeeks-SL-JointFundraiser-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzNiZGVjMS1iN2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oluztcbnrot_Gi_pJ8etI_GNvxVA5nEIGbKkXnR_GBc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60194800/396312585/172520374?refcode=E20587-20230314-ThreeWeeks-EG-JointFundraiser-RegTemplate-NA-NA&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzNiZGVjMS1iN2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oluztcbnrot_Gi_pJ8etI_GNvxVA5nEIGbKkXnR_GBc=)

With just three weeks left, these campaigns need our support to knock on doors, to get ads up on digital and radio, and to get any last-minute mailers designed. Both these races are attracting outside GOP money, and Democrats everywhere need to step up to support these critical races!

[**So,****please****, help us turn the tide in these elections and defend our freedoms here in Wisconsin! Donate whatever you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60194807/396312591/172520374?refcode=E20587-20230314-ThreeWeeks-SL-JointFundraiser-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzNiZGVjMS1iN2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oluztcbnrot_Gi_pJ8etI_GNvxVA5nEIGbKkXnR_GBc=)
– Brad
* * *
Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. As a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm, he's dedicated to finding commonsense solutions for our community's challenges. We can move Wisconsin forward, together. Thank you for being on our team, we really appreciate you, team! Hello — we have **TWO** exciting things in store for tomorrow:
1. Jason’s 44th birthday (we’re getting the cake ready right now)
2. Our crucial mid-month deadline — the last one of the quarter!

We’re getting ready to close the books on our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year. We’ll then have to publicly report our latest fundraising numbers to the FEC. Dark money donors, potential opponents, and the media will be watching to see how much we can raise — and whether we have what it takes to keep Colorado blue. Let’s knock it out of the park. name: D.C. STATEHOOD (via VPP)
subject: 🛑 STOP the MAGA-run House >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need all hands on deck, and every edge we can get
| _Did you see this?!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42026?t=6&akid=6728%2E878179%2EHyPxci) **We’re THRILLED that D.C. is pushing back against the MAGA controlled House and fighting for their rights** – _but we need all hands on deck to FINALLY solidify D.C. statehood!!_

[That’s why we’re launching our campaign to push for D.C. statehood and expand our Senate majority now. We still need 6,758 supporters to step up ASAP: Rush $7 now to push back against MAGA Republicans and help pass D.C. statehood! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42026?t=7&akid=6728%2E878179%2EHyPxci) **10,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED || DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT** | [**RUSH $7 NOW TO HELP PASS D.C. STATEHOOD AND SAVE OUR SENATE MAJORITY! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42026?t=8&akid=6728%2E878179%2EHyPxci)
---
Granting DC statehood would change everything.

**If Washington, D.C. is granted statehood** , residents will finally gain the representation they deserve – _and we’ll expand our Senate majority!_

**And if we can add just two more Senators** , we’ll have an edge in the 2024 elections, _when we’re defending TWICE as many Senate seats as Republicans!_

Protect transgender youth

Protect transgender youth.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60194959/396312927/294255004?refcode=EM_FR_221215DiverseLeg_N_CAUCUS_30DO_6_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjU4ZTViMi1iOGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oERzn_X1Rf8XhsxQ0hHnhszF-l583kaua_QgiDDDfiU=) Peter, We’ll get right to the point: **House Republicans are attempting to ban gender-affirming care for transgender youth.** As if dismantling women’s reproductive rights last year wasn’t enough, the Georgia GOP now wants to dictate what health care options Georgia families can or cannot provide their children. Georgia House Democrats strongly believe that we must protect the lives of transgender youth and that gender-affirming care is between families and medical professionals, not politicians. We are doing everything we can to stop this extremist bill from becoming law, **but we need your help.** [**Will you stand with us and tell radical Republicans that you oppose Senate Bill 140? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email&amount=5] Wiley is hard at work defending the rights of North Carolinians in Congress, and he has big goals for his time in office. This month is the most important one we have had so far this cycle. In just a matter of weeks, all of our fundraising numbers will be published. name: CaucusRoom
subject: They Are Coming for Your Washing Machine
body:
Biden is not an early bird. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkthdll-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday! **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-j/) **Hit Him Where it Hurts** House Republicans are looking to******[ban Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas and his staff from flying on federal executive aircraft](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-t/)****** or private jets until he presents a plan to Congress for securing the southwestern U.S. border. **They are Coming for Your Washing Machine** Biden's Energy Department **[proposed new efficiency standards for washing machines that would require new appliances to use considerably less water](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-i/),** all in an effort to 'confront the global climate crisis. **Biden Blames Trump** Biden is **[blaming the failure of two banks](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-d/)** on former President Trump for rolling back regulations. **Swarming the Border** A group of at least**[1,000 migrants rushed the Paso Del Norte bridge linking Mexico to the U.S. in El Paso](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-h/) **to gain access to the United States**.** **Another Reason to Avoid NYC** [**The Big Apple is being besieged by COVID-carrying rats**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-k/), and yes--they can transmit the virus to humans. Meanwhile, **[Biden is dragging his feet](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-u/) **on releasing COVID origins info. **The Data is Clear** A new study shows **[more liberal women](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-o/)** than conservative women have been told they have a mental health condition. **Psaki Makes Embarrassing Admission About Biden** Former WH Press Secretary **[Jen Psaki was called upon to share her thoughts on Biden's speech about two bank failures](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-x/) t**hat shook stocks on Wall Street and sent ripples through global markets.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* This animal is the **[leading cause](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-c/)** of climate change?
* I don't **[understand](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-q/).**
* About**[that money](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-a/).**
* Time to**[change your decorations](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-f/).**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-v/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkthdll-trhiujldw-s/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qkthdll-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-w) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qkthdll-trhiujldw-yd/)

body:
| | |
---
Peter, in a moment [**I’m going to ask you to contribute to my campaign and re-activate your Team James Membership**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60195467/396315147/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1003-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBjZjdmMi1iYmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fcg7Rt4Tj1ZhY6_wbqh2PWQGtxpIBhm7ipSBhijn1MY=) , but first I want to explain why I’m counting on your support.

Today is Equal Pay Day, and it’s one of the most concrete examples of _why_ we cannot falter in our fight for progress. Because in 2023, women in New York are _still_ earning just 88 cents to every dollar a white man earns. And when we break that into smaller groups, the statistics are even more jarring: **Black women are paid just _63 cents_ and Latina women only _56 cents_ for every dollar paid to white men.**

This is _unacceptable_. That’s why I’m fighting hard for the things that matter most to New York’s working families – workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, a future free of gun violence, and, of course, equal pay for equal work – but I can only win these fights with _your_ help.

**I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 March Team James Memberships and join our fight for equality, but it looks like I’m still missing your membership, Peter. Peter, if I can be candid for a second, I didn’t grow up with power of privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own.

That’s why, when I was elected in 2018, I vowed to do _everything_ in my power to become the fierce fighter that working families like my own need.

But with another Equal Pay Day rolling by and no _real_ progress being made on closing the pay gap, we cannot relent in the fight for equality.

**So please, will you be one of the 1,000 fearless fighters I need to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before midnight tomorrow?

[Donate any amount to this link to automatically renew your March Team James Membership.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60195475/396315155/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1003-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBjZjdmMi1iYmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fcg7Rt4Tj1ZhY6_wbqh2PWQGtxpIBhm7ipSBhijn1MY=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, in a moment = , but first I want to explain why I’m counting on your support. Today is Equal Pay Day, and it’s one of the most concrete examples of why we cannot falter in our fight for progress. Because in 2023, women in New York are still earning just 88 cents to every dollar a white man earns. And when we break that into smaller groups, the statistics are even more jarring: Black women are paid just 63 cents and Latina women only 56 cents for every dollar paid to white men. This is unacceptable. That’s why I’m fighting hard for the things that matter most to New York’s working families – workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, a future free of gun violence, and, of course, equal pay for equal work – but I can only win these fights with your help. I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 March Team James Memberships and join our fight for equality, but it looks like I’m still missing your membership, Peter. So please:= = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Peter, if I can be candid for a second, I didn’t grow up with power of privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own. That’s why, when I was elected in 2018, I vowed to do everything in my power to become the fierce fighter that working families like my own need. But with another Equal Pay Day rolling by and no real progress being made on closing the pay gap, we cannot relent in the fight for equality. So please, will you be one of the 1,000 fearless fighters I need to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before midnight tomorrow? = | | = Thank you for being in this fight alongside me. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: How many more banks will collapse?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
In 2018, Republicans pushed to gut key pieces of the landmark Dodd-Frank legislation that allows us to properly regulate the same banks once called “too big to fail.” In 2018, they succeeded — and dozens of Democrats joined them. **_See?_**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40873?refcode=em20230314-2271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)
Our economic regulations are in place for a reason. Myself and other key members of the Progressive Caucus called it out for what it was: a shortsighted and blatant handout to big banks that could bring economic ruin. **And we were right.**
**This is what I said in 2018:** “The truth is the American people are sick and tired of government working for somebody other than them. We’re rolling back rules... you don’t need to take a sledgehammer to the Dodd-Frank regulation overall.”
**_This is what just happened:_**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40873?refcode=em20230314-2271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)
[**Enough is enough, Peter. I will not let this go — but I need your support to keep fighting for relief for working people over bailouts for Big Banks. Will you chip in $3 today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40873?refcode=em20230314-2271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)
**[Pitch In $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40873?refcode=em20230314-2271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)**
**_Now Silicon Valley Bank is the second largest U.S. Bank in history to fall:_**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40873?refcode=em20230314-2271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)
My priority is to protect working people and families across the country. After years of COVID, recent inflation, and GOP attacks on Social Security and Medicare, people can’t afford to lose any more because of **bad policy and irresponsible decision-making from a powerful few.** Now it seems federal government officials will be stepping in to investigate:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40873?refcode=em20230314-2271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)
While I want to see accountability served, it will ring hollow if we don’t change our policy along with it. **We have that power and we have to use it.** I fully intend to use our authority as the largest Democratic caucus in Congress to fully pursue justice and right these wrongs. My colleagues and I will fight to make sure this does not spiral into a preventable crisis brought on by greed and corruption.
[**Will you stand with us in this fight, Peter? $3 — or any amount — will go a long way to power our work.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40873?refcode=em20230314-2271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230314-2271-footer&t=26&refcode2=2271_420207_sLOJ43&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=27&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2271%2E420207%2EsLOJ43)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team Cooper
subject: Urgent: Add your name in support of fair maps in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
With the future of fair maps on the line, we need everyone to make their voices heard today.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60195690/396315992/823540626?refcode=ea.282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODJlYzlkOS1iY2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2kO9tidTtVGomp8nm-Bk0ENlDuK5OAiurWYXmtSyfA=&emci=4231fafa-a0c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — **Today, the North Carolina Supreme Court — with a newly-elected Republican majority — is considering a case to reverse last year’s decision to outlaw partisan redistricting.** It’s no secret why the GOP legislature wants the power to gerrymander maps in their own political favor. Our state is a true swing state — with statewide elections coming down to the smallest margin of votes. The court imposed constitutional maps resulted in 7 Republicans and 7 Democrats elected to Congress. Fair, right? Not to the Republicans who are in charge of the state legislature. They want it at 10-4 or even 11-3 in their favor, and they’ll do it if this new court overturns the case and lets them. They want to choose their voters instead of voters choosing who they want. **[We must speak out in favor of fair maps. Add your name ASAP>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60195691/396315993/-126724901?refcode=ea.282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODJlYzlkOS1iY2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2kO9tidTtVGomp8nm-Bk0ENlDuK5OAiurWYXmtSyfA=&emci=4231fafa-a0c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | ******[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60195692/396315994/-126724901?refcode=ea.282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODJlYzlkOS1iY2MyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2kO9tidTtVGomp8nm-Bk0ENlDuK5OAiurWYXmtSyfA=&emci=4231fafa-a0c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=282ec9d9-bcc2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)******

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Take a stand for Texas!
body:
Act now and sign the petition...

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS: It's time to act**
Sign the petition today to pressure the Montgomery County & Harris County GOPs to sign a resolution calling on Governor Greg Abbott to ban the sale and distribution of the COVID-19 vaccine.
It’s time for Texans to join together to take a stand for public health. We’re calling on Texas leaders to step up and ban the sale and distribution of the jab.
Join us in adding your voice to this critical effort – sign our petition today.
We are fighting for our state, families, and future – make your mark today!
Act now to pressure the Montgomery County & Harris County GOPs to sign a resolution calling on Governor Greg Abbott to ban the jab in Texas.

**Click on your county below to sign the petition.**
[Montgomery County](
https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbSUyRmphbWVzb25lbGxpc2ZvcmNvbmdyZXNzJTJGYmFuLXRoZS1qYWItbW9jby1wZXRpdGlvbg==&sig=3kGDQN89Z4xfRhUr3WWTYBB37Wz8QotKbHvZHwJRNFwM&iat=1678835317&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN3wmAYvUauNNb%2BM61tN%2FfIuk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=145A172A1A1266

_**This is all because of you.**_ In 2022, this grassroots team beat the odds and proved that we can go up against the GOP and their dark money machine. And I know we can do it again – and that we have to – if we want a chance at Democrats taking back the majority.

[**We need all hands on deck to make this win happen, so I’m humbly asking – can you chip in whatever you can today so I can build a strong re-election campaign and keep fighting for Central and Southern Illinois in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196183/396317812/-1547163637?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_nb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDEyNTExOC1jMmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6IfmbYKrYjCv9eGsk5Ab_teCPY0jKtXNw2iDFPU0BA=) | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196184/396317813/476961211?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_nb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDEyNTExOC1jMmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6IfmbYKrYjCv9eGsk5Ab_teCPY0jKtXNw2iDFPU0BA=)

Thank you so much,

Nikki

On Friday, March 10, 2023 **Suzan DelBene, DCCC Chair** wrote:
Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Nikki Budzinski to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Nikki’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across Illinois’ 13th district. But with Nikki serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in any amount to help keep Nikki in Congress and take back the Democratic Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196185/396317814/-1547163637?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_nb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDEyNTExOC1jMmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6IfmbYKrYjCv9eGsk5Ab_teCPY0jKtXNw2iDFPU0BA=)
[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196186/396317815/476961211?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_nb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDEyNTExOC1jMmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6IfmbYKrYjCv9eGsk5Ab_teCPY0jKtXNw2iDFPU0BA=)

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**

Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.

The stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__

**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Nikki.** I know Nikki has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for Illinois’ 13th district, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

[**I’m asking you to dig deep: Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep House Democrats like Nikki in Congress and help us take back the House Majority in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196187/396317816/-1547163637?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.14_b1_nb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDEyNTExOC1jMmMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6IfmbYKrYjCv9eGsk5Ab_teCPY0jKtXNw2iDFPU0BA=)

name: VADEMS
subject: Our Mid Month Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
what we need to raise before midnight tomorrow

|
---
Derek, We need your help to keep pace with the Virginia GOP. We’re coming up on the middle of the month, and we’re running a bit behind schedule to hit our monthly goal. He's what we need to raise by tomorrow at midnight.

Today is Equal Pay Day, Peter — which means women just finished earning what men earned last year for the same work. **Of course, that gap is even larger for women of color, women with disabilities, women who are undocumented, and so on.** There is no real reason why women should be making less than men for equal work in the year 2023. We need our elected officials to address the gender pay gap with the urgency it deserves and take immediate action to close the gap. [_**Will you sign on now to let your elected officials know we demand equal pay NOW:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196275/396318163/-1934649210?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230314_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODEwZGRhNGYtYzJjMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e1dlJM7RZFg_YhQsX9IrkXeQ9-cjZM5GMdXTAqKC3lQ=&emci=800dda4f-c2c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=810dda4f-c2c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196276/396318164/-1934649210?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230314_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODEwZGRhNGYtYzJjMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e1dlJM7RZFg_YhQsX9IrkXeQ9-cjZM5GMdXTAqKC3lQ=&emci=800dda4f-c2c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=810dda4f-c2c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400)

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. subject: This first deadline means everything:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Not to be too alarmist, but our first FEC filing deadline means everything.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1948%2E5257348%2Eg_JPO8)
| **Our final mid-month deadline of the quarter is coming up in less than 48 hours. Help us grow our momentum to elect Adam Schiff to the U.S. Senate. Pitch in $3 now:** | [DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230314_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1948%2E5257348%2Eg_JPO8)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230314_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1948%2E5257348%2Eg_JPO8)
---
Derek —
Here’s why our team at Schiff for Senate HQ is so focused on tomorrow’s fundraising deadline.
When the clock strikes midnight this Wednesday, that’ll mark the halfway point for the month. Then, just 15 days later, we’ll be racing toward our first FEC filing deadline since launching our campaign for U.S. Senate.
Not to be too alarmist, but our first FEC filing deadline means _everything._
_Reporters. Opponents. Dark money groups. Oh my!_
Everybody will be watching to see how much Adam has raised since jumping in the race — and whether we have what it takes to sustain our momentum in the race for the U.S. Senate.
We’re competing in a crowded field, so it’s important we start off really, really strong. Raising more money right now will help us present the best numbers to the FEC on March 31st. Prove our grassroots movement. Show our momentum is growing. Elect Adam.
